title: The filthiest Amazon categories, ranked
blurb: What share of each category's reviews contain at least one profanity hit? Ranked by rate. Video games pulled ahead by a mile.

title: The loudest reviewers on Amazon
blurb: Reviews ranked by all-caps word ratio × sqrt(length). Longer screaming wins over shorter screaming. THE VOLUME IS REAL.

rows.text:
RATED 5 STARS BY MOZART AUDIOPHILES #1 CHAMBER MUSIC CD MOZART'S DIVERTIMENTO NO.10 [K.247 LODRON 1] & DIVERTIMENTO NO.17 [K.334 ROBINIG VON ROTENFELD].

CD REVIEWER NOTE TO AMAZON.COM READERS: I TYPE WITH LARGE CAP LETTERS TO READ WHAT I WRITE BECAUSE I AM A 100% DISABLED DECORATED VIETNAM VETERAN AND AM ALMOST BLIND WITH MACULAR DEGENERATION. I APOLOGIZE FOR ANY INCONVENIENCE LARGE CAPS MAY CAUSE YOU. ~PATRICK HILL, MOZART SCHOLAR & AUTHOR~

WOLFGANG AMADEUS MOZART [1756 - 1791]
*DIVERTIMENTO NO.10 IN F [K.247 LODRON 1]
*DIVERTIMENTO NO.17 IN D [K.334 ROBINIG VON ROTENFELD]
PERFORMED BY THE LEGENDARY VIENNA OCTET

THIS RARE OUT-OF-PRINT MOZART COLLECTORS CD IS FOUND IN MOST MOZARTEAN'S CD/MP3 COLLECTION!

THIS 1990 DIGITALLY REMASTERED CD WAS ORIGINALLY RECORDED BY THE CRITICALLY ACCLAIMED VIENNA OCTET IN 1956. ONLY THREE [3] CD RECORDINGS FROM THE VIENNA OCTET EXIST EVEN THOUGH THE VIENNA OCTET MADE OVER 30 BEST SELLING MOZART LP RECORDS IN THE 1950S AND 1960S.

ABOUT VIENNA OCTET OF THE VIENNA PHILHARMONIC
RATED AS ONE OF THE 20TH CENTURY'S GREATEST VIOLINISTS, WILLI BOSKOVSKY JOINED THE VIENNA ACADEMY OF MUSIC AT THE AGE OF 9. AT AGE 25, BOSKOVSKY BECAME CONCERTMASTER OF THE FAMED VIENNA PHILHARMONIC ORCHESTRA FROM 1936 TO 1979.

FORMED IN 1958 BY VIOLINIST/CONDUCTOR WILLI BOSKOVSKY, THE VIENNA OCTET WAS CREATED AS THE FIRST CHAMBER ENSEMBLE OF THE VIENNA PHILHARMONIC ORCHESTRA. FAMOUS THE THEIR HIGH STANDARDS, RAZOR-SHARP PRECISION, AND SRO PERFORMANCES, THE VIENNA OCTET'S ORIGINAL MEMBERS INCLUDED:

*WILLI BOSKOVSKY (1ST VIOLIN)
*PHILIPP MATHEIS (2ND VIOLIN)
*GUNTHER BREITENBACH (VIOLA)
*NIKOLAUS HÜBNER (VIOLONCELLO)
*JOHANN KRUMP (DOUBLE-BASS)
*ALFRED BOSKOVSKY (CLARINET)
*JOSEF VELEBA (HORN)
*RUDOLF HANZL (BASSOON)

MOZART COMPOSED HIS DIVERTIMENTO K.247, DIVERTIMENTO K.287, AND DIVERTIMENTO K.334 WITH MORE CHAMBER MUSIC SUBSTANCE AND HARMONIC RICHNESS BY INTEGRATING MORE CONCERTANTE ELEMENTS WITH THE VIOLIN CONCERTO INTO HIS NEWLY INVENTED DIVERTIMENTO AND SERENADE CLASSICAL MUSIC GENRE!

ABOUT MOZART'S DIVERTIMENTO NO.10 IN F [K.247 LODRON 1]
COMPOSED IN 1776 AT SALZBURG WHEN MOZART WAS 2O YEARS OLD, DIVERTIMENTO NO.10 [K.247 LODRON 1] IS SCORED FOR 2 HORNS, 2 VIOLINS, VIOLA, AND DOUBLE BASS WITH SIX [6] MOVEMENTS. MOZART RECEIVED A COMMISSION FOR HIS DIVERTIMENTO K.247 FROM HIS PATRON COUNTESS ANTONIA LODRON, A PIANIST AND LEADING LIGHT OF SALZBURG'S CLASSICAL MUSIC LOVING ARISTOCRACY.

FOR HIS SAME PATRON COUNTESS ANTONIA LODRON, MOZART ALSO COMPOSED TWO OTHER MASTERPIECES HIS DIVERTIMENTO NO.15 IN B [K.287 LODRON 2] AND HIS PIANO CONCERTO NO.7 FOR 3 PIANOS IN F [K.242 LODRON] SO THAT HIS PATRON COUNTESS LODRON MIGHT PERFORM WITH HER TWO [2] DAUGHTERS BOTH OF WHOM WERE MOZART'S PUPILS.

MOZART'S DIVERTIMENTO [K.247 LODRON 1] IS A GRAND SCALE VIOLIN CONCERTO THAT CONTAINS SIX [6] SUBSTANTIAL MOVEMENTS OF WORLD CLASS CHAMBER MUSIC. DIVERTIMENTO K.247'S SONATA ALLEGRO 1ST MOVEMENT DELIGHTS OUR EARS WITH A WEALTH OF INVENTION WHERE THE 1ST VIOLIN'S SOLO AND TUTTI PASSAGES HAVE A MORE PROMINENT ROLE AND LEAD THE DIALOGUE BETWEEN THE 2 HORNS, 2ND VIOLIN, VIOLA, AND DOUBLE BASS! THIS DOMINANCE OF DIVERTIMENTO K.247'S 1ST VIOLIN IS MAINTAINED THROUGHOUT THE REMAINING 5 MOVEMENTS. K.247'S ORNAMENTED ANDANTE 2ND MOVEMENT IS A SLOW RONDO WITH A MOOD OF DREAMY LONGING. IN DIVERTIMENTO K.247'S FIRST MINUET MENUETTO 3RD MOVEMENT AND SECOND MINUET MENUETTO TRIO 5TH MOVEMENT, ELEGANT DANCING THEMES AND DEEPLY EXPRESSIVE MELODIES WITH PIZZICATOS [PIZZICATO MEANS PLUCKING THE VIOLIN AND VIOLA STRINGS WITH FINGERS INSTEAD OF THE BOW TO CREATE A DIFFERENT SHORT PERCUSSIVE SOUND]! IN DIVERTIMENTO K.247'S ADAGIO 4TH MOVEMENT, MOZART COMPOSED A PURE STRING QUARTET WITHOUT THE HAUNTINGLY BEAUTIFUL 2 HORNS FOUND IN K.247'S OTHER 5 MOVEMENTS! IN DIVERTIMENTO K.247'S ROLLICKING CONTREDANSE [COUNTRY DANCE] FINALE 6TH MOVEMENT, MOZART COMPOSED A SCINTILLATING VIOLIN CONCERTO THAT EXHIBITS THE VERY LIFE AND SOUL OF CHAMBER MUSIC!

ABOUT MOZART'S DIVERTIMENTO NO.17 IN D [K.334 ROBINIG VON ROTENFELD]
COMPOSED IN SALZBURG IN THE YEAR 1779, MOZART'S DIVERTIMENTO NO.17 [K.334] IS SCORED FOR 2 HORNS, 2 VIOLINS, VIOLA, AND DOUBLE BASS. MOZART RECEIVED A COMMISSION FOR HIS DIVERTIMENTO K.334 FROM HIS PATRON AND FAMILY'S FRIENDS, THE ROBINIG VON ROTENFELDS, MEMBERS OF SALZBURG'S CLASSICAL MUSIC LOVING ARISTOCRACY. SPECIFICALLY, MOZART COMPOSED K.334 TO COMMEMORATE THE GRADUATION OF HIS CLOSE FRIEND SIGMUND ROBINIG FROM HIS LAW STUDIES AT THE UNIVERSITY OF SALZBURG IN 1780. SIGMUND ROBINIG WAS A SUPERB VIOLINIST AND PUPIL OF WOLFGANG MOZART. THUS, MOZART COMPOSED DIVERTIMENTO NO.17 K.334 WITH AN AMBITIOUS 1ST VIOLIN PART FOR SIGMUND ROBINIG TO PERORM.

CONSIDERED TO BE AMONG HIS MOST COMPLEX SOPHISTICATED RICHLY SCORED DIVERTIMENTI, MOZART'S DIVERTIMENTO K.334 IS A GRAND SCALE VIOLIN CONCERTO THAT CONTAINS SIX [6] SUBSTANTIAL MOVEMENTS OF WORLD CLASS CHAMBER MUSIC. WITH AN UNUSUAL LENGTH OF 45 MINUTES AND LONGER THAN ANY OTHER MOZART DIVERTIMENTI, DIVERTIMENTO K.334 CONTAINS SIGNIFICANTLY MORE STRUCTURE THAN MOZART'S TYPICAL DIVERTIMENTO. SCORED FOR A CHAMBER ENSEMBLE OF SIX INSTRUMENTS, DIVERTIMENTO K.334 IS A CHEERY CONTEMPLATIVE VIOLIN CONCERTO WITH EXPERTLY INTEGRATED VIOLINS, HORNS, CELLO, AND VIOLA THAT CREATED MOZART'S FINEST DIVERTIMENTO CHAMBER MUSIC. IN DIVERTIMENTO K.334'S SONATA ALLEGRO 1ST MOVEMENT, ALL SIX INSTRUMENTS CREATE AN EXCITING CHAMBER MUSIC DIALOGUE WHERE THE 1ST VIOLIN AND HORNS LEAD. IN DIVERTIMENTO K.334'S D MINOR ANDANTE 2ND MOVEMENT, ITS THEME IS ARTFULLY VARIED AND HEIGHTENED DURING THE 2ND MOVEMENT'S SIX VARIATIONS CALLED TEMA CON VARIAZIONI. DIVERTIMENTO K.334'S MENUETTO TRIO I 3RD MOVEMENT AND MENUETTO TRIO II 5TH MOVEMENT ARE TWO [2] MINUETS THAT FRAME K.334'S ADAGIO 4TH MOVEMENT WHICH IS AN ROMANTIC ENRAPTURED SERENADE WHERE THE FIRST VIOLIN LETS ITS CANTILENA [A SUSTAINED SMOOTH FLOWING MELODY] BLOSSOM TO THREE LINE OCTAVE HEIGHTS! DIVERTIMENTO K.334'S MENUETTO TRIO I 3RD MOVEMENT IS A FAMOUS DUET BETWEEN THE 1ST VIOLIN AND VIOLA WITH SOFT PIZZICATO ACCOMPANIMENT [PIZZICATO MEANS PLUCKING THE VIOLIN AND VIOLA STRINGS WITH FINGERS INSTEAD OF THE BOW TO CREATE A DIFFERENT SHORT PERCUSSIVE SOUND]! DIVERTIMENTO K.334'S MENUETTO TRIO II 5TH MOVEMENT IS CHARMING DANCE SERENADE THAT RESEMBLES A HIGHLY ENTERTAINTING GERMAN LANDLER. DIVERTIMENTO K.334'S CAPTIVATING RONDO 6TH MOVEMENT EXHIBITS MOZART'S INGENIOUS VIRTUOSO DEMANDS WITH A LIMITLESS FASCINATING THEMES, MEOLDIES, AND TONAL COLORS MADE ON THE 2 VIOLINISTS, 2 HORNS, CELLO, AND VIOLA!

ABOUT MOZART'S CHAMBER MUSIC DIVERTIMENTI AND SERENADES
IN THE 18TH CENTURY, ONE OF MOZART'S SPECIALTIES WAS COMPOSING FESTIVE ENTERTAINMENT MUSIC CALLED DIVERTIMENTI AND SERENADES TO BE PLAYED AS BACKGROUND MUSIC BY A SMALL CHAMBER MUSIC ENSEMBLE AT OUTDOOR SOCIAL EVENTS SUCH AS NAME DAYS, BIRTHDAYS, NEW YEAR'S FESTIVITIES, WEDDINGS, AND SCHOOL GRADUATION CELEBRATIONS WHERE PARTY GUESTS ENJOYING A DRINKS AND MEALS. THE WELL-TO-DO PATRON'S OF MOZART'S ENTERTAINMENT MUSIC [ALSO CALLED CHAMBER MUSIC] WERE USUALLY THE ARISTOCRACY IN MOZART'S NATIVE SALZBURG AND VIENNA. AT SOME ENTERTAINMENT MUSIC OCCASIONS, MOZART HIMSELF OFTEN PLAYED THE SOLO VIOLIN, VIOLA, AND PIANO PASSAGES OF HIS DIVERTIMENTI AND SERENADES.

ALTHOUGH MOZART'S DIVERTIMENTI AND SERENADES WERE FUN LIGHT HEARTED CHAMBER MUSIC UNLIKE HIS SERIOUS SYMPHONIES AND CONCERTOS WHICH WERE INTENDED TO BE PERFORMED IN A THEATRE OR CONCERT ROOM, MOZART'S ENTERTAINMENT MUSIC [ALSO CALLED CHAMBER MUSIC] OFFERS CLASSICAL MUSIC ENTHUSIASTS THE SAME BEAUTY, CHARM, AND UNIQUE QUALITY AS HIS MORE SERIOUS MATURE CLASSICAL WORKS.

A 752-page compilation of family sketches and photos of Nacogdoches Co., Texas settlers and decendants.

Surnames included are:

ACREY, ADAMS, AIKEN, ALDERS, ALEXANDER, ALLEN, ANDERSON, ARMSTRONG, ARNOLD, ATKINSON, ATWOOD, ATKINSON, AUSTIN, BAILEY, BAKER, BALCH, BALLARD, BARHAM, BARNETT, BARNHART, BARRET(T), BARRON, BASS, rows.text:
STAR TREK PORTRAYS AN OPTIMISTIC FUTURE WHERE MANKIND CAN PUT ASIDE ALL DIFFERENCES AND HAVE A UNITED EARTH, AND ALL VIEWPOINTS THAT RESPECT OTHER PEOPLE'S GOD GIVEN RIGHTS ARE ENCOURAGED. STAR TREK'S SUCCESS CAN BE ATTRIBUTED TO THE FACT THAT EPISODES ARE RELEVANT TO TODAY BECAUSE THEY ARE MORALITY PLAYS THAT TEACH WATCHERS GREAT VALUES AND CAUSE THEM TO BE EXITED TO WORK FOR THE BETTER FUTURE OF THE STAR TREK UNIVERSE!
THE EXCELLENT MOVIE STAR TREK 2: THE WRATH OF KHAN, IS TECHNICALLY A SEQUEL TO STAR TREK TOS (THE ORIGINAL SERIES) EPISODE CALLED SPACE SEED, IN WHICH THE ENTERPRISE CREW DISCOVERS KHAN AND CREW IN DEEP SPACE IN SUSPENDED ANIMATION SINCE 1996 AND REVIVES THEM. DURING HIS HIBERNATION SICKNESS RECUPERATION, KHAN IS SHOWN EXTRAORDINARY KINDNESS BY CAPTAIN KIRK, EVEN GIVING HIM FULL ACCESS TO THE FEDERATION LIBRARY WHICH KHAN UTILIZES FOR EVIL. HE TAKES CONTROL OF THE ENTERPRISE AND TRIES TO KILL CAPTAIN KIRK. CAPTAIN KIRK IS RESCUED AND AT KHAN'S TRIAL MERCIFULLY ALLOWS KHAN AND THE ENTERPRISE'S HISTORIAN MARLA, WHO FALLS IN LOVE WITH KHAN, TO HAVE FULL CONTROL OVER AN UNINHABITED CLASS M PLANET.
WITH A HAPPY ENDING FOR ALL, KIRK MOVES ON TO HIS FURTHER MISSIONS OF A VERY BUSY CAREER, RARELY ABLE TO GO BACK TO THE PLANETS HE HAS HELPED. FURTHER VISITS OF COURSE ARE USUALLY THE JOB OF NONSTARFLEET BRANCHES OF THE FEDERATION.
UNFORTUNATELY, KHAN'S PLANET HAS A GEOLOGICAL DISASTER, UNBEKNOWNST TO THE FEDERATION, THAT NEARLY RENDERS THE PLANET UNINHABITABLE AND CAUSES SOME DEATHS, MOST NOTABLE MARLA, KHAN'S BELOVED WIFE. KHAN BLAMES KIRK FOR ALL THAT GOES WRONG, JUST AS HIS LITERARY HERO CAPTAIN AHAB BLAMES MOBY DICK. THE RESULT IN BOTH CASES IS OBSESSIVE VENGEANCE REGARDLESS OF THE COST. WOULDN'T YOU SAY THAT KHAN TOTALLY MISSED THE POINT OF THE MELVILLE BOOK?
THE GOD THAT CREATED HEAVEN AND EARTH HAS DECREED THAT HE WILL JUDGE ALL FOR THE GOOD OR EVIL THAT WE DO IN THE FLESH AND THAT VENGEANCE IS FOR HIM ALONE TO TAKE. HE FURTHER COMMANDS THAT WHEN THERE IS A SERIOUS ISSUE WITH ANOTHER, THAT YOU COMMUNICATE IT GENTLY AND PRIVATELY WITH THE PERSON YOU HAVE ISSUE WITH. IF THE PERSON WILL NOT CEASE A DELIBERATE OFFENSE, YOU ARE TO SEPARATE FROM THEM UNTIL THEY DO, NEVER RETURNING EVIL FOR EVIL.
CAPTAIN TERREL AND CHEKOV MISTAKENLY DISCOVERED KHAN WHILE INVESTIGATING WHY THERE WERE WEAK LIFEFORM READINGS ON A PLANET THAT HAD PREVIOUSLY BEEN CATAGORIZED AS LIFELESS AND HAD BEEN SELECTED TO LAUNCH A TERRAFORMING TORPEDO. THE GEOLOGICAL DISASTER HAD SHIFTED THE ORBIT SO THEY CHECKED THE WRONG PLANET.
IN THIS STAR TREK 2 "EPISODE" WE HAVE ANOTHER OF MANY AMAZING EMOTION VS LOGIC DEBATES BETWEEN DR MCCOY AND SPOCK, WHICH HAVE ALWAYS BEEN OF GREAT HELP TO KIRK IN ANY DECISIONS THAT HE HAS TO MAKE AND IS THE KEY TO MANY OF HIS LEGENDARY SUCCESSES! WE ALL STRUGGLE WITH THE BALANCE BETWEEN EMOTION AND LOGIC. TO CONTINUE, SPOCK SAID THAT THE TORPEDO WOULD ELIMINATE PREEXISTING LIFE IN FAVOR OF IT'S NEW MATRIX. MCCOY CALLED THIS UNIVERSAL ARMAGEDDON, OBVIOUSLY FEARING THAT THIS "GENESIS" INVENTION INTENDED TO HELP IN OVERPOPULATION AND STARVATION PROBLEMS WOULD INSTEAD BE USED FOR A WEAPON, WHICH IS PRECISELY WHAT DROVE SOME KLINGONS TO ATTACK IN THE NEXT MOVIE. ALSO MCCOY ADDRESSED THE HUBRIS OF MAN PLAYING GOD, NOT SAYING BUT SUGGESTING PREVIOUS HUBRIS EFFORTS SUCH AS THE TOWER OF BABEL OR THE TITANIC.
WARNING: DO NOT READ FURTHER UNTIL AFTER YOU HAVE SEEN STAR TREK 2,3, AND 4!
WHAT IF KHAN ACCEPTED A TRANSPLANT TO A BETTER PLANET FOR HIS PEOPLE WITH SOME EMERGENCY SUPPLIES INSTEAD OF USING THE CETI EELS FOR TORTURE? IT WAS THE CETI EELS WHICH CAUSED HIM TO GET THE GENESIS INFO AND ULTIMATELY THE DEVICE ITSELF. IF HE HAD WORKED WITH TERRELL AND CHEKOV PER GOD'S GOLDEN RULE (LUKE6:31), THE FOLLOWING SUFFERINGS WOULD NOT HAVE HAPPENED: NO DEATHS IN TERRELLS CREW, NO DEATHS OF THE GENESIS SCIENTISTS INCLUDING KIRK'S SON IN THE NEXT MOVIE, NO DEATHS OF THE TRAINEE CHILDREN ON BOARD THE ENTERPRISE INCLUDING MR SCOTT'S GIFTED NEPHEW, NO DEATHS OF KHANS CREW AND CHILDREN, NO AGAPE SACRIFICE BY SPOCK IN ORDER TO SAVE EVERYONE ELSE ON BOARD THE ENTERPRISE, AND IN STAR TREK3, NO UNLAWFUL YET AGAPE ACTIVITY BY KIRK AND CREW TO SAVE SPOCK'S KATRA (SOUL), AND NO KLINGON INVASION THAT DESTROYED THE USS GRISSOM AND ENTERPRISE AT THE GENESIS WORLD AND KILLED ALL BUT ONE OF THE INVADING KLINGON BIRDOFPREY CREW! IF THE GENESIS TORPEDO HAD BEEN SET OFF AS PLANNED, THE FEDERATION WOULD HAVE BEEN READY WITH A SUFFICIENT FORCE OF SHIPS IN THE AREA TO PREVENT PIRACY AND OPPORTUNISTS SUCH AS THE INVADING CAPTAIN KRUGE'S BIRDOFPREY.
WOULD KIRK STILL HAVE BEEN ABLE TO SAVE EARTH IN STAR TREK 4 FROM AN ANGRY WHALE PROBE? OF COURSE AND GEORGE AND GRACY WOULD HAVE BEEN MUCH MORE COMFORTABLE IN THE ENTERPRISES LARGE SHUTTLE BAY THAN ON A CAPTURED AND STINKY KLINGON BIRDOFPRAY!
SPOCKS AGAPE (IE SACRIFICIAL LOVE) SACRIFICE AND KIRK AND CREWS AGAPE RISKS ARE GREAT EXAMPLES OF THE ACTS 5:29 COMMANDMENT TO OBEY GOD OVER MAN WHEN MAN ORDERS YOU TO DO SOMETHING AGAINST THE CHRISTIAN RELIGION'S BIBLICAL TEACHINGS! THE LOVE AND THE SACRIFICES THESE FUTURE FICTITIOUS PEOPLE MAKE IS AN INSPIRATION TO US ALL!
THE CAST, CREW, AND WRITING OF STAR TREK 2 AND THE OTHER 2 MOVIES IN THIS TRILOGY IS STAR TREK IS ITS VERY FINEST! AND TRULY WE FIND OUT THAT VENGEANCE BENEFITS ABSOLUTELY NO ONE, ACTUALLY HURTING EVERYONE INVOLVED. "LIKE A POOR MARKSMAN YOU KEEP MISSING THE TARGET"
REMEMBER THAT IT IS NEVER TOO LATE TO CHANGE THE WAY YOU THINK AND ACT IN COMPLIANCE TO GOD'S COMMANDMENTS! MY STAR TREK HERO'S DEFINITELY KNOW OF GOD'S "AMAZING GRACE." AND MR SCOTT LOVES TO PLAY THIS MOST BEAUTIFUL OF CHRISTIAN ANTHEMS ON HIS BAGPIPES. HOW EMOTIONALLY POWERFUL AND HOW APPROPRIATE TO HEAR "AMAZING GRACE" AT SPOCK'S MEMORIAL.
FOR MORE INFO ON RESOLVING ISSUES/CONFLICTS PLEASE READ MY TEACHING AUTOBIOGRAPHY, "THE WAY TO DEAL WITH SINNERS." I'VE BEEN WORKING FOR LOVE, ACCEPTANCE, FORGIVENESS, PEACE, AND OUR GOD GIVEN AND CONSTITUTIONAL FREEDOMS SINCE 1979!
"samishbaywatcher"

RATED 5-STARS BY MOZART AUDIOPHILES WORLD'S #1 PERIOD INSTRUMENT CHAMBER MUSIC CD MOZART CLARINET QUINTET K.581 STADLER, OBOE QUARTET K.370, AND HORN QUINTET K.407 ACADEMY OF ANCIENT MUSIC CHAMBER ENSEMBLE!

CD REVIEWER NOTE TO AMAZON.COM READERS: I TYPE WITH LARGE CAP LETTERS TO READ WHAT I WRITE BECAUSE I AM A 100% DISABLED DECORATED VIETNAM VETERAN AND AM ALMOST BLIND WITH MACULAR DEGENERATION. I APOLOGIZE FOR ANY INCONVENIENCE LARGE CAPS MAY CAUSE YOU. ~PATRICK HILL, MOZART SCHOLAR & AUTHOR~

WOLFGANG AMADEUS MOZART [1756 - 1791]
*CLARINET QUINTET IN A [K.581 STADLER]
*OBOE QUARTET IN F [K.370]
*HORN QUINTET FOR STRINGS IN E [K.407]
PERFORMED BY THE LEGENDARY ACADEMY ANCIENT MUSIC CHAMBER ENSEMBLE

CD RELEASE DATE 1988
TOTAL PLAYING TIME 73:58 MINUTES

THIS OUT-OF-PRINT MOZART COLLECTOR'S CD IS FOUND IN MOST MOZARTEAN'S CD/MP3 COLLECTIONS!

THE ACADEMY OF ANCIENT MUSIC CHAMBER ENSEMBLE'S VIRTUOSO MUSICIANS FEATURED ON THIS CD ARE:
*ANTHONY PAY [CLARINET]
*STEVEN HAMMER [OBOE]
*MICHAEL THOMPSON [HORN]

CD TRACKLIST MISSING FROM ABOVE AMAZON.COM LISTING:
TRACK 1
CLARINET QUINTET IN A [K.581 STADLER]
I. ALLEGRO
II. LARGHETTO
III. MENUETTO
IV. ALLEGRETTO CON VARIAZIONI

TRACK 3
OBOE QUARTET IN F [K.370]
I. ALLEGRO
II. ADAGIO
III. RONDO ALLEGRO

TRACK 3
HORN QUINTET FOR STRINGS IN E [K.407]
I. ALLEGRO
II. ANDANTE
III. RONDO ALLEGRO

ABOUT MOZART'S CLARINET QUINTET IN A [K.581 STADLER]
COMPOSED IN 1789 FOR THE HIS FRIEND ANTON STADLER ONE OF THE 18TH CENTURY'S GREATEST CLARINETISTS OF VIENNA'S ROYAL COURT ORCHESTRA, MOZART'S CLARINET QUINTET K.581 IS SCORED FOUR [4] GLORIUS MOVEMENTS FOR 1 BASSETT CLARINET AND A STRING QUARTET OF 2 VIOLINS, 1 VIOLA AND 1 CELLO. MOZART'S CLARINET QUINTET IN A [K.581 STADLER] IS RENOWNED AS THE WORLD'S MOST BEAUTIFUL CHAMBER MUSIC FOR ITS BEAUTIFUL LYRICAL MELODIES! MOZART COMPOSED HIS CLARINET QUINTET K.581 WITH A WIDE VARIETY OF MOODS, DIVERSITY OF MUSICAL TEXTURES, AND SOPHISTICATED RICHNESS TO ENABLE THE CLARINETIST TO DISPLAY HIS VIRTUOSO TALENTS AS MUCH AS POSSIBLE.

ABOUT MOZART'S OBOE QUARTET IN F [K.370]
COMPOSED IN 1782 FOR THE HIS FRIEND FRIEDRICH RAMM WHO WAS ONE OF THE GREATEST OBOISTS OF THE LATE 18TH CENTURY FROM EUROPE'S FAMED MUNICH ORCHESTRA, MOZART'S K.370 IS SCORED FOR ONE OBOE, ONE VIOLIN, ONE VIOLA AND ONE CELLO. K.370 IS MOZART'S ONLY COMPLETED OBOE QUARTET AND IS RANKED BY MOZART ENTHUSISTS AMONG OF THE WORLD'S MOST BEAUTIFUL CHAMBER MUSIC!

MOZART SPENT THE WINTER OF 1780-1781 IN MUNICH, PUTTING THE FINISHING TOUCHES ON HIS NEW OPERA IDOMENEO IN PREPARATION FOR ITS PREMIERE ON JANUARY 29, 1781. WHILE THERE HE MET FRIEND FRIEDRICH RAMM, AN EXTRAORDINARY OBOIST FOR WHOM MOZART COMPOSED THE OBOE QUARTET FOR VIOLIN, VIOLA, & CELLO IN F [K.370] GIVING THE OBOE THE GREATEST POSSIBLE LEVEL OF PROMINENCE. THE IMPORTANCE OF THE OBOE PART IN K.370 DOES NOT MEAN THAT THE STRING PARTS ARE NEGLIGIBLE. ON THE CONTRARY, MOZART GIVES THEM A GREATER ROLE IN K.370'S DIALOGUE BETWEEN INSTRUMENTS THAN HE DOES IN HIS FLUTE QUARTETS MAKING THE K.370 RANK AMONG HIS BEST INTEGRATED CHAMBER MUSIC WORKS. MOZART'S OBOIST FRIEND FRIEDRICH RAMM'S ARTISTRY MUST HAVE BEEN EXCEPTIONAL JUDGING BY K.370'S OPENING SONATA 1ST ALLEGRO MOVEMENT WHERE THE OBOE IS CHARGED WITH MOST OF THE THEMATIC PRESENTATION ALTHOUGH THE VIOLIN AND VIOLA SHARE IN THE MUSICAL ARGUMENT THROUGHOUT THIS MOVEMENT. K.370'S SLOW 2ND ADAGIO MOVEMENT ILLUSTRATES THE WIDE RANGE OF EXPRESSION OF MOZART'S OBOE QUARTET BECAUSE IT IS IN THE KEY D MINOR, A KEY IN WHICH MOZART HIS DEPTH OF FEELINGS. K.370 CLOSES WITH A CHEERFUL SPIRITED 3RD RONDO MOVEMENT IN WHICH CONTRASTING EPISODES BETWEEN INSTRUMENTS. WITH AN UNUSUAL, THIRTEEN-MEASURE SEGMENT IN WHICH THE OBOE PLAYS IN 4/4 METER WHILE THE STRINGS CONTINUE IN 6/8 NOT NOTICING THAT ONE OF THEIR NUMBER HAS GONE ASTRAY.

ABOUT MOZART'S HORN QUINTET FOR STRINGS IN E [K.407]
COMPOSED IN 1782 FOR THE HIS FRIEND JOSEPH LEUTGEB WHO WAS ONE OF THE GREATEST HORN PLAYERS OF THE LATE 18TH CENTURY FROM EUROPE'S FAMED MUNICH ORCHESTRA, MOZART'S K.407 IS SCORED FOR ONE HORN, ONE VIOLIN, TWO VIOLAS AND ONE CELLO. K.407 IS MOZART'S ONLY COMPLETED HORN QUINTET AND IS RANKED BY MOZART ENTHUSISTS AMONG OF THE WORLD'S MOST BEAUTIFUL CHAMBER MUSIC!

WOLFGANG MOZART'S HORN QUINTET FOR STRINGS IN E [K.407] IS THE WORK OF A COMPOSER DELIGHTING IN THE ART OF COMPOSITION. EACH OF K.407'S THREE MOVEMENTS IS A PARAGON OF BALANCE AND TONAL BEAUTY MANY CLASSCAL MUSIC CRITICS AND MOZART AUDIOPHILES HAVE PLACED MOZART'S K.407 ALONGSIDE HIS MASTERPIECE WIND CONCERTOS AND WITH GOOD REASON. THROUGHOUT K.407, THE HORN PROUDLY DISPLAYS ITS BRILLIANCE AGAINST THE ACCOMPANIMENT IN THE STRINGS. K.407 1ST ALLEGRO MOVEMENT PROVIDING MOMENTS OF HUMOR IN WHICH THE STRINGS MIMIC AND ATTEMPT TO CONFUSE THE UNSUSPECTING HORNIST. FOR K.407, MOZART CHOSE A STRING COMPLEMENT THAT INCLUDES TWO VIOLAS INSTEAD OF THE TRADITIONAL DOUBLE VIOLINS. THE RESULT IS AN ENSEMBLE SOUND OF GREATER WARMTH, COMPLEMENTING THE MELLIFLUOUS TONES OF THE HORN. THIS CHOICE OF INSTRUMENTATION WORKS TO GREAT EFFECT IN K.407'S 2ND ANDANTE MOVEMENT WHERE THE HORN TAKES UP A LOVE DUET BETWEEN THE HORN AND VIOLIN. K.407'S 3RD RONDO MOVEMENT FINALE BRINGS THE WORK TO AN APPROPRIATELY BOLD AND SPARKLING CLOSE WITH THE HORN AFFORDED ONE LAST CHANCE TO DISPLAY ITS VIRTUOSITY.

ABOUT MOZART'S CHAMBER MUSIC DIVERTIMENTI AND SERENADES
IN THE 18TH CENTURY, ONE OF MOZART'S SPECIALTIES WAS COMPOSING FESTIVE ENTERTAINMENT MUSIC CALLED DIVERTIMENTI AND SERENADES TO BE PLAYED AS BACKGROUND MUSIC BY A SMALL CHAMBER MUSIC ENSEMBLE AT OUTDOOR SOCIAL EVENTS SUCH AS NAME DAYS, BIRTHDAYS, NEW YEAR'S FESTIVITIES, WEDDINGS, AND SCHOOL GRADUATION CELEBRATIONS WHERE PARTY GUESTS ENJOYING A DRINKS AND MEALS. THE WELL-TO-DO PATRON'S OF MOZART'S ENTERTAINMENT MUSIC [ALSO CALLED CHAMBER MUSIC] WERE USUALLY THE ARISTOCRACY IN MOZART'S NATIVE SALZBURG AND VIENNA. AT SOME ENTERTAINMENT MUSIC OCCASIONS, MOZART HIMSELF OFTEN PLAYED THE SOLO VIOLIN, VIOLA, AND PIANO PASSAGES OF HIS DIVERTIMENTI AND SERENADES.

ALTHOUGH MOZART'S DIVERTIMENTI AND SERENADES WERE FUN LIGHT HEARTED CHAMBER MUSIC UNLIKE HIS SERIOUS SYMPHONIES AND CONCERTOS WHICH WERE INTENDED TO BE PERFORMED IN A THEATRE OR CONCERT ROOM, MOZART'S ENTERTAINMENT MUSIC [ALSO CALLED CHAMBER MUSIC] OFFERS CLASSICAL MUSIC ENTHUSIASTS THE SAME BEAUTY, CHARM, AND UNIQUE QUALITY AS HIS MORE SERIOUS MATURE CLASSICAL WORKS.
rows.title: RATED 5 STARS #1 PERIOD INSTRUMENT CD MOZART CLARINET QUINTET K.581/OBOE QUARTET K.370/HORN QUINTET K.407/ACADEMY ANCIENT MUSIC

rows.text:
"THE POKER HOUSE" ALSO KNOWN AS "BEHIND CLOSED DOORS" IS A VERY WELL WRITTEN AND WELL ACTED REALISTIC STORY ABOUT THE LIFE THAT CHILDREN SO OFTEN FACE WHEN ONE OR BOTH PARENTS DRINKS TOO MUCH ALCOHOL OR COMSUMES OTHER DRUGS. ALSO IT TOUCHES ON THE SAD REALITY THAT SOME CHURCH LEADERS ARE VERY DIFFERENT AT HOME THAN WHAT THEY PORTRAY AT CHURCH. OUR STORY FOCUSES ON 3 WONDERFUL LITTLE GIRLS AGES 10-14 THAT LIVE WITH THEIR USUALLY DRUNK MOTHER IN A ROUGH NEIGHBORHOOD. AN OLD FAMILY FILM SHOWS HOW THE DRUNK FATHER BEAT HIS WIFE AND THE GIRLS, AND HOW HE OBVIOUSLY DIDN'T CARE ENOUGH TO BE ANY PART OF THEIR LIFE. HE BASICALLY ABANDONED THEM AFTER THE SEPARATION. THE MOM'S DRUNKENNESS IS DESTRUCTIVE TO HER DAUGHTERS SELF ESTEEM BECAUSE OF FREQUENT VERBAL CRITICISM, THE TYPE THAT ACCENTUATES THE NEGATIVE AND ELIMINATES THE POSITIVE. THE MOM DIDN'T GIVE THE LOVE THAT DAUGHTERS NEED. RATHER THAN BEING ANY SUPPORT TO HER DAUGHTER, WHO WAS THE BEST BASKETBALL PLAYER ON HER SCHOOLS TEAM, SHE WAS READY TO TEACH HER 14 YEAR OLD, AGNES, HOW TO HAVE SEX WITH ANY OF THE MANY MEN THAT PARTIED REGULARLY AT THE GIRLS HOME. AGNES, PLAYED TO GIRLISH PERFECTION BY A GORGEOUS 19 YEAR OLD NAMED JENNIFER LAWRENCE, WAS SEDUCED AND RAPED BY AN INTOXICATED BOYFRIEND OF HER MOTHER'S. AGNES RUSHED INTO THE BATHROOM TO CLEAN OUT HER BLEEDING VAGINA BECAUSE HER VIRGINITY HAD JUST BEEN PAINFULLY RIPPED AWAY. WHEN HER MOM CAME IN, AGNES, TRIED TO GET HELP AND LOVE, CRYING AND REACHING FOR A HUG, BUT THE MOM DIDN'T SHOW ANY LOVE AND STARTED TO COMPLAIN ABOUT ALL OF THE TIME THAT SHE WASTED READING TO AGNES WHEN SHE WAS YOUNGER. THE YOUNGEST DAUGHTER, PLAYED BY BEAUTIFUL CHLOE GRACE MORETZ, APPARENTLY ESCAPED BY SPENDING AS MUCH TIME AS SHE COULD AT FRIENDS HOUSES. THE MIDDLE GIRL DELIVERED NEWSPAPERS, BEFRIENDED SOME HOMELESS PERSONS, TELLING THEM HOW SHE MAY GET ADOPTED, AND APPARENTLY FANTASIZED ABOUT NEW IDEAL PEOPLE IN HER LIFE. ALL 3 GIRLS DEVELOPED OUTSIDE INTERESTS AND FRIENDS, THAT ALTHOUGH WERE FAR FROM IDEAL, NEVERTHELESS WERE HELPFUL BECAUSE OF THE HORRID SITUATION AT THEIR HOME. I UNDERSTAND THAT THE LORD PUTS A GREATER HEDGE OF PROTECTION AROUND YOUTHS, BUT SOMETIMES HE REMOVES PEOPLE FROM THIS WORLD YOUNG. PLEASE READ WISDOM OF SOLOMON 4:7-19.
WHO HASN'T SEEN OR HEARD OF THE HORRID VERBAL AND PHYSICAL ABUSE THAT COMES FROM DRUGS OR TOO MUCH ALCOHOL? A PERSON THAT DOESN'T ENCOUNTER THESE TYPES OF ABUSES IS VERY BLESSED. THE FOLLOWING FORMS OF VERBAL ABUSE ARE FAR TO COMMON: MACHINE GUN (MGVA), MACHINE GUN VERBAL CRITICISM (MGVC), AND GUN CRITISM (GC). MGVA IS RAPID FIRE ABUSE WITH LITTLE CHANCE TO RESPOND. MGVC IS RAPID FIRE DESTRUCTIVE CRITICISMS WITH LITTLE CHANCE TO RESPOND, AND GC IS ONE OR MORE CRITISMS SPREAD OUT THROUGHOUT YOUR TIME WITH A PERSON OR PERSONS. THE MOM IN THIS MOVIE USED GC AND MGVC, WHICH I HAVE FOUND TO BE INSIDIOUS, BECAUSE THOSE THAT DO THIS, IGNORE THE 95% OR MORE WONDERFUL THINGS THAT YOU DO, ACCENTUATING THE NEGATIVE AND ELIMINATING THE POSITIVE. WORSE YET, THEY ALMOST NEVER REMEMBER THE HORRID WAY THAT THEY BEHAVED, SO APOLOGY IS UNHEARD OF FROM THESE ABUSERS. IN MY LIFE, I BELIEVE THAT ABUSIVE PEOPLE THAT DON'T REMEMBER IT ARE TEMPORARILY POSSESSED, THAT A DEMON AND WITCH COMBINATION HAS BEEN RUINING OUR FAMILY IN THIS WAY FOR ALL OF THE NEARLY 100 YEARS THAT WE HAVE BEEN PILLARS OF THE BEAUTIFUL SAMISH ISLAND COMMMUNITY. VERBAL ABUSE/CRITICISM HAS LEAD MANY TO BE DEPRESSED OR EVEN COMMIT SUICIDE, BUT MY LOVE FOR GOD AND MAN IS UNENDING, NO MATTER WHAT EVIL IS DONE TO ME. HAVING NEVER CHOSEN TO HURT ANYONE IN MY ADULT LIFE, TO ALMOST ALWAYS TREAT EVERYONE LIKE I WOULD WANT TO BE TREATED (LUKE 6:31), TO OBSERVE EVERYONES RIGHTS AND PRESUME EVERYONES INNOCENCE, HAS ALLOWED ME TO REMAIN JOYFUL IN THE LORD DURING THE OPPRESSION CAUSED BY MY FAMILY'S PHANTOM MENACE. I HAVE NEVER CHOSEN TO BUY ALCOHOL OR NONPRESCRIPTION DRUGS FOR MYSELF, OR TO ACCEPT THEM AS GIFTS MY ENTIRE LIFE! UNFORTUNATLY, MY WITCH HAS "SPIKED MY APPLES" AND DONE WHAT HE/SHE CAN TO DESTROY MY FRIENDSHIPS ALL THROUGH MY "YELLOW BRICK ROAD" OF LIFE. MY RESPONSE TO THE EVILS OF THIS WORLD IS TO DO GOOD AND GOOD ALONE!
THE END OF THE MOVIE SHOWS THAT THE GIRLS FINEST DEFENSE IS THEIR LOVE FOR EACH OTHER COUPLED WITH THEIR HEALTHY RESPONSE TO SEPARATE FROM THEIR DRUNK MOM AND HER FRIENDS. SEPARATING ONESELF FROM ABUSERS IS A NECESSARY TOUGH LOVE RESPONSE. THE MOVIE ENDS IN AN UPBEAT WAY AND THERE IS REASON TO BELIEVE THAT THESE GIRLS WILL SUCCEED IN SAVING THEMSELVES FROM THE HORRORS OF REMAINING THERE. TRAGICALLY, ONE OF EVERY FOUR GIRLS WILL BE SERIOUSLY SEXUALLY MOLESTED OR RAPED BEFORE THEY GROW UP. GIRLS IN A HOME LIKE THE POKER HOUSE ARE EXTREMELY LIKELY TO BE RAPED MULTIPLE TIMES. IF YOU CAN, PLEASE HELP CHILDREN AND THE PARENT IN SUCH HORRID SITUATIONS. PERHAPS YOU CAN TAKE THE DRINKER TO A TREATMENT PROGRAM AND AA MEETINGS, AND THE KIDS TO YOUR LOVING HOME, CHURCH YOUTH GROUPS, AND ALANON FOR TEENS. ABSOLUTELY DO NOT ABUSE THE DRINKER OR DRUGGER IN ANY WAY. WHEN YOU DO THIS, YOU BECOME AS BAD OR WORSE THAN THE ABUSER THEMSELVES. DON'T FORGET FROM 1 CORINTHIANS CHAPTER 6, THAT IT IS BETTER TO BE WRONGED THAN TO DO WRONG.
DRINKING TOO MUCH WINE LEADS TO BITTERNESS, RESENTMENT, AND CONFLICT. BEING DRUNK MAKES A FOOL LOSE HIS TEMPER. THIS IS TO HIS DISADVANTAGE BECAUSE HE BECOMES WEAKER AND GETS INJURED MORE OFTEN.
I LOVE THREE THINGS, AND THEY ARE BEAUTIFUL IN THE SIGHT OF GOD AND MORTALS; BROTHERS AND SISTERS THAT LIVE IN HARMONY, NEIGHBORS WHO ARE FRIENDS, AND A HUSBAND AND WIFE WHO LOVE EACH OTHER.
GOD ALMIGHTY (SIRACH 31:29-30, 25:1)
rows.title: THE MONSTERS BEHIND CLOSED DOORS

rows.text:
IN TERMANN'S LOGITUDINAL STUDY BEGUN IN THE 1920s, "ONE HUNDRED STUDIES OF GENIUS" HIS GROUP STUDIED THE NON-ASIAN (EXCLUDED BECAUSE MOST SPOKE POOR ENGLISH AND WOULD DISTORT RESULTS) POPULATION OF CALIFORNIA AND CAME TO A CONCLUSION THAT JEWS HAVE TWICE THE RATE OF GENIUS OF THE GROUP AS A WHOLE AND BLACKS HAVE THE LOWEST IQ LEVEL OF ALL GROUPS STUDIED. THE HIGH SCORES FOR JEWS ARE WITHOUT DOUBT EXPLAINED BY CULTURAL-RELIGIOUS FACTORS. THE LOW SCORES FOR BLACKS ARE NOT SO OBVIOUS.
ABOUT 30 OR 40 YEARS AGO A HARVARD MANAGEMENT PROFESSOR NAMED MCCLELLAN WROTE A PAPER ON WHAT HE CALLED "N-ACHIEVEMENT" (NEED FOR ACHIEVEMENT)IN WHICH AS PART OF HIS STUDY HE HAD PRE-TEEN SCHOOL CHILDREN IN VARIOUS COUNTRIES TAKE AN ARITHMETIC TEST TO ESTABLISH HOW MANY ANSWERS COULD BE PROVIDED TO MATH PROBLEMS WITHIN A GIVEN TIME SPAN. ALL COUNTRIES' CHILDREN SCORED ABOUT THE SAME EXCEPT INDIA. MCCLELLAN PROVIDED AN EXPLANATION THAT A CAST OF HINDUS HEAVILY REPRESENTED IN THE INDIAN GROUP PUT VERY STRONG EMPHASIS UPON TEACHING CHILDREN ARITHMETIC. THIS, TOO, WAS A CASE WHERE CULTURE CAUSED AN ABERRATION.
BLACKS SCORE LOWER NOT ONLY ON SAT AND ACT TESTS FOR COLLEGE ENTRY BUT OTHER TESTS AS WELL SUCH AS THE MCAT (MEDICAL COLLEGE ACCEPTANCE TEST). THE FACT THAT JEWS AND A CASTE OF HINDUS SCORED EXCEPTIONALLY HIGH WITH RESULTS CULTURALLY EXPLAINABLE LEADS ONE TO CONCLUDE THAT THE LOW SCORES FOR BLACKS MAY ALSO BE CULTURALLY INDUCED.
SOME OF THE RESULTS REPORTED IN "THE BELL CURVE" POINT TO A BIOLOGIC EXPLANATION. BUT SOMETHING IS WRONG. FOR INSTANCE IN CASES WHERE BLACK CHILDREN WERE RAISED BY WHITE FAMILIES AND DID POORLY ON TESTS AS A GROUP THE CONCLUSION OF GENETIC CAUSATION MAKES AN IMPLICIT ASSSUMPTION THAT THE EFFECT UPON THE CHILD WOULD RUN PARALLEL AND EQUAL TO A WHITE CHILD ADOPTED BY A WHITE FAMILY. THIS IS DOUBTFUL. IT DOES, OF COURSE, NOT EXCLUDE PEER PRESSURE BY BLACK MEDIA AND OTHER BLACK CHILDREN AND ADULTS TO WHICH THE ADOPTED BLACK CHILD WOULD BE MORE SUSCEPTIBLE THAN AN ADOPTED WHITE CHILD IN A WHITE FAMILY. EQUALLY QUESTIONABLE IS THE CONCLUSION THAT TESTING OF BLACK CHILDREN WHERE THEIR NATURAL FAMILIES WERE WELL-TO-DO SHOWED ACADEMIC RESULTS INFERIOR TO WHITE CHILDREN RAISED IN POVERTY. PEER PRESSURE, BLACK POPULAR FIGURES AND SUCH WOULD PLAY A ROLE IN THIS CASE WHICH WOULD BE DETRIMENTAL IN PART BECAUSE BLACK ENTERTAINMENT IS ADDRESSED TO A POPULAR AUDIENCE, NOT AN ACADEMICALLY ELITE AUDIENCE..
SOME ENVIRONMENTAL INFLUENCES ARE CLEARLY WORKING CONTRARY TO EDUCATION ORIENTED ACCOMPLISHMENT AMONG BLACK CHILDREN AND YOUNG ADULTS, SUCH AS THE INFLUENCE OF HIP-HOP MUSIC AND THE GLORIFICATION OF VIOLANCE ON TV, THE REPETITION OF TRITE PHRASES BY BLACK PERFORMERS AND THE HIGHLY SIMPLIFIED BEAT OF MODERN BLACK MUSIC WHICH NUMB THE UNPROTECTED MIND. THERE IS A CLOSE PARALLEL TO THE MIND-NUMBING EFFECTS OF WARTIME PROPAGANDA FILMS ON UNSOPHISTICATED VIEWERS.
IT WOULD SEEM FROM BLACKS' EXCELLING IN SUCH THINGS AS DANCING AND CERTAIN SPORTS THAT A MENTALITY EMPHASIZING SPATIAL RELATIONSHIPS AS OPPOSED TO NON-SPATIAL THINKING MAY BE INDUCED INTO THE MINDS OF BLACK CHILDREN MORE THAN WHITE OR ASIAN CHILDREN. IT COULD EVEN BE THAT SUCH VARIATION IS PART OF HUMAN INSTINCT'S VARIATION. I DO NOT KNOW.
TAKEN IN ISOLATION "THE BELL CURVE" CERTAINLY POINTS TO A BIOLOGIC BASIS FOR LOW TEST SCORES AMONG BLACKS. THE MEANINGFULNESS OF THE ARGUMENTS FOR BIOLOGIC BASES IS QUESTIONABLE TAKEN IN THE CONTEXT OF LIFE EXPERIENCE AND THE SIMILAR, THOUGH REVERSED, EXPERIENCE OF JEWS AND SOME CASTES OF HINDUS AS WELL AS TO THE GENERAL EXPERIENCE OF CHINESE IN EAST ASIA OUTSIDE CHINA AND IN THE WEST THAT EXPERIENTIAL FACTORS MAY PLAY A MUCH GREATER PART IN BLACK ACADEMIC UNDERACHIEVEMENT AS A GROUP THAN BIOLOGIC FACTORS. AS FAR AS ATTACKS UPON THE STATISTICAL METHODOLOGIES USED BY THE AUTHORS ARE CONCERNED, THEY AR\O\PPEAR UNWARRANTED EXCEPT WHERE THEY SUPPORT THE BIOLOGIC ORIGINS OF BLACK UNDERACHIEVEMENT. THE METHOD OF REACHING CONCLUSIONS, NOT THE STATISTICAL METHODOLOGIES, IS IN DOUBT. NEVERTHELESS, BECAUSE OTHER SOURCES CONFIRM THE BASIC CONCLUSION THAT BLACKS AS A WHOLE ARE DOING ACADEMICALLY LESS WELL THAN FOLKS OF EITHER EUROPEAN OR ASIAN BACKGROUND, THIS CONCLUSION IN "THE BELL CURVE" SEEMS WELL ESTABLISHED.
THERE WILL ALWAYS, AS LONG AS PEOPLE VARY BY RELIGION, CULTURE AND SUCH, BE DIFFERENCES IN IQ AND SIMILAR TEST SCORES. EVERYTHING IN LIFE IS CULTURALLY BIASED. THE ONLY WAY TO KNOW THE NATIVE INTELLECTS OF INDIVIDUALS OR GROUPS IS TO DO SOME SORT OF SCIENCE FICTION IQ TEST WITHIN 5 MINUTES AFTER BIRTH.
AT PRESENT PEOPLE ON BOTH SIDES OF THE NATURE v CULTURE DEBATE ARE IN THE DARK. IT IS OBVIOUS TO EVERYONE THAT BOTH ARE IMKPORTANT. IT IS OBVIOUS THAT READING MAIMONIDES IS GOING TO HAVE AN INFLUENCE DIFFERENT FROM READING COMIC BOOKS. BUT WHO IS TO SAY THE COMIC BOOK READER COULD NOT UNDERSTAND MAIMONIDES AS WELL AS THE OTHER READER HAD HE BEEN INTRODUCED TO MAIMONIDES INSTEAD OF OR AS WELL AS COMIC BOOKS--AND BENEFIT AS MUCH FROM THE THOUGH PROCESSES INTRODUCED BY MAIMONIDES AS ANYONE. OF COURSE PEOPLE BEING PEOPLE, MORE PARENTS ARE GOING TO LET THEIR CHILDREN READ COMIC BOOKS THAN ARE GOING TO LEAD THEIR CHILDREN TO MAIMONIDES--OR SHAKSPEARE OR ARISTOTLE. ALL OF US ARE BORN IGNORANT AND LOTS OF PEOPLE, OUT OF DUTY OR FOR FUN OR PROFIT, TAKE IT UPON THEMSELVES TO KEEP US IGNORANT OR TEACH A LOT OF STUFF THAT AIN'T SO. THEY ARE MUCH EASIER TO FIND THAN PEOPLE WHO REALLY UNDERSTAND AND ARE WILLING TO TEACH. THE MORE RESPECT A KID HAS FOR THESE IGNORANCE MONGERS, THE LOWER IS GOING TO BE HIS ACADEMIC ACOMPLISHMENT.

rows.text:
I BOUGHT THIS SEVRER TO REPLACE THE CLUSTER OF T-30 & T-40 SERVERS THAT I HAVE TO OPERATE MY BUSINESS WHICH INCLUDES FILE STORAGE, OCR RECOGNITION AND RULE SORTING, MY FAX SERVER, MY OPEN SIP PROXY RELAY SERVER, MY AUTOMATED TRADING FOREX BOTS & OTHER BUSINESS FUNCTIONS SUCH AS FILE/PRINT SERVER, REMOTE DESKTOP SERVICE, MICROSOFT IIS, ETC. THESE SERVERS HAVE THE CAPACITY TO HANDLE OVER 50 REMOTE DESKTOP SESSIONS AT A TIME WITH 40 CORE XEON CPU AND 128 GB PC3 10800 ECC RAM AND STILL FILE SERVE AND RUN MICROSOFT ENTERPRISE SERVER & RHEL SERVER FOR LDAP, WEBSITE, SSH, NFS, ISCSI, CIFS, WEBDAV, SMB, ETC.. I HAD INITIAL ISSUES AT FIRST BECAUSE THE SERVERS USE A VIRTUAL DRIVE AGGREGATION TECHNOLOGY AND WINDOWS DOES NOT RECOGNIZE DRIVES OVER 4 TB AGGREGATED AND WILL NOT INSTALL. OMAR PASHA (THEIR CHIEF IT PERSON) PROVIDED SUPPORT HIMSELF FROM WANNA SYSTEM/CONFIGURE SYSTEM AND I AM A REPEAT CUSTOMER AND WANT TO BUY A FEW MORE FOR MYSELF TO TEST OUT COIN MINING AND FOREX HIGH FREQUENCY AI TRADING OVERNIGHT USING HIVE OS OR OTHER PROPRIETARY SOFTWARE/OS WITH VMWARE ESXi VCENTER VSPHERE 6.7 ENTERPRISE PLUS WITH V/MOTION VREALISE & VSAN. IT IS VERY LOUD WHEN AT MAX CAPACITY WHEN START UP BUT GETS SOFTER AFTER POST.

TO BUILD A COMPARABLE SYSTEM THAT I USED TO DO IN COLLEGE FOR GAMERS & FINANCE DAY TRADER WORKSTATIONS WOULD COST OVER USD 3500 - USD 8000 SINCE THE MEMORY IS ABOUT USD 400 / 128 GB & THE AMD RYZEN 9 3750X SERIES WITH 16 CORE CPU IS AROUND USD 1250, THROW IN A GAMING MOTHERBOARD AND EXTRA NIC CARDS AND A ENTERPRISE GRADE GPU FOR MULTI MONITOR AND YOU HAVE A HIGH COST OF USD 3000+ THAT DOES NOT HAVE REDUNDANT PSU UNITS AND HARDWARE RAID CONTROLLER.

FOR THOSE WHO ARE POWER USERS, AVID WEB SURFERS OR RUNNING A WEB BUSINESS, THIS UNIT IS OPTIMAL FOR WEB SURFING WHERE YOU HAVE OVER 80 TABS OPENED ON BOTH MICROSOFT EDGE, MOZILLA & CHROME AND THE UNIT IS STILL CAPABLE OF FUNCTIONING AT A FAST PACE OVER MICROSOFT REMOTE DESKTOP SERVICES OR LOG ME IN OR OTHER SOFTWARE (FREE TEAMVIEWER). YOU CAN SAFE ON WEB HOSTING AND GET TRULY FREE VOIP WITH OPENSIP.COM AND ONSIP.COM AS WELL AS UTILIZE YOUR OWN FAX SERVER WITH CIMFAX ENTERPRISE EDITION AND RUN MULTIPLE E-COMMERCE SITES.

EQUIVALENT GRADE OF SERVER CLUSTER RUNNING OPENMOSIX CLUSTER LOAD BALANCING ON T-30 & T-40 IS TOO MESSY AND SPACE CONSUMING WITH A WHOLE OFFICE ROOM FILLED WITH CAT 5E - CAT7 CABLES AND THE SYSTEM SLOWS TO A HALT DURING FILE MIGRATION OR LOAD DISTRIBUTION, WHERE THIS DOESNT.

VIRTUAL PC SERVERS FROM AMAZON WEB SERVICES AMAZON WORKSPACE, MICROSOFT AZURE & GOOGLE CLOUD VMWARE COMPUTE USED TO BE FREE BUT ISNT ANYMORE WHEN I AM NO LONGER A STUDENT AND 1 MONTH OF 24X7 WEBHOSTING + FOREX HIGH FREQUENCY ROBOTIC TRADING + CRYPTO MINING, OPEN SIP VOIP PROXY RELAY & 3CX FAX SERVICE WITH 400 GB/MONTH USAGE USED TO COST ME USD 14,700 A MONTH, WHICH IS NOW FREE WITH THIS PURCHASE OF A FEW USD 900 DELL R810 SERVERS.

THE SAS 10,000 RPM - 15,000 RPM DRIVES ARE TERRIBLE EVEN IN RAID 0 SIMULTANEOUS WRITE CONFIG AND I COULD NOT GET A SSD NVME CARD WITH PCI-E ADAPTER TO WORK IN THESE SERVERS SO I USE A SEPARATE ENTERPRISE GRADE SAN AND 4 X NAS 10 TB x 16 STORAGE ARRAY WITH 10 GBE CONNECTION AND SSD CACHING TO ACHIEVE 400 - 800 MB/SEC I-O SPEEDS AND THE LOAD CLUSTER BALANCING MIGRATION DURING LOAD IS SEEMLESS AND THE SYSTEM DOES NOT SLOW DOWN.

YOU CAN USE A CHEAP CHROME BOOK OR INTEL ATOM NOTEBOOK AND STILL HAVE THE COMPUTE POWER AND SPEED EXPERIENCE WITH MULTI MONITOR SUPPORT IF WORKING LOCALLY OVER 1GBE OR 10GBE LAN NIC WITH VIRTUALLY NO SLOW DOWN THAT I USED TO HAVE ON MY WORKSTATION WITH 32 GB MEMORY OR MACBOOK PRO 6 CORE PROCESSOR WITH 16 GB OF RAM WHEN CHROME HAS 80 OPEN TABS. THESE DAYS, I CAN HAVE 240 OPEN TABS AND THE SERVER STILL RUNS EFFECTIVELY WITH SEEMLESS HOSTING OF MY OPENSIP.COM VOIP SERVICE WHICH ALLOWS ME TO AVOID THE MONTHLY COST OF OOMA E-911 & STATE TAXES ON A SUPPOSEDLY FREE SERVICE AND E-FAX SERVICE THAT LIMITS YOU AND COST OVER USD 40 IF YOU RECEIVE 7000 FAXES PER WEEK.

THE TECH SUPPORT IT PERSON OMAR PASHA IS ALSO VERY RESPONSIVE AT ALL TIMES OF THE DAY AND NIGHT AND HELPED ME TO INSTALL THE WINDOWS ENTERPRISE DATACENTER 2016 EDITION THAT WAS NOT INSTALLING DUE TO THE VIRTUAL DRIVE AND WINDOWS 4TB LIMITATION.

OVERALL, THIS UNIT PAYS FOR ITSELF AND I SELL WINDOWS ENTERPRISE 2008 - 2019 DATACENTER LICENSES FOR LESS THAN USD 50 WHICH IS A FRACTION OF THE COST OF RED HAT WORKSTATION SUBSCRIPTION OR REGULAR WINDOWS 10 PROFESSIONAL OR ENTERPRISE EDITION (WHICH I ALSO SELL). I ALSO HAVE VMWARE VCENTER VSPHERE ENTERPRISE PLUS WITH NO CPU OR MEMORY LIMITATIONS LIKE THE FREE VERSION AND YOU CAN SET 6 OR MORE eGPU/DISPLAYS FOR VIRTUAL MINING WITH THE HDMI/DVI/VGA DUMMY DISPLAY REPLICATORS.

BE SURE TO HAVE A 20 AMP OUTLET OR AT LEAST CHANGE YOUR CIRCUIT BREAKER TO SUPPORT 20 AMPS, WHICH SHOULD NOT BE A PROBLEM ON 15 AMP WIRING TO AVOID RANDOM FLICKER WHEN PRINTING AND THE SYSTEM SHUTTING DOWN SINCE REGULAR APC OR OTHER HOME USE BATTERY UPS WILL NOT SUPPORT THE CURRENT DRAW FROM THESE MACHINES. USE AN ENTERPRISE GRADE RACKMOUNT 3000VA/2850 WATT OR HIGHER UPS SYSTEM SINCE DOWN TIME FROM INTERMITTENT FOREX ROBOTIC TRADING AND BITCOIN MINING OR WEB COMMERCE HOSTING CAN BE VERY COSTLY.

IF YOU HAVE AN ALUMNI EDU OR NON-PROFIT EMAIL ADDRESS THAT YOU CAN BUY ON EBAY, YOU CAN GET UNLIMITED GDRIVE STORAGE OR YOU CAN PURCHASE SHARED TEAM DRIVES AND BACK YOUR NAS WITH 80 TB OF STORAGE TO THE CLOUD THOUGH RESTORE WILL TAKE A VERY LONG TIME IF SOMETHING GOES WRONG AND IT IS ADVISABLE TO HAVE TWO CHEAP SYNOLOGY DS1817 OR QNAP 873 NAS IF YOU CANNOT AFFORD A TAPE ARCHIVE BACK UP SINCE RESTORING MY MACBOOK WITH 2 TB STORAGE OVER ACRONIS CLOUD ALREADY TOOK OVER A WEEK WITH FREQUENT RE-STARTS FROM ANY INTERRUPTION TO THE CONNECTION.

HOPE THIS HELPS.

rows.text:
2/22/2014 TO THE MOST BELOVED MAN OF MY LIFE WHO ENJOYED 1 OR 2 BRAND NEW EPISODES OF THE ORIGINAL SERIES (TOS) WITH ME HERE ON SAMISHBAY! HAPPY 99TH BIRTHDAY GRANDPA!

THE EXCELLENT ORIGINAL SERIES (TOS) HAS BEEN PART OF MY LIFE SINCE I WAS A BOY. THE BACKSTORY ABOUT A CYBORG RACE THAT CAME INTO CONFLICT WITH 12 COLONIES OF HUMANITY WHEN THE HUMANS AIDED THE HASARIS AFTER THE CYLONS TRIED TO ENSLAVE THEM, WAS PERFECT AND MADE IT UNDERSTANDABLE WHY THE 1,000 YAHREN WAR WEARY HUMANS BEGAN THE SERIES WITH WHAT THEY BELIEVED WOULD BE A MEETING FOR PEACE WITH THE CYLONS, BUT IN ACTUALITY WAS A TRICK BY THE EVIL HUMAN BALTAR AND THE CYLONS TO GET THE HUMANS TO LEAVE THE COLONIES DEFENSELESS, SO THAT THE CYLONS COULD EXTERMINATE HUMANITY.
LUCKILY, COMMANDER ADAMA FORESAW THE DANGER AND SAVED THE GALACTICA AND MANY OF THE SURVIVORS OF THE ATTACK BY ORGANIZING A RAGTAG FUGITIVE FLEET AND WITHDRAWING TO TRY TO FIND HELP FROM THE LOST BROTHERS OF MAN FROM THE PLANET EARTH, KNOWN ONLY TO THEM THROUGH ANCIENT WRITINGS. BOTH SHOWS ARE EXCELLENT IN EVERY WAY, EXCEPT THAT THE NEW SERIES CHANGED THE PERFECT BACKSTORY, MAKING THE HUMANS THE INVENTOR OF THE CYLONS, AND THE NEW SERIES MAKES THE GODS ABSOLUTELY AWFUL, AND LEAVES NO ROOM FOR ANY OTHER RELIGION WE KNOW SUCH AS JUDEO CHRISTIANITY TO EXIST. GODS SO AWFUL THAT ALL OF HUMANITY DECIDES TO FLEE KOBOL WHERE THESE SO CALLED GODS FOUGHT WITH EACH OTHER, AND THEY DID NOTHING TO HELP HUMANITY WHEN THE CYLONS DESTROYED THE COLONIES. IN FACT IT APPEARS THEY HELPED THE CYLONS AND GAVE THEM A "SOUL." IS IT ANY WONDER THAT THE HUMANS SHOW SUCH AN AMAZING AMOUNT OF SELF CENTEREDNESS? AND SUCH A LACK OF REGARD FOR BASIC HUMAN RIGHTS? THE WAY THEY TREAT THE HUMANIZED CYLON PRISONERS REMINDS ME OF HOW SOME OF OUR AMERICAN INSTITUTIONS IGNORE THE GOD GIVEN AND CONSTITUTIONAL RIGHTS OF FOREIGNERS. THE COLONIALS SHOULD BE OBSERVING ALL OF THEIR RIGHTS WHILE ENTRUSTING A DOCTOR WILKER TEAM TO DISABLE THE "CHIP" OR TRANSPONDER OR WHATEVER CAUSES THE HUMANIZED CYLONS TO LEAVE THEIR DOCILE "SLEEPER" STATE.
THE NEW COMMANDER ADAMA, NEARLY STARTS A CIVIL WAR NEAR THE END OF SEASON ONE. AND THEN AGAIN AFTER HIS SUPERIOR, COMMANDER CAIN ARRIVES. IF ADAMA WAS LIKE TOS ADAMA, HE WOULD HAVE AVOIDED THE FIRST SITUATION BY GOING TO COLONIAL ONE TO MEET IN PRIVATE WITH THE PRESIDENT. HE WOULD HAVE LISTENED TO ALL HER REASONS, EVEN UNDERSTOOD AND SUPPORTED THEM, AND ALSO POINTED OUT THAT SHE NEVER AGAIN MAKE SUCH A "END RUN" AROUND HIM, BECAUSE HE KNEW THAT RESPONSIBLE LEADERS OF A RACE FIGHTING FOR ITS SURVIVAL MUST DO EVERYTHING THEY CAN TO REDUCE TENSION BETWEEN GROUPS OF THEIR PEOPLE AND THAT THE TRAGEDY OF CIVIL WAR COULD HAVE OCCURRED, WHICH WOULD LIKELY WEAKEN THE HUMANS TO THE POINT WHERE THE CYLONS WOULD BE ABLE TO DESTROY THEM.
WHEN COMMANDER CAIN ARRIVED, HE SHOULD HAVE TOLD HER THE SITUATION: "I AM THE COMMANDER IN CHIEF OF THE COLONIAL GOVERNMENT. THE PRESIDENT AND I HAVE THE SUPPORT OF THE PEOPLE TO FIND THE LOST BROTHERS OF MAN ON EARTH IN ORDER TO SAVE HUMANITY. IF YOU ELECT TO JOIN US, I WILL BE COMMANDER IN CHIEF OF ALL MILITARY OPERATIONS AND YOU WILL STILL BE IN CHARGE OF THOSE UNDER YOU. WHO IS PRESIDENT AND WHO IS COMMANDER IN CHIEF CAN CHANGE EVERY 4 YEARS THROUGH OUR NORMAL CONSTITUTIONAL ELECTION PROCESS."
IF THE TOLERATION, EVEN THE CELEBRATION OF BATTLESTAR GALACTICA TOS's AND STAR TREK'S "INFINITE DIVERSITY IN INFINITE COMBINATIONS" HAD ALSO BEEN DONE HERE, THEN ADAMA WOULD CONTINUE TO HAVE THE WISDOM AND MORAL CHARACTER THAT ALL GOOD LEADERS SUCH AS WW2 COMMANDER IN CHIEF DWIGHT DAVID EISENHOWER HAD. IF THE CREATORS OF THE NEW BATTLESTAR GALACTICA REMOVED THE FEW LINES THAT MADE MAN THE CREATOR OF CYLONS, AND THE OFFENSIVE ANTIRELIGION LINES ABOUT THE GODS OF KOBOL, THEN THE SHOW WOULD BE PERFECT, EVEN WITH ADAMA'S MISTAKES THAT COULD CAUSE CIVIL WAR.

1/23/2016 AFTERWORD
THE CANCELLATION OF THE EXCELLENT BATTLESTAR GALACTICA TOS IN 1979 WAS A TRAGEDY. BATTLESTAR GALACTICA, LIKE SUPERMAN, STAR TREK, AND STAR WARS, PERFECTLY SHOWED US THE NATURE OF THE BATTLE OF GOOD VS EVIL. CONFIRMING THE TEACHINGS OF THE HOLY BIBLE THAT THERE ARE ABSOLUTES! ANY PEOPLE THAT REJECT THE HIGHER POWER OF GOD AND HIS COMMANDMENTS TO TREAT ALL OTHERS AS YOU WOULD WANT TO BE TREATED, REPRESENTED IN THIS SERIES BY THE SHIPS OF LIGHT INTRODUCED IN "WAR OF THE GODS," AND THAT SUPPORT SATAN'S HATRED, GREED, AND DECEPTION, REPRESENTED BY THE EVIL COUNT IBLIS, HAVE NEVER NOR WILL EVER LAST. THEY WILL BE DESTROYED!
ALTHOUGH THE SHORTLIVED "SECOND SEASON" CALLED GALACTICA 1980 IS ENTERTAINING, IT WAS CLEAR TO ME THAT US LOVERS OF THE SHOW NEEDED A BETTER ENDING. SO AT THE TIME, I, STILL A BOY, WROTE A GREAT ENDING FOR MY PERSONAL ENJOYMENT! I DIDN'T PUBLISH IT.
I WOULD SURE LOVE TO RESURRECT GALACTICA WITH THE EXACT SAME LOOK AND LOOKALIKE ACTORS TO TAKE UP RIGHT WHERE THEY LEFT OFF AT THE END OF SEASON ONE. IT WOULD BE GREAT TO DEAL WITH THE POLITICS OF SHOULD THE GALACTICANS JOIN THE PEOPLE OF TERRA? SHOULD THEY WORK TO UNIFY THE EASTERN AND WESTERN ALLIANCES BECAUSE OF THE EMERGENCY OF THE COMING EXTERMINATORS OF HUMANITY: THE WICKED CYLONS? I KNOW I WOULDN'T WANT TO MOVE ON WITHOUT AN ALLIANCE BECAUSE THE TERRAN TYPE PEOPLE WE DID MEET IN THOSE EPISODES WERE PRECIOUS SUCH AS HECTOR AND VECTOR AND THE PARENTS/CHILDREN ON PARADEEN! UPON ACHIEVING A STABLE DEFENSE WOULD THE NEW GALACTICAN ALLIANCE SEND OUT AN EXPEDITIONARY FORCE TO FIND AND SEEK THE HELP OF EARTH? AS STAR TREK'S SPOCK WOULD SAY "THERE ARE ALWAYS POSSIBILITIES." MAY SHOWS LIKE SUPERMAN, STAR TREK, STAR WARS, AND BATTLESTAR GALACTICA, THAT TEACH MORALITY AND THE NATURE OF EVIL "LIVE LONG AND PROSPER!"
rows.title: OLD VS NEW:  CHANGING EXCELLENCE AND RESURRECTING EXCELLENCE!

rows.text:
I'M STUNNED! TALK ABOUT BREATHING NEW LIFE INTO BLUERAY MOVIES & PLAYSTATION 4 GAMES. THIS PROJECTOR IS JUST AMAZING IN EVERY SENSE OF THE WORD. NO ONLINE VIDEOS OR PICTURES WOULD DO IT JUSTICE. IT'S SOMETHING YOU HAVE TO EXPERIENCE FOR YOURSELF.

I'VE ALWAYS WANTED TO HAVE MY OWN HOME THEATER WHERE I CAN JUST KICK BACK & TRULY ENJOY MOVIES THE WAY THEY WERE MEANT TO BE SEEN. THIS PRODUCT EXCEEDED MY EXPECTATIONS IN EVERY WAY IMAGINABLE. AS A FIRST TIME BUYER, I BELIEVE I NAILED IT ON THE FIRST SHOT!

I PRETTY MUCH TESTED THE PROJECTOR WITH THE DEFAULT SETTINGS. PLACED IT ON A SMALL MEAL TABLE ABOUT 6.5 FEET FROM THE WALL & IT DISPLAYED A 57 INCH ( DIAGONAL ) SCREEN ON MY PLAIN LIGHT COLOR BEDROOM WALL.

FAMILY CAME INTO THE ROOM WHILE I WAS TESTING BLUERAY MOVIES VIA THE PLAYSTATION 4 & THEY HAD TO DO A DOUBLE TAKE ON THE QUALITY OF THE PROJECTION DISPLAYED ON MY WALL. IT LITERALLY RIVALS HIGH END HD 1080 P TELEVISIONS THAT COST THOUSANDS OF DOLLARS.

MY BEDROOM IS ABOUT 8 FT WIDE BY 12 FT LONG & 9.5 FT HIGH. IF I PROJECT FROM THE WIDE POSITION ACROSS TO THE WALL I GET ABOUT A MAX OF 67 INCH DISPLAY. IF I PROJECT LENGTH WISE & PLACE THE PROJECTOR ABOUT 11.5 FT DISTANCE FROM THE WALL I'M ABLE TO FILL A 100" DIAGONAL SCREEN ACROSS THE ROOM.

I THOUGHT IT WAS AMAZING AT 67 INCHES WHEN I FIRST TESTED IT. HOWEVER, WHEN I TRIED IT FROM 11.5 FEET AWAY WITH A BLUERAY DISC MY JAW DROPPED! IT'S LITERALLY LIKE BEING AT A MOVIE THEATER ENJOYING A PRIVATE SCREENING OR SOMETHING. IT'S ABSOLUTELY BEAUTIFUL. THE IMAGE IS SHARP, THE COLORS ARE VIBRANT & THE ENTIRE SETUP JUST DRAWS YOU IN.

ALL THE GAMES I TRIED ON THE PS4 LOOKED FANTASTIC. NO BLURRY DISTORTED DISPLAY OF ANY KIND. CRISP & CLEAR AFTER A QUICK FOCAL ADJUSTMENT. ALL THE GAMES FELT LIKE NEW AGAIN. THEY LOOKED THE WAY THE DEVELOPERS INTENDED THEM TO BE EXPERIENCED. IF YOU ARE THINKING ABOUT GETTING AN ARCADE MACHINE, FORGET IT. GET THIS INSTEAD!

IF YOU HAVE THE SPACE TO PROJECT ANYTHING OVER 55" I WOULD DEFINITELY RECOMMEND GIVING THIS PROJECTOR A SHOT. IF YOU HAVE NEVER WATCHED A HIGH DEFINITION MOVIE OR PLAYED HD VIDEO GAMES ON A DISPLAY AT OR ABOVE 55" AT HOME YOU MUST TRY IT. I'M TELLING YOU, IT'S A MUCH RICHER EXPERIENCE.

WHEN I PURCHASE THE DISPLAY SCREEN I'M SURE IT WILL BE EVEN MORE STUNNING. FOR NOW THE 67" DISPLAY FROM 7 FT AWAY WILL KEEP ME ENTERTAINED IN THE MEANTIME.

I RECENTLY PURCHASED THE OPTOMA VESA 3D EMITTER & TWO PAIRS OF THE OPTOMA RF 3D GLASSES. WORKS FLAWLESS AFTER CHANGING THE 3D OPTION TO UTILIZE VESA TECHNOLOGY WITHIN THE OPTOMA HD142X PROJECTOR MENU. PS4 GAMES LIKE TRINE & ZEN PINBALL ARE EXCELLENT GAMES TO SHOWCASE THE 3D GLASSES. IT LOOKS AMAZING!

ALTHOUGH PS4 HAS ABOUT 15 GAMES WHICH SUPPORT 3D GLASSES YOU CAN EASILY THROW ON A 3D BLUERAY MOVIE OR LOAD UP HD 4K SBS ( SIDE BY SIDE ) VIDEOS FROM THE PS4 YOUTUBE APPLICATION TO GET THE MOST OUT OF YOUR INVESTMENT. YOUTUBE HAS TONS OF FREE 3D SBS DEMOS & MANY CLIPS AVAILABLE FOR FREE. THE PROJECTOR SUPPORTS SIDE BY SIDE, TOP / BOTTOM & AUTO MODE IF YOU USE THE OPTOMA VESA EMITTER WITH THE RF 3D GLASSES.

I HAVEN'T THOROUGHLY TESTED MY COMPUTER YET BUT I'M SURE IT OFFERS ALOT MORE CONTENT THAN THE PS4. WITH ACCESS TO TONS OF VIDEO STREAMING SITES & GAMING SERVICES LIKE STEAM YOU WILL HAVE PLENTY OF CONTENT TO EXPLORE. THE PC HAS A DVI-D VIDEO CARD CONNECTOR SO I USED A DVI TO HDMI CABLE TO CONNECT IT TO THE PROJECTOR BRIEFLY WHICH WORKED FLAWLESS.

I DID NOT MOUNT MY PROJECTOR TO THE CEILING BUT MAY DO SO IN THE FUTURE. FOR NOW I LET IT SIT ON A SMALL PORTABLE MEAL TABLE WHICH ALLOWS ME TO PROJECT THE IMAGE TO MY BEDROOM WALL.

HIGHLY RECOMMEND THIS PROJECTOR TO GAMERS & ANYONE INTERESTED IN AN AMAZING HOME THEATER EXPERIENCE. IT'S WORTH IT!

TIPS

GET A GRAY SCREEN & NOT A WHITE DISPLAY. THE GRAY SCREEN WORKS BETTER IN AMBIENT LIGHT & ABSORBS THE BLACK COLORS NICELY DISPLAYING A MORE DETAILED PICTURE BASED ON MY RESEARCH. HOWEVER, IT'S MOST EFFECTIVE IF YOU HAVE SIDE WINDOWS LEAKING LIGHT IN.

UPDATE: I'M LEARNING AS I GO SO I CAME BACK TO PROVIDE SOME ADDITIONAL INFO.

IF YOU INTEND TO WATCH ALOT OF 3D MOVIES WITH YOUR PROJECTOR YOU MAY WANT TO GO WITH A WHITE SCREEN INSTEAD WITH AT LEAST A 1.2+ GAIN. MAYBE EVEN A 1.4 GAIN TO ENSURE ENOUGH REFLECTIVITY TO HANDLE THE 3D IMAGE. IF YOU ALREADY HAVE A 1.1 PROJECTOR SCREEN ADJUST YOUR PROJECTORS BRIGHTNESS & CONTRAST SETTINGS WHILE YOU ARE WATCHING SOME 3D CONTENT TO IMPROVE THE OUTPUT.

RELECTIVE SCREENS ARE BETTER SUITED FOR A SMALLER VIEWING AUDIENCE WHILE LOWER GAIN 1.1 SCREENS DISTRIBUTE THE LIGHT MORE EVENLY ACROSS THE SCREEN ALLOWING A LARGER AUDIENCE TO GET A SIMILAR VIEWING EXPERIENCE FROM A WIDER SEATING ANGEL. ( A GRAY SCREEN MAY NOT BE SUITABLE FOR 3D MOVIE WATCHING DUE TO IT'S LOWER SCREEN GAIN )

IF YOU ARE GOING TO GET A SCREEN MAKE SURE IT'S TENSIONED BASED IN ORDER TO AVOID THE LINES & IMPERFECTIONS YOU WILL MOST LIKELY EXPERIENCE WITH THE AVERAGE PROJECTOR DISPLAY SCREENS.

NEVER ENCLOSE THE PROJECTOR WITHIN AN ENTERTAINMENT CENTER, BOOK SHELF OR A POORLY OXYGENATED AREA WHILE IN OPERATION. YOU WANT TO KEEP THE PROJECTOR AS COOL AS POSSIBLE TO AVOID A SHORT LAMP LIFE.

DON'T MOUNT THE PROJECTOR ON THE CEILING AT AN ANGLE! THIS PROJECTOR MUST BE MOUNTED HORIZONTALLY OR YOU MAY CAUSE DAMAGE & VOID THE WARRANTY.

SETTING THE PROJECTOR TO ECO MODE SLIGHTLY REDUCES THE BRIGHTNESS BUT HAS NO REAL IMPACT ON OVERALL EXPERIENCE. IT WILL HELP EXTEND THE LAMPS LIFE SPAN.

TO TURN OFF THE PROJECTOR WITH THE REMOTE YOU MUST TAP THE OFF BUTTON TWICE FOR IT TO SHUTDOWN THE PROJECTOR AS STATED WITHIN THE PROVIDED INSTRUCTIONS.
rows.title: GAMING HEAVEN! : )

rows.text:
ISRAEL EHRENBERG, WHO WROTE UNDER THE NAME ASHLEY MONTEGU, PRESENTS IN THIS BOOK AN EXTENDED ARGUMENT IN FAVOR OF INTERRACIAL BREEDING. I READ THIS BOOK MANY YEARS AGO WHILE STUDYING GENETICS AND OTHER SCIENCES. I EXPECTED TO FIND MEANINGFUL ARGUMENT; HOWEVER HIS ARGUMENT CONSISTS OF A DISCUSSION OF HYBRID VITALITY. I WAS OF COURSE SOMEWHAT FAMILIAR WITH THE SUBJECT, BUT ONLY APPLIED TO PLANTS. I AM STILL NOT ENTIRELY SURE WHAT HE INTENDED TO TALK ABOUT. THE BREEDS OF DOGS ARE OFTEN LESS HEALTHY THAN A WELL-MIXED MONGREL, BUT THAT IS BECAUSE HUMANS HAVE SELECTED CHARACTERISTICS FOR HUMAN PURPOSES, NOT FOR THE ABILITY OF THE ANIMAL TO SURVIVE IN THE WILD. FIGURING HE COULD NOT BE INTENDING ANYTHING AS OBVIOUSLY INCORRECT AS THAT, I REASONED THAT HE MUST BE TALKING ABOUT WILD TYPES' GREATER VIABILITY RELATIVE TO MUTANTS, WHICH IS A WELL-ESTABLISHED FACT, MOST MUTATIONS BEING HARMFUL, SEMI-LETHAL OR LETHAL. IF A PARTICULAR ANIMAL HAS A MUTATION WHICH IS HARMFUL, IT MAY BE ABLE TO BREED, LIKE SHORT WINGED FRUIT FLIES.
SHOULD THE ANIMAL BE A HUMAN AND THE TRAIT BE HETEROZYGOUS DOMINANT AND THE TRAIT NOT BE SEX LINKED AND THE MATING PARTNER IS HOMOZYGOUS RECESSIVE, ONE IN FOUR OF THE OFFSPRING WILL HAVE THE TRAIT. CONCERNING THAT PARTICULAR TRAIT, THE RACE(S) OF THE PARTNERS WILL HAVE NO IMPACT.THE ONLY FACTOR WHICH WILL BE SIGNIFICANT REGARDING THE TRAIT IS THE DISTRIBUTION OF THE TRAIT IN POTENTIAL MATING PARTNERS. MATING OF AN AFFECTED GROUP WITH A NON-CARRIER GROUP WITHIN THE SAME RACE WILL HAVE THE SAME PROBABILITY OF TRANSMITTAL AS WERE THE MATING GROUP OF ANOTHER RACE. TAKEN OVERALL, THERE IS THE PROBABILITY OF ACCEPTING INTO THE OFFSPRING HARMFUL TRAITS, PROBABLY RECESSIVE, FROM EACH GROUP.
SHOULD THERE EXIST A POPULATION FREE OF ALL HARMFUL TRAITS, DOMINANT OR RECESSIVE, THE BEST THING (LOWEST RISK) WOULD BE TO HAVE INTRA-GROUP BREEDING ONLY. SHOULD THERE BE TWO SUCH POPULATIONS AND THEY INTERBRED THERE WOULD BE, TAKEN INDIVIDUALLY, NO HARM TO THE OFFSPRING. ACCORDING TO ASHLEY MONTAGU'S ARGUMENT, THERE SHOULD BE SOME NET BENEFIT SHOULD THE TWO GROUPS BE OF DIFFERENT RACES AS OPPOSED TO BEING ISOLATED COMMUNITIES OF THE SAME RACE. CARLTON S. COON CLASSIFIED MAN INTO FIVE BASIC RACES (WITH MANY PEOPLE MIXED OF COURSE). THESE RACES HE CALLED: CAUCASOID, MONGOLOID, CONGOID (ALSO CALLED NEGROID), CAPOID (HOTTENTOT BUSHMEN) AND AUSTROLOID. WHETHER THEY ARE ACTUAL PRIMARY RACES IN THE SENSE OF BEING LINKED TO A COMMON PRE-MODERN COMMON ANSESTOR IS A MATTER OF SPECULATION. ONE THING IS CERTAIN--THEY ARE ALL WILD TYPES. EACH HAS PROVED ITSELF CAPABLE OF SURVIVAL OVER TENS OR HUNDREDS OF THOUSANDS OF YEARS. ALL HAVE ABOUT THE SAME NATURAL LIFE SPAN. ALL ARE CAPABLE OF LANGUAGE AND REASONED DECISION MAKING. THERE IS AN INTERESTING ISSUE WHICH A PRIORI SEEMS A POTENTIAL ARGUMENT AGAINST THE BREEDING HE ADVOCATES. EACH RACE HAS EVOLVED TRAITS WHICH ARE BENEFICIAL IN THE CONTEXT OF THE WHOLE BODY OF TRAITS. FOR EXAMPLE SKULL SIZE AND EYE SIZE NEED TO CORRESPOND WITH ONE ANOTHER TO PRODUCE GOOD VISION. TOOTH SIZE MUST CORRESPOND WITH SKULL SIZE TO PRODUCE TEETH THAT FIT CORRECTLY IN THE MOUTH. AS FAR A RACES ARE CONCERNED (OR ISOLATED POPULATIONS WITHIN THE SAME RACE) THE WAY TO TELL IF THERE WERE AT LEAST OBVIOUS HARMFUL PHYSICAL EFFECTS WOULD BE TO COMPARE TWO UNMIXED RACIAL POPULATIONS WITH A POPULATION WHICH IS A MIXTURE OF THE TWO. FOR EXAMPLE NATIVE POPULATIONS OF SWEDEN AND SUDAN COULD SERVE AS THE UNMIXED POPULATIONS AND THAT OF EGYPT AS THE MIXED POPULATION. THE COMPARISON IS NOT PERFECT, BUT IT IS PRETTY CLOSE. IT SEEMS THAT SIMPLE TEST WOULD BE ABLE TO ILLUMINATE THE MATTER, SUCH AS THE FREQUENCY OF POOR VISION AMONG 10 YEAR OLDS IN THE THREE GROUPS AND THE FREQUENCY OF ILL-SPACED TEETH.
THERE IS OF COURSE AN AESTHETIC SIDE. IN "STUDIES IN THE PSYCHOLOGY OF SEX" HAVELOCK ELLIS PROPORTS THAT THE ATTRACTIVENESS OF PEOPLES IS A FUNCTION OF HOW MUCH THEY REFLECT
THE RACIAL TYPE TO WHICH INDIVIDUALS BELONG. THIS SHOULD BE SUBJECT TO EMPERICAL, THOUGH SUBJECTIVE, EVALUATION BY COMPARING, SAY, SWEDISH WITH PUERTO RICAN AND EGYPTIAN AND CENTRAL AFRICAN FACIAL ATTRACTIVENESS AMONG VARIOUS POPULATIONS OF THE WORLD. OF COURSE THERE ARE BEAUTIFUL WOMEN IN ALL THE GROUPS, BUT THE QUESTION IS FREQUENCY. IF MEN IN PUERTO RICO OR EGYPT FOUND SWEDISH OR CENTRAL AFRICAN WOMEN MORE ATTRACTIVE THAN LOCAL WOMEN, IT SEEMS IT WOULD HAVE SIGNIFICANCE FOR THE FUTURE HAPPINESS OF MANKIND AND ARGUE AGAINST INTERRACIAL BREEDING. THAT IS THE ARGUMENT IN "GULLIVER'S TRAVELS" THAT THE SMART HORSES MADE.
ASHLEY MONTEGU ENGAGED IN NO EMPIRICAL TESTS, OBJECTIVE OR SUBJECTIVE, TO SUKPPORT HIS CONTENTION THAT RACIAL MIXING WOULD ENHANCE THE MIXED GROUP'S WELL-BEING. HIS "STUDY" IS IN REALITY NOTHING MORE THAN A STATEMENT OF HIS PARTICULAR OPINION, PERHAPS THE RESULT OF PREJUDICE. THE AURA OF SCIENCE WITH WHICH HE PRESENTS HIS ARGUMENT IS ALL AURA AND NO SCIENCE.
rows.title: AN INTERESTING TOPIC, BUT NOT A SCIENTIFIC BOOK

rows.text:
ABOUT FIVE YEARS AGO I DECIDED TO BROADEN MY HORIZONS AND READ SOME SCIENCE FICTION AND FANTASY. I BEGAN BY RESEARCHING NOVELS THAT WON BOTH THE HUGO AND NEBULA AWARDS IN THE SAME YEAR AND MOVED ON FROM THERE. THE MAJORITY OF THESE AWARD WINNING NOVELS ARE SEGMENTS IN A SERIES, AND MORE OFTEN THAN NOT THE FIRST SEGMENT. THERE ARE EXCEPTIONS, ENDERS GAME, AND SEQUEL SPEAKER FOR THE DEAD BOTH WHERE HONORED THROUGH WINNING BOTH OF THESE PRESTIGIOUS SCIENCE FICTION AND FANTASY AWARDS. THE OTHER BOOKS IN THE SERIES WERE REMARKABLE AS WELL. I HAVE FOUND THAT TO BE TRUE WITH MANY OF THESE SERIES, AND I AM NOW A FULLY DEDICATED SCIENCE FICTION AND FANTASY READER.

I HAVE READ MOST OF THE GREATS. I DEFINE GREATNESS IN THESE CLOSELY RELATED GENRES THROUGH IMMORTALITY....STORIES THAT WILL LIVE FOREVER, AND THE AUTHORS NAMES THAT ARE STAMPED TO THEM. THERE ARE MANY TO CHOSE FROM, FOR ME IT WAS ASIMOV AND THE FOUNDATION NOVELS, DAN SIMMONS AND THE HYPERION QUARTET (PROFOUNDLY UNDER RATED) AND TO A SLIGHTLY LESSER EXTENT THE ORIGINAL FRANK HERBERT DUNE NOVELS, AND CARD'S ENDER NOVELS. I AM LEAVING OUT SO MANY AND I WOULD BE REMISS TO LEAVE OUT TOLKIN AND THE LORD OF THE RING NOVELS WHICH ARE UPPER ECHELON HALL OF FAMERS.

RECENTLY IN READING THROUGH THE GAME OF THRONES NOVELS, I THOUGHT GEORGE RR MARTIN MAY HAVE ESTABLISHED HIMSELF FIRMLY AT THE TOP OF THE LIST. ALL OF THAT IS NOW IN THE PAST BELONGING TO A DIFFERENT ERA, A TIME BEFORE KVOTHE WAS INTRODUCED TO THE WORLD.

PATRICK ROTHFUSS BECAME AN IMMORTAL IN THE FIRST 100 PAGES OF THE NAME OF THE WIND. THIS NOVEL IS THE FIRST OF A TRILOGY WHICH INVOLVES AN ENIGMATIC AND SEEMINGLY DESPONDENT INN-KEEPER WHO IS ACTUALLY A POWERFUL WIZARD OR ARCANIST. HE IS A LEGEND, THE SUBJECT OF COUNTLESS TALES AND ADVENTURES. HE IS ALSO PRESUMED DEAD. EVENTUALLY A CHRONICLER IS INTRODUCED TO THE STORY AND PROCEEDS TO APPEAR IN THE INN (BY FATE OR DESIGN) AND RECOGNIZES THE FACT THAT THIS INN-KEEPER IS ACTUALLY KVOTHE, AND WITH THE HELP OF KVOTHE'S PROTEGEE, A MEMBER OF THE FAY NAMED BAST, THE IN-KEEPER IS FINALLY CONVINCED TO SET THE RECORD STRAIGHT. HE TELLS THE CHRONICLER THAT IT WILL TAKE 3 DAYS TO TELL HIS STORY WITH COMPLETE ACCURACY, AND EACH NOVEL IN THE TRILOGY IS TO REPRESENT ONE DAY. THERE MIGHT BE SOME CYNICS OUT THERE WHO WILL ARGUE THAT IT TAKES MORE THAN ONE NOVEL TO MAKE AN AUTHOR AN ALL TIME GREAT, AND THERE IS SOMETHING TO BE SAID FOR THAT. ROTHFUSS WENT AHEAD AND FOLLOWED HIS MASTERPIECE WITH ANOTHER IN THE SECOND BOOK ENTITLED THE WISEMAN'S FEAR. QUALITY TRILOGIES ARE SAID TO BE RARE. IT TAKES SOMEONE SPECIAL TO MAKE A SEQUEL FLOW WITH THE SAME PACE AND LANGUAGE AS THE ORIGINAL. ROTHFUSS TOOK HIS TIME IN PERFECTING THE SEQUEL. HE WAS EAGER TO HEAR AS MUCH FEEDBACK AS POSSIBLE FROM READERS, LISTENING CAREFUL WHAT THEY WANTED MORE OF, AND EVEN WHAT THEY WANTED LESS OFF IN TERMS OF ASPECTS THAT ENDEARED THEM TO THE ORIGINAL. THE MOST PAINSTAKING ASPECT OF THESE NOVELS IS HAVING TO WAIT FOR THE THIRD EDITION. THE LIST OF QUESTIONS THAT BEGAN TO MOUNT FROM THE EARLIEST PAGES OF THE THE NAME OF THE WIND REMAINED AT THE CLOSE OF DAY 2 IN THE WISEMAN'S FEAR. NAMELY HOW DID KVOTHE, A LEGEND OF EARTH SHATTERING PROPORTIONS END UP AN IN-KEEPER WHO HAS SEEMINGLY GIVEN UP ON LIFE.

THE STORY IS INCREDIBLY COMPLEX, TO THE EXTENT THAT I WILL NOT ATTEMPT TO SUMMARIZE ANYMORE OF THE SCENE THAN I ALREADY HAVE. WHAT I WILL SAY IS THAT THIS BOOK IS WRITTEN ON ANOTHER LEVEL. THE NOVELS I MENTIONED EARLIER SUCH AS THE FOUNDATION, DUNE, ENDER, AND HYPERION WERE MIND BOGGLING STORIES OF THE SORT THAT IT PAINED ME TO HAVE TO PUT THE BOOKS DOWN TO MEET THE BASIC NECESSITIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES OF DAILY LIFE. GAME OF THRONES AGAIN, AN EPOCH ENTHRALLING STORY AND CHARACTERS THAT WILL LIVE FOREVER.

HOWEVER, IF WE ARE BEING COMPLETELY HONEST WE MUST SAY THAT PATRICK ROTHFUSS WRITES ON ANOTHER STRATOSPHERE. FORGET CHARACTER DEVELOPMENT, DETAIL, AND DESCRIPTION WHICH HE IS HANDS DOWN THE BEST OF ANYONE IN ANY GENRE OF LITERATURE (MY HUMBLE, YET UNWAVERING OPINION). ROTHFUSS IMAGINED AND WROTE FOR US THE FIRST TWO SEGMENTS OF WHAT SHOULD ONE DAY BE CATEGORIZED AS CLASSIC LITERATURE, MANDATORY READING FOR ENGLISH AND LITERATURE MAJORS AT ALL UNIVERSITIES. ROTHFUSS NOT ONLY TANTALIZES US WITH A STORY IN WHICH DEMANDS EVERY OUNCE OF OUR ATTENTION, BUT HE ALSO WRITES IN A FASHION THAT MAKES WORDS READ AND APPEAR BEAUTIFUL. THIS IS A DAY AND AGE IN WHICH A GOOD STORY OFTEN MASKS POOR TECHNICAL WRITING. THERE ARE THOSE WHO ARE GOOD AT THE ART OF STORYTELLING BUT LACKING IN THE SKILL OF LANGUAGE. IF ANYBODY EVER DESERVED TO BE TOLD THAT THERE NOVEL WAS THE HIGHEST QUALITY OF POETRY, MUSIC, AND LYRICAL VERSE IN MOTION, IT IS PATRICK ROTHFUSS. HIS WORK READS AS BEAUTIFULLY AS JOHN FOWLES IN THE MAGUS. THE FIRST TWO 2 DAYS IN ROTHFUSS'S KINGKILLER CHRONICLES ARE NOVELS THAT RAISE THE STANDARD FOR STORY TELLERS AND DEFINE AN ERA OF LITERATURE. THE NAME OF THE WIND, AND THE WISEMAN'S FEAR ARE EVERYTHING I HAVE SAID AND MORE. IT IS NEARLY IMPOSSIBLE TO IMAGINE ANOTHER NOVEL MEASURING UP TO THESE PRIOR TO THE RELEASE OF THE THIRD ONE. IT'S GOING TO BE A WHILE, BUT IT WILL BE WORTH IT REGARDLESS OF TIME. READ THESE TWO NOVELS, SOAK THEM UP, TAKE THEM IN, CONSIDER EVERYTHING THAT MAKES A STORY GREAT, AND ALL THAT IS INVOLVED IN CREATING BEAUTY THROUGH THE WRITTEN WORD, AND YOU WILL REALIZE THAT YOU ARE EXPERIENCING A MASTER AUTHOR'S ETERNAL CONTRIBUTION TO THE WORLD

WORD OF THE DOVE, FOR WHAT IT'S WORTH
rows.title: BRILLIANT STORY, BEAUTIFUL LANGUAGE

rows.text:
I ONLY GIVE IT A 3 (EVEN THOUGHT ITS NOT EVEN BEEN 7 MONTHS USING THIS DRIVE & KEEPING IT OPTIMAL-CLEAN-ETC IT FAILED TODAY 8.22.15) DUE TO WHEN I BOUGHT THIS TO UPGRADE MY HDD TO SSD IN MY MSI P55-GD65 GAMING XTREME LGA-1156 MOBO w/ i7-870 @ 4.3GHz - 16GB OF CORSAIR VENGENCE (BLUE) 1600MHZ DDR3 (1866 @ CL9) - WD 1TB BLACK SATA3 ON PCI-E (ASMEDIA CONTROLLER) 2 PORT SATA3-6Gbs DUE TO THE P55 BEING SATA2, BUT NOW HAS 2 PCIE X1 (USB 3.0 CARD IN PCI-E X4 SLOT - SATA3 6G CARD IN 2ND PCI-E X16 FOR BOTH TO HAVE MAX BANDWIDTH TO ACHIEVE TRUE 5-6G SPEED PERFORMANCE) - CORSAIR H100i CLC AIO WATER COOLER - OCZ ZX SERIES 850W FULLY MODULAR 80+GOLD PSU - ASUS GTX 660 OC DIRECTCU II 2GB VERSION - AND THEN THE CRUCIAL V4 (SATA2) 256GB SSD (TO BOOST PERFORMANCE IN START TIMES, APPS, ETC.) IS/WAS MY PERFECT EXCELLENT 1080P HIGH-ULTRA SETTING GAMING SYSTEM AND A BEAST OF AN OVERCLOCKING MOTHERBOARD ARE MY SPECS.BEING A GAMER/TECHY WE ALL STRIVE (WITH WHAT WE HAVE OR WORKING ON BUILD WISE) FOR THE MOST PART OBTAIN THE MOST STABLE, RELIABLE, COMPATIBLE COMPONENTS NECESSARY FOR OPTIMAL PEAK PERFORMANCE/OC/EFFICIENCY, SO WHEN YOUR DEALING WITH REPUTABLE NAMES, TOP COMPONENTS, AND MORE, YOU EXPECT THEM TO PERFORM TO THE STANDARDS AT WHICH MANUFACTURES CLAIM, MARKET & ADVERTISE TO US, REVIEWS & MORE. SO WHEN A PORT DOESN'T DO THAT THEN IT REFLECTS ON THE COMPANY AND IS A NEGATIVE FOR THE BUYER/CONSUMER WHO KEEPS THEM IN BUSINESS. NO I REALIZE WE DEAL WITH TECHNOLOGY AND WITH THAT COMES THE OCCASIONAL "DOA" OR DEFECTIVE PART WHICH IS TYPICALLY RMA"D OR REPLACED BY REPUTABLE COMPANIES AND IM HOPING CRUCIAL STANDS BY THERE PROMISES/PARTS/STANDARDS TOWARD THE BUYER(S). SO ANYWAYS, WHEN I GOT IT, I DID THE USUAL PREP FOR SSDS LIKE BIOS CHANGES TO AHCI INSTEAD OF IDE, MADE SURE THE FIRMWARE AND SUCH IS ALL UP TO DATE, ETC. WHEN I FIRST INSTALLED WIN 7 ULTIMATE X64 AND FINISHED MY OPTIMIZATIONS FOR SPEED TIMES, I THEN BEGAN MY BENCH TEST ON ALL STOCK SETTINGS AND THE DRIVE WASN'T HITTING THE NUMBERS ADVERTISED IN THE READ/WRITE. CLOSE, BUT NOT TO MY SATISFACTION, BUT IT WAS GOOD ENOUGH THAT I DIDN'T FEEL LIKE COMPLAINING OR DOING A RETURN, ALSO I NEVER LET MY SSDs EVEN COME CLOSE TO GETTING FULL AND EVEN THOUGH THIS IS A 256GB DRIVE, IT WAS ALWAYS AROUND 150GB WITH MOST OF MY GAMES/APPS/ETC ON MY WD BLACK DRIVE. AS TIME WENT ON I FIRST BEGAN WITH A WINDOWS SCORE OF 7.7 FOR MY CPU, 7.6 FOR MY GPU AND THEN 7.1 FOR THIS SSD WHICH I THOUGH WAS AWESOME SINCE IF YOUR RUNNING A HDD THE MAX RATING FOR ANY HARD DRIVE IS 5.9. WITH THAT BEING SAID, EVEN THOUGH MY INITIAL READ/WRITE WASN'T AS EXPECTED, UNLIKE OTHER REVIEWS IVE READ HERE MY EXPERIENCE WAS DIFFERENT IN TERMS OF OTHERS STATING THAT IT WASN'T EVEN FASTER THAN AN HDD, ETC, MINE WAS FURTHER FROM THOSE STATEMENTS, I NOTICED A HUGE/FAST IMPROVEMENT AS A WHOLE WHICH THE WINDOWS INDEX SCORE SUGGESTED. EITHER WAY MY GAMING/APPS WERE MUCH FASTER FOR A FEW MONTHS, SO THAT'S WHY IM GOING 3 EVEN THOUGH I WANT TO GIVE A 0 BECAUSE THIS IS MY 3RD CRUCIAL PART TO FAIL, AT THE SAME TIME I STILL HAVE CRUCIAL PARTS THAT HAVEN'T AND ARE GREAT, SO IM AT A CROSSROADS HERE ON RECOMMENDING CERTAIN DEVICES. I CAN SAY MY CRUCIAL M-500 (CT240M500SSD1) 2240GB SATA III MLC SSD IS A BEAST AND LIVES UP TO ITS SPECS/ADVERTISED AND VERY SATISFIED WITH THAT AND MY 8GB OF BULLISTIX MEMORY ON ANOTHER RIG. I WILL RECOMMEND THEM ANYTIME. NOT SURE ON THIS DRIVE AS I WAS SAYING BEFORE AFTER A FEW MONTHS IT STARTED TO DEGRADE WHEN IT SHOULDN'T BE ALL DUE TO HOW I TREAT MY DRIVES AND MAINTAIN MY PCS. I OWN A PC BUSINESS-DO REVIEWS-TECH-MODS ON MY YOUTUBE CHANNEL, ETC. SO I KNOW HOW PCS WORK AND HOW TO MAXIMIZE THEIR POTENTIAL_[GRANTED THIS ISNT MY WORKSTATION OR MAIN GAMER, THAT GOES TO MY EVGA X79 DARK MOTHERBOARD LGA-2011 32GB RAM - 5GHZ OC - 40 PCIE LANES FOR MY SLI EVGA GTX 770 SUPERCLOCKED BLAZING FAST GPUS ON A SOLID OCZ ZX EXTREME 80+ GOLD MODULAR 1000W PSU]_SO IF THIS IS REOCCURRING THEN SOMETHING IS WRONG WITH THE DRIVES AS A WHOLE, MOST LIKELY IT BEING SATA2 BUT STILL FAST, WASN'T GIVEN A CHANCE TO MATURE SINCE I BELIEVE THERE IS ONLY 1 FIRMWARE UPDATE AVAILABLE ON THIS DRIVE_A REVISED ONE COULD FIX A LOT ISSUES PEOPLE ARE RUNNING INTO, BUT THAT'S MY OPINION. YES I KNOW SSDs OVER TIME (BUT NOT IN 7MO AND BE DEAD OR WHY CLAIM A 3YR WARRANTY IF YOUR EXPECTING FAILURE) DUE BEGIN TO "SLOW DOWN" BUT NEVER AT THIS RATE, EVEN WORSE IT JUST CRASHED ON ME YESTERDAY EVENING PLAYING FAR CRY 4 AND GUESS WHAT? ITS DEAD! WONT EVEN SHOW UP AS A DEVICE, PLUGGED INTO OTHER PCS AND DIDN'T WORK, EVEN TRIED HOOKING IT UP VIA USB, STILL NOTHING EVEN THOUGH I CAN "HEAR" IT RUNNING. EITHER WAY I CANT RETRIEVE LOST-PRECIOUS FILES ON NOW AND HAVE TRIED ALL TRICKS IN THE BOOKS TO FIX THIS. IM VERY DISAPPOINTED AND MOST LIKELY WONT GO WITH CRUCIAL ANYMORE. ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. BUT IF YOU WANT TO TAKE THE RISK AND POSS. GET ONE THAT WILL LAST, THEN GO FOR. IT WORKED GREAT IN THE BEGINNING, BUT VASTLY DEGRADED AND NOW DEAD IN ONLY 7 MO. OF USING/OWNING THIS AND I PURCHASED IT BRAND NEW. THEY BETTER RMA-REPLACE THIS AS THEIR WARRANTY IS STILL ACTIVE OF COURSE. COMMON CRUCIAL, WHY STILL SELL A PART THAT'S BECOMING NOTORIOUSLY UN RELIABLE. AND TO BE UN RELIABLE IN THE PC WORLD IS A NO GO! RELIABILITY, STABILITY, AND LONGEVITY IS EVERYTHING AND KEY FOR LONG LASTING, PEAK PERFORMANCE COMPUTING WE ALL NEED, ESPECIALLY THE ENTHUSIASTS LIKE MYSELF AND MANY OTHER REVIEWERS HERE. ALL IN ALL IM BASING THIS RATING/REVIEW AS A WHOLE, NOT JUST IT CRASHING, RATHER HOW IT WORKED OUT THE BOX, WHAT I GOT OUT OF IT IN USE UP UNTIL THIS MOMENT WAS SATISFACTORY IN THE BEGINNING, BUT IN A BLINK OF AN EYE CRUSHED MY HOPES ON THIS. BUYER BEWARE.

LAST THING, I CAN ONLY STATE THIS EXPERIENCE AS AN OPINION SINCE I DON'T HAVE COMPARABLE DATA OF MY "OWN" KEEPING MYSELF UNBIASED TO OTHERS EXPERIENCE, BUT WHEN YOU READ AND SEE CONSISTENCIES THAT MAKE IT BECOME MORE FACT. NOW WHEN THIS IS REPLACED, THEN ILL HAVE DATA TO COMPARE AGAINST AND WILL DO A NEW REVIEW FROM WHEN I GET IT, 3MO, 6MO ETC. AND DO SO ON MY YOUTUBE CHANNEL. WHO KNOWS, I MIGHT END UP BEING WRONG THAT I FEEL ITS FLAWED. THERE'S ROOM FOR 2ND CHANCES. SO TO BE FAIR I GIVE IT A 3 OUT OF 5 EVEN WITH WHAT HAPPENED. HOPE THIS HELPS ANYONE ON THEIR DECISION. TAKE CARE, AND CRUCIAL GET AT ME. THANKS.

rows.text:
I WISH THAT IN NOVEMBER 1998 ALL THE VENEZUELANS HAD READ THIS BOOK TO
HAVE A CLEAR IDEA OF THE NIGHTMARE THAT WAS TO COME,
THIS IS AN EXCELLENT BOOK SET IN 1989 AND 1990 WHEN THE IRON COURTAIN WAS
FALLING DOWN BUT STILL THERE WERE FIVE REMANENTS OF THIS EVIL IDEOLOGY,
THIS IS A GOOD COMPANION WITH ANIMAL FARM AND 1984, THE DIFFERENCE IS THAT
THIS IS THE ORWELLIAN NIGHTMARE IN REAL, THE FIVE COUNTRIES ARE; ALBANIA,NORTH KOREA,
ROMANIA, VIETNAM, AND CUBA. ALTHOUGH THESE FIVE COUNTRIES ARE DIFFERENT IN CULTURE,GEOGRAPHY,HISTORY AND RELIGION THEY SHARE THE SAME CHARACTERISTICS : TYRANNY,REPRESSION,MURDER,UGLINESS, SCARCITY,DISTORTION OF HISTORY,LIES, VERY LOW STANDARTS OF LIVING ,LONG QUEUES, HATRED AND AMORALITY. THE AUTHOR DOES NOT ONLY CONDEMNS THESE REGIMES BUT ALSO THE WESTERN LIBERAL-LEFTIST WHO SUPPORT THEM, NOT GUIDED BY ANY SENSE OF SOCIAL JUSTICE BUT BY SOCIAL RESENTMENT AND
HATRED, FOR INSTANCE WHEN A COMPANION OF THE AUTHOR MAKES THE COMPARISON BETWEEN THE
HARRODS SHOPS IN LONDON WITH THE POTEMKIN SHOPPING CENTER IN PYONGANG,NORTH KOREA IT SOUNDS
REALLY NAUSEATING.
IN ROMANIA (SIX WEEKS BEFORE CEAUSESCU OVERTROWN),THE EVIL COUPLE NICOLAE AND ELENA CEASESCU,
WERE DOING A MAD SOCIAL ENGINEERING EXPERIMENTS BY LEVELLING ALL THE ANCIENTS TOWNS AND VILLAGES,
THE BACKBONE OF THE ROMANIAN NATION AND CULTURE, AND CREATED ELEPHANTINE CONCRETE BUILDINGS IN
ORDER TO HAVE A TOTAL CONTROL OF THE POPULATION ALL THIS AIDED BY THE SINESTER SECURITATE.
CUBA WAS THE LAST COUNTRY THAT THE AUTHOR VISITED, HE WAS UNSIMPATHETIC WITH THE CASTROS
(OTHERWISE I WOULD NOT PURCHASE THE BOOK), HE POINTED OUT ALL THE REPRESSION, MURDER, CENSORSHIP,
LONG QUEUES,THE DECAYING OF THE CITIES,THE IDEOLOGICAL RIGIDITY, AND THE LONG AND SENSELESS SPECHES
OF THE OLD MAD MAN.
STILL I DISAGREE WITH HIM IN MANY POINTS,HE REPEATED THE OLD CLICHES OF EDUCATION AND HEALTH CARE,
I LIVE IN MIAMI AND I CAN SEE THAT THE CUBAN NEWCOMERS WHO WERE RAISED IN CUBA ARE ANYTHING
BUT EDUCATED OR CULT, THE HEALTH CARE IS A REAL DISASTER LACKING EVEN THE BASICS MOST OF THE
MEDICINES ARE BROUGHT BY THE EXILE COMMUNITY,HE SAID THAT THE CHILD ARE WELL FED, ACTUALLY FED ON WHAT?
WHEN THE SHELVES OF THE STORES ARE EMPTY ALSO AFTER THE CHILD REACH THE SIX YEARS OLD THERE IS NO
MORE MILK, THAT THE PEASANTS ARE BETTER OFF THAT IN THE REST OF THE CONTINENT, I WOULD RATHER BE A
PEASANT IN THE MOST UNDERDEVELOPED NON- COMMUNIST COUNTRY THAN IN COMMUNIST CUBA.
BUT WHAT REALLY IRATED ME WAS WHEN HE WENT TO THE PLAYA GIRON MUSEUM, THE AUTHOR MADE A
STATEMENT THAT THE REVOLUTIONARIES WERE GOOD AND IDEALIST AND THAT THE CAUSE OF THE COUNTER-
REVOLUTION WAS BAD, NOT ONLY THIS IS FALSE BUT THE OPPOSITE IS TRUE, THE REVOLUTIONARIES
FOUGHT FOR THE MOST IGNOBLE CAUSE, TO SUPPORT A MAD COMMUNIST TYRANNY, ON THE OTHER
HAND THE COUNTER-REVOLUTIONARIES, BY THE WAY I LOVE THIS LABEL, FOUGHT FOR THE FREEDOM
NOT ONLY OF CUBA BUT OF ALL LATIN AMERICA.
I REALLY FEEL APPALED BY THE PREJUDICE AND BIAS OF MANY AMERICANS AND EUROPEANS , EVEN
CONSERVATIVES LIKE THE BRITISH AUTHOR, AGAINST WHITE MIDDLE CLASS LATIN AMERICA; TO MAKE
A CASE IN POINT IN THE PREVIOUS CHAPTER RELATED TO VIETNAM THE AUTHOR POINTS THE CONTRAST
BETWEEN THE IDEALISM, FRUGALITY, AND HONESTY OF HO CHI MINH AND THE BANALITY, CORRUPTION,
AND OPORTUNISM OF THE SOUTH VIETNAMESE LEADERS, INMEDIATELY HOWEVER THE AUTHOR MADE
THE OBSERVATION THAT THE VIETNAMESE VOTED WITH THEIR FEET AND BOATS ( THE FEET AFTER 1954
WHEN THE RED VIETMINH OVERRAN THE FRENCH IN DIEM BIEN PHU, ALMOST A MILLION OF VIETNAMESE
HEADED SOUTH OF THE 17TH PARALELL, AND THE BOATS AFTER 1975 WHEN THE COMMUNIST ARMY OF
NORTH VIETNAM TOOK OVER SAIGON, HUNDREDS OF THOUSANDS OF VIETNAMESE ESCAPED IN
BOATS RISKING THEIR LIVES).IN THE END THE AUTHOR PREFERS WITH ALL THEIR SHORTCOMINGS PRE-1975
SOUTH VIETNAM.
ALSO THE AUTHOR POINTED OUT THE MISERY AND SQUALOR OF THE VIETNAMESE REFUGEE CAMPS IN
HONG KONG AND THAILAND AND THE FACT THAT THE VIETNAMESE PREFERED THEM THAN TO RETURN
BACK TO COMMUNIST VIETNAM.
BY CONTRAST THE AUTHOR FAILS TO POINT OUT THAT AFTER PLAYA GIRON (APRIL,17,1961) THERE WAS
AND EXODUS OF HUNDREDS OF THOUSANDS OF CUBANS FROM ALL WALKS OF LIFE(MYSELF AND MY PARENTS
INCLUDED); PLEASE COME TO CALLE OCHO TO HAVE A CUBAN CAFECITO AND FIND OUT THE REAL TRUE
THAT THE ANTI- CASTRO BRIGADISTAS WERE TRULY PATRIOTS AND THAT LATER MANY OF THEM WENT
TO DIFFERENTS PARTS OF THE WORLD ; CONGO,VIETNAM, ANGOLA, AND CENTRAL AMERICA TO FIGHT
AGAINST TOTALITARIAN COMMUNISM.
I STRONGLY AGREE WITH THE CONCLUSION OF THE BOOK ABOUT THE EVIL NATURE OF COMMUNIST DICTATORSHIPS
AND THAT ALL THE TRAGEDIES AND DISASTERS WERE NOT THE PRODUCT OF A TYRANNY BY ITSELF BUT OF AN EVIL
IDEOLOGY DEDICATED TO THE ENSLAVEMENT OF HUMANKIND, SOME OF ITS ASPECTS LIKE THE LONG QUEUES
FOR FOOD AND OTHER BASICS GOODS WERE NOT BECAUSE OF THE INEFFICIENCES OF THE GOVERNMENTS BUT
SOMETHING COLD PLANNED IN ORDER TO HAVE A TIGHT CONTROL OF THE POPULATION, TO DISUADE THEM FOR
REBELLION, AND TO PUT ONES AGAINST THE OTHERS.
IN SPITE OF THE ABYSMAL FAILURE OF COMMUNISM , IN OTHER PARTS OF THE WORLD THERE WILL BE MESSIANIC
LEADERS, SUPPORTED BY INTELLECTUALS FULL OF SOCIAL RESENMENT AND HATRED AND BY THE MASS OF
THE IGNORANT LOW CLASSES, WHO WILL TRY TO SEIZE POWER AND INSTALL A RED TYRANNY. THE AUTHOR FINISHES
IN PERU WITH THE SHINING PATH A SORT OF ANDEAN KHMER ROUGE,FORTUNATELLY TWO YEARS LATER
THEY WERE DEFEATED BY ALBERTO FUJIMORI (WHICH I STRONGLY SYMPATIZE WITH).
SEVEN YEARS LATER HUGO CHAVEZ ( A CASTROITE DISCIPLE) WAS ELECTED PRESIDENT OF VENEZUELA, AS A
RESULT THE ORWELLIAN NIGHTMARE DESCRIBED IN THE BOOK CAME TO THIS UNFORTUNATE COUNTRY OF MINE.

rows.text:
ROGUE ONE TAKES PLACE RIGHT BEFORE THE EXCELLENT MOVIE THAT BEGAN IT ALL, STAR WARS 4. NOT SINCE THE EXCELLENT STAR WARS ADAPTATION FOR RADIO FROM NPR HAVE WE BEEN GIVEN SUCH GREAT BACKSTORY. THE WRITING, ACTING, AND SPECIAL EFFECTS ARE PERFECT! IT IS CLEAR THAT THE EXCELLENT CAST AND CREW WANTED TO PAINSTAKINGLY RECREATE THE LOOK AND FEEL OF "A NEW HOPE" EVEN INCLUDING A COUPLE OF ASTOUNDING ACTOR RECREATIONS! NOT SINCE BEAUTIFUL PRINCESS LEIA STOLE ALL OF THE BOYS HEARTS THAT WERE FANS FROM THE BEGINNING, INCLUDING ME, HAS A STAR WARIAN EFFECTED ME LIKE JYN, BOTH THE BEAUTIFUL CHILD AND GROWN WOMAN!
THE WRITERS HAD A TOUGH JOB AND MADE IT THROUGH WITH FLYING COLORS! I DETECTED 3 POSSIBLE INCONSISTANCIES. 1) STAR WARS 4 PRESENTED A DIFFERENT CHARACTER AS THE BUILDER OF THE BATTLESTATION. TO HIM VADER SAID, "DON'T BE TOO PROUD OF THIS STATION YOU HAVE CONSTRUCTED. IT IS INSIGNIFICANT TO THE POWER OF THE FORCE." HOWEVER, THE WAY I SEE IT, THE "DIRECTOR" IN ROGUE ONE DIRECTED THE WEAPON AND ITS POWER NEEDS WHILE SW4's "DIRECTOR" DIRECTED THE STATION OVERALL. 2) IN THE BEAUTIFUL MOMENT WHERE C3PO AND R2D2 SHARED LINES ABOUT WHERE EVERYONE WAS GOING, THEY ALSO HAD TO GO THERE TOO, BECAUSE THE DEATHSTAR PLANS WERE PLACED INTO R2 BY PRINCESS LEIA IN SW4. THE SOLUTION TO THIS APPARENT INCONSISTENCY IS THAT 3PO AND R2 JOINED THE REST OF THE DEPARTING GROUP SHORTLY AFTER WE SAW THEM, DEFINITELY PROVING THAT DROIDS ARE THE LAST TO KNOW WHAT'S GOING ON. 3) SW4 IMPLIED NO PREVIOUS USE OF THE DEATHSTAR WEAPON. RECALL THAT GRANDMOFF TARKEN SAID: "PRINCESS LEIA, BEFORE YOUR EXECUTION I WOULD LIKE FOR YOU TO BE A PART OF A CEREMONY THAT WILL MAKE THIS BATTLESTATION OPERATIONAL. I HAVE ELECTED TO TEST THIS STATION'S FIREPOWER ON YOUR HOMEWORLD OF ALDERAAN." THE WAY I SEE IT, THE ROGUE ONE FIRINGS WERE EXECUTED AT LOWER SETTINGS BECAUSE THE SCIENTISTS EXPRESSED CONCERN ABOUT POSSIBLE COLATERAL DAMAGE ON THE STATION ITSELF WHICH COULD HAVE CRIPPLED OR EVEN DESTOYED IT. ALSO, YOU WOULD CERTAINLY EXPECT PEACEFUL SCIENTISTS LIKE JYN'S FATHER TO DOWNPLAY THE POWER THAT COULD BE REALIZED FROM SUCH A WEAPON OF MASS DESTRUCTION. THESE SCIENTISTS WORKED IN FEAR FOR THEIR LIVES, AS YOU WOULD IF YOU WERE FORCED BY NAZIS TO DO SOMETHING HORRIBLE. WITH THE ORIGINAL SCIENTISTS DEAD BY THE TIME OF THE ALDERAAN TARGETING AND THE SUCCESS OF DESTROYING LARGE AREAS OF 2 WORLDS IN "ROGUE ONE" WITHOUT ANY STRAIN ON THE STATION, TARKIN MUST HAVE DECIDED TO RISK INCREASING THE WEAPONS OUTPUT TO OVERLOAD STRENGTH IN ORDER TO ENTIRELY BLOW UP ALDERAAN, AS ALDERAAN WAS ONE OF THE MOST SERIOUS THREATS TO SIDIOUS'S CONTINUED REIGN OF TERROR, IT'S DESTRUCTION WOULD TIGHTEN THE IMPERIAL GRIP, ELEVATE TARKIN AND ULTIMATELY INSURE THAT TARKIN BECOMES THE NEXT EMPEROR IN AN "UNFORTUNATE" EVENT," SUCH AS A SURPRISE BLOWING UP OF SIDIOUS'S HOME WORLD. THE ONLY QUESTION IN THE RUTHLESS TARKIN'S MIND, COULD VADER BE TRUSTED OR WOULD VADER ALSO HAVE TO "TRAGICALLY DIE." EVEN THOUGH SIDIOUS AND DARTH HAD SOME ABILITY TO FORSEE THINGS, I SPECULATE THAT TARKIN, LIKE HIS NOW DECEASED RIVAL COUNT DOOKU, ALSO SECRETLY HAD KNOWLEDGE AND USE OF THE FORCE. TARKIN'S CLEVER LINE IN SW4 THAT VADER IS ALL THAT IS LEFT OF THAT RELIGION MUST HAVE BEEN SAID TO ENHANCE HIS DECEPTION. HAD DOOKU SURVIVED, A STRUGGLE BETWEEN TARKIN AND HE WOULD SURELY HAVE ENSUED. WE COULD TELL FROM THE WAY THAT DOOKU ADMIRED THE DEATHSTAR HOLOGRAM IN SW2 THAT HE HAD EQUAL ASPIRATIONS TO TARKIN.
THE MOST AMAZING THING ABOUT ALLIANCES WITH NAZI TYPES (FEEKS AS I CALL THEM, PERTAINING TO FECAL MATTER, THE SCUM OF THE EARTH), IS THAT FEEKS ARE SELF SERVING, MONEY AND POWER WORSHIPPERS THAT DECEIVE EVERYONE INTO BELIEVING THAT THEY ARE ULTRA GOOD, LIKE SIDIOUS DID WITH THE JEDI OR THE ENDTIME ANTICHRIST WILL DO WITH THOSE THAT DON'T KNOW BIBLICAL PROPHECY. IN ACTUALITY, FEEKS ARE ULTRA EVIL AND WILL USUALLY DESTROY EVERYONE INVOLVED, EVEN THEIR OWN ALLIES ONCE THEY HAVE SERVED THEIR PURPOSE. RECALL, SIDIOUS'S BETRAYAL OF DOOKU, AND SENDING VADER TO KILL ALL HIS ALLIES. AS I KEEP SAYING STAR WARS IS THE PERFECT PORTRAYAL OF THE VERY REAL BATTLE OF GOOD VS EVIL PRESENTED IN A SCIENCE FICTION SETTING. HISTORY IS REPLETE WITH SIMILAR FECAL EXAMPLES, LIKE THE JAPANESE SURPRISE ATTACK ON PEARL HARBOR AND THE NAZI'S WW2 SURPRISE ATTACK ON THEIR RUSSIAN ALLY.
TO MY READERS, "BE CAREFUL THAT YOUR ASPIRATIONS DON'T CHOKE YOU UP" AS THEY ALWAYS DO TO THOSE THAT CONSIDER THEMSELVES SUPERIOR. SIDIOUS PROMISED ANAKIN ETERNAL LIFE BUT SIDIOUS'S WAYS LEAD TO ETERNAL DEATH OF THE SOUL. LOVE GOD AND TREAT ALL AS YOU WOULD WANT TO BE TREATED AND YOU SHALL HAVE ETERNAL BLISSFUL LIFE!
"SAMISHBAYWATCHER"
5/18/2017

rows.text:
THE GOOD, THE BAD AND THE UGLY: THIS SYSTEM......AND YOU!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

- THE INSTALL TIME - A SEMI AVERAGE HUMAN WITH A FULLY FUNCTIONAL BRAIN, AVERAGE COMMON SENSE AND CAN SPELL THE WORDS DRILL AND SCREWDRIVER......ABOUT 30 MINUTE INSTALL TIME IF TECH SAVEY AND CAN OPERATE SIMPLE AVERAGE TOOLS AND CAN READ LEFT TO RIGHT AND FOLLOW SIMPLE DIRECTIONS..
