rows.text:
DON KNOTTS " THE RELUCTANT HERO " COLLECTORS SET
THIS SET WAS RELEASHED IN 2004, STARTING TO GET HARD TO FIND, PRICE IS STARTING TO GO UP ON THIS SET.
TOTAL RUN TIME OF 397 MINUTES
ALL 4 MOVIES ARE ON 1 DUAL-LAYERED DISC ( 2 MOVIES ON EACH SIDE )
COMES IN A CARDBOARD BOX WITH 1 PLASTIC SLIPCASE.
YOU CANNOT FIND THESE MOVIES ANYWHERE. NEVER SHOWN ON TV ANYMORE.
THESE ARE THE MOVIES THAT KNOTTS STARRED IN IMMEDIATELY AFTER LEAVING THE " ANDY GRIFFITH SHOW ", MANY OF THE SETS USED IN THESE MOVIES LOOK LIKE THEY WHERE THE SAME SETS FROM THE GRIFFITH SHOW. MANY OF THE ACTORS THAT ARE IN THE MOVIES ALSO WHERE IN THE GRIFFITH SHOW.THIS LED TO THE MAYBERRY LOOK AND FEEL IN THESE AWESOME MOVIES.
HERE ARE MY INTAKE OF THESE MOVIES IN THE ORDER OF THEIR PRODUCTION YEAR.

THE GHOST AND MR. CHICKEN (1966) 1 HR.30MIN.UNIVERSAL.
THIS IS KNOTTS 1st FILM AFTER LEAVING THE GRIFFITH SERIES.
TO CONVINCE HIS BOSS (DICK SARGENT of "BEWITCHED" "DARRIN" FAME)TO LET HIM BE A REPORTER FOR "THE RACHEL COURIER EXPRESS", LOWLY TYPESETTER LUTHER HEGGS (KNOTTS) DECIDES TO SPEND THE NIGHT IN A OLD HAUNTED HOUSE TRYING TO SOLVE A SPOOKY 20 YEAR OLD MURDER CASE. AFTER ENCOUNTERING A GHOSTLY EXPERIENCE , HE WRITES A STORY THAT MAKES FRONT PAGE NEWS AND BECOMES A HOME TOWN HERO. BUT WHEN HE FAILS TO BACK UP HIS GHOSTLY CLAIM, LUTHER IS BRANDED A FRAUD, UNTIL HE AND HIS DEVOTED GIRLFRIEND ALMA TEAM-UP TO UNCOVER THE MYSTERY OF THIS GHOSTLY MANSION.
SOME OF THE MAYBERRY REGULARS ARE IN THIS MOVIE...HAL SMITH WHO PLAYS OTIS CAMPBELL ALSO PLAYS A ROLE OF THE TOWN DRUNK IN THIS MOVIE, AND JUST LIKE IN MAYBERRY DORTHY NEUMANN PLAYS HIS WIFE. BURT MUSTIN WHO PLAYS JUD IN MAYBERRY IS HERE AS IS HOPE SUMMERS (CLARA EDWARDS). MANY OF THE TOWN SCENES LOOK LIKE THEY ARE THE TOWN SCENES FROM THE MAYBERRY SET. DOES THE HAUNTED MANSION LOOKS FAMILIAR TO YOU ? THATS BECAUSE IT IS 1313 MOCKINGBIRD LANE...THE SAME HAUNTED HOUSE THAT THE "MUNSTERS" LIVED IN...ALSO THE SAME HOUSE THEY USE ON "DESPERATE HOUSEWIVES". THE NIFTY EERIE ORGAN MUSIC IS GREAT. PERFECT MOVIE FOR HALLOWEEN VIEWING.

THE RELUCTANT ASTRONAUT (1967) 1HR.43MIN. UNIVERSAL
THIS IS KNOTTS 2nd MOVIE AFTER LEAVING THE GRIFFITH SHOW.
HERE DON KNOTTS IS ROY FLEMING A SMALL TOWN KIDDIE ASTRONAUT RIDE OPERATOR, WHO IS DEATHLY AFRAID OF HEIGHTS. HERE HE LEARNS THAT HIS FATHER HAD SECRETLY SUBMITTED A JOB APPLICATION TO NASA ,AND THAT HE HAD BEEN ACCEPTED. HE RELUCTANTLY HEADS FOR HOUSTON IN WHAT HE AND THE ENTIRE TOWN BELIEVES IS ASRONAUT TRAINING. ROY LATER IS RELIEVED TO FIND OUT HIS JOB IS NOT THAT OF A ASTRONAUT BUT A NASA JANITOR. THE REST OF THE MOVIE ROY MANAGES TO KEEP A FALSE FACADE OF BEING THE HOMETOWN HERO ASTRONAUT, UNTIL HIS FATHER AND FRIENDS COME TO VISIT AND THE TRUTH IS SHOWN. LATER WHEN NASA LEARNS THAT RUSSIA IS INTENT ON SENDING A UNTRAINED CIVILIAN INTO SPACE, THEY DECIDE TO BEAT RUSSIA WITH THEIR OWN UNTRAINED CIVILIAN , AND LAUNCH ROY INTO SPACE.
THIS MOVIE ALSO STARRED PAUL HARTMAN WHO PLAYED EMMETT CLARK AS THE FIX IT SHOP OWNER IN MAYBERRY.ALSO STARS A YOUNG LESLIE NIELSON.
THIS MOVIE WAS RELEASED NOT LONG AFTER THE INFAMOUS FIERY CRASH OF APOLLO I AND THE DEATHS OF 3 ASTRONAUTS, AND UNIVERSAL TOOK A BEATING FROM RELEASING IT TOO SOON AFTER THE TRAGEDY.

THE SHAKIEST GUN IN THE WEST (1968)1HR.41MIN. UNIVERSAL
JESSE HAYWOOD (KNOTTS) GRADUATES FROM DENTAL SCHOOL IN PHILADELPHIA IN 1870, DECIDES TO GO WEST TO FIGHT "ORAL IGNORANCE" DUPED INTO MARRYING A BEAUTIFUL REDHEAD STAGECOACH ROBBER KNOWN AS PENELOPE "BAD PENNY" CUSHING, JESSE SOON FINDS HIMSELF FIGHTING ON THE WRONG SIDE OF THE TOWN BAD GUYS.JESSE SOON BECOMES "DOC THE HAYWOOD" AFTER HE GUNS DOWN "ARNOLD THE KID" WITH "PENNY" DOING THE ACTUAL SHOOTING (UNBEKNOWN TO HIM OR ANYONE ELSE)
ALSO INCLUDES HOPE SUMMERS AGAIN (PLAYS CLARA EDWARDS ON MAYBERRY)

THE LOVE GOD ? (1969) 1HR. 43MIN., UNIVERSAL
ABNER AUDUBON PEACOCK (KNOTTS) IS A GOOFY, GEEKY SMALL TOWN PUBLISHER OF A BIRD WATCHER MAGAZINE. ABNER HAS FALLEN ON HARD FINANCIAL TIMES AND SEEKS SOMEHOW TO SAVE HIS MAGAZINE. ENTER OSBORN TREMAINE WHO UNBEKNOWN TO ABNER IS AN UNSCRUMPULOUS SMUT KING WHO HAS JUST LOST HIS MAILING PRIVILAGES. HE RESCUES ABNERS MAGAZINE BY TURNING IT INTO A GIRLIE MAGAZINE. ANNE FRANCIS PLAYS A MANIPULATING RIVAL MAGAZINE PUBLISHER WHO GOES TO WORK BUILDING PEACOCK INTO THE NEXT HUGH HEFNER. BETWEEN HER AND PEACOCKS FAMOUS ATTORNEY , PEACOCK IS A CONFUSED MESS WITH NOT AN IDEAL OF WHAT IS GOING ON AROUND HIM.
ALSO STARS MAGGIE PETERSON AS PEACOCKS EVER FAITHFUL GIRLFRIEND ( SHE PLAYED "CHARLENE DARLING" ON THE ANDY GRIFFITH SHOW)
QUITE A DEPARTURE FROM THE FAMILY ORIENTED MOVIES THAT DON KNOTTS IS KNOWN FOR, BUT QUITE AMUSING, ESPECIALLY WITH ANNE FRANCIS TO GAWK AT.

IF YOU ARE A FAN OF DON KNOTTS THIS COLLECTION IS HIGHLY RECOMMENDED.
rows.title: THE ULTIMATE DON KNOTTS COLLECTION

rows.text:
[[ASIN:B00005AB9N Pentax ZX-5N 35mm SLR Camera (Body Only)]]
AS A PROFESSIONAL PHOTOGRAPHER OF ABOUT 40 YEARS, I HAVE COME TO USE
LITERALLY HUNDREDS OF CAMERA MODELS, AND COULD SAY LOTS OF FAVORABLE THINGS ABOUT MANY MANY OF THEM. HAVING SEEN SO MUCH TECHNOLOGICAL
CHANGE AND IMPROVEMENT IN THE CAMERA INDUSTRY OVER SUCH A LONG TIME,
I THINK HOW REMARKABLE IT IS THAT THE PICTURE-TAKING - OR RATHER, THE
PICTURE-MAKING PROCESS HAS BECOME SO SIMPLE, COMPARED WITH THE EARLIER DAYS OF PHOTOGRAPHY - NOT TO MENTION, SO AFFORDABLE.

FROM PLATES, GLASS, TIN, AND FILM, TO THE DIGITAL IMAGING THAT IS NOW,
PHOTOGRAPHY HAS CHANGED THE WAY WE LIVE. THERE ISN'T A PRINTING PROCESS TODAY THAT DOES NOT INVOLVE THE PHOTOGRAPHIC PROCESS. MY CAMERA COLECTION
REPRESENTS THE METHODS BY WHICH MAN HAS TAKEN PICTURES SINCE ABOUT 1850, CONSISTING OF NEALY 1600 MODELS. IN OUR STUDIO, DIGITAL IMAGING IS DONE
AS WELL AS FILM; HOWEVER, I PRIZE FILM AS BEING LONGER-LASTING AND VERY
MUCH PREFER IT WHEN SPEED IS NOT OF THE ESSENCE.

THE ZX-5n IS, AT FIRST GLANCE, AN AUTO-FOCUS, AUTOMATIC-EXPOSURE BODY,
WHICH EVEN HAS AUTOMATIC FILM SPEED SETTING, AUTOMATIC EXPOSURE-BRACKET-
ING, AUTO-FILM ADVANCE, AND AUTO-FILM REWINDING. ONE MIGHT THINK THAT
THE CAMERA IS ONLY MEANT TO TAKE CONTROL OF CREATING THE ENTIRE PHOTO.

FOR THOSE WHO WISH TO CREATE ON THEIR OWN, COMPLETE EXPOSURE CONTROL
IS PLAINLY VISIBLE, JUST ABOUT ALL OVER ITS WELL-DESIGNED BODY. THE SHUTTER SPEED CONTROL APPEARS AS AN "ANALOG' KNOB SHOWING SPEEDS FROM 2 SECONDS TO 1/2000TH OF ONE SECOND PLUS "B" AND OF COURSE THE OLD RELIABLE "A" FOR AUTOMATIC. APERATURE SELECTION IS RIGHT THERE ON ALL OF THE LENSES MADE FOR PENTAX, AS WELL AS THE "A" FOR AUTOMATIC APERATURE USERS, OF COURSE. THE MANUAL FOCUS SHARES THE SAME SWITCH AS THE AUTO-FOCUS. THE METERING ALLOWS FOR THREE CHOICES: SPOT, AVERAGE, AND MULTI-SEGMENTED MATRIX (AN UNCANNILY ACCURATE MEASUREMENT OF LIGHT THAT HAS WORKED WELL FOR ME FOR OVER 90% MY LIGHTING SITUATIONS.) THE ADVANCE HAS SINGLE AND CONTINUOUS DRIVE, SELF-TIMER, AND TWO CHOICES FOR AUTOBRACKET-
ING THREE EXPOSURES WITH ONE PRESS OF THE SHUTTER RELEASE.

IF THAT'S NOT ENOUGH, THERE IS A BUILT-IN FLASH THAT DOES A DECENT JOB FOR THOSE ROUTINE PICTURES, AND A UNIVERSAL (STANDARD) FLASH SHOE FOR
SHOE-MOUNT STROBE UNITS. I HAVE ALSO USED THE LARGER, MORE POWERFUL HANDLE-MOUNT OFF CAMERA STROBE UNITS WITH THE ZX-5n IN PROFESSIONAL
SITUATIONS WITH PERFECT RESULTS.

ONE COMMENT HERE REGARDING THE AUTO-FOCUS DESIGN USED BY PENTAX, IT IS
UNDOUBTEDLY THE FASTEST AND MOST ACCURATE TARGETING I HAVE USED. ALSO,
IT SEEMS TO DO BETTER IN SOMEWHAT LOWER LIGHT LEVELS THAN MOST OTHER
AUTO-FOCUS CAMERAS. IN MY EXPERIENCE AS A CAMERA STORE OWNER, I HAVE HAD IN MY HANDS JUST ABOUT EVERY AUTO-FOCUS CAMERA MODEL THAT HAS COME DOWN THE PIKE SINCE THE EARLY 80'S, AND CAN REALLY STATE THAT A FEW NIKON
MODELS -- NOT MOST OR ALL, SOME CANON MODELS, NO MINOLTA BODIES, NOR ANY
OTHER BRANDS HAVE COMPARED TO THE SPEED AND ACCURACY OF FOCUS ACQUISITION
OF MY TWO PENTAX ZX-5n (AND MY PENTAX MZ-S MODEL.) I NOTICED THAT PENTAX
BODIES WERE THE BEST SINCE AUTO-FOCUS FIRST APPEARED ON THE MARKET.

ALMOST FORGOT TO MENTION A COUPLE OF POINTS. THE SIZE OF THE FOCUS AREA IN THE FINDER CAN BE CHAGED WITH EASE, USING THE SWITCH I ON THE FRONT OF
THE BODY (NOT BY HAVING TO GO ON A BLIND SEARCH THROUGH SOME COMPLICATED
MENU OR OTHER.) NEXT THERE IS A DIAL IN PLAIN SIGHT ON THE TOP FOR FRONT-
LIGHT OR BACKLIGHT EXPOSING (EXPOSURE FACTOR CONTROL.) OH, ANOTHER THING,
THERE IS A DEPTH OF FIELD PREVIEW CONTROL RIGHT EXACTLY WHERE IT SHOULD
BE, IN FRONT, ON THE RIGHT.

SOMETHING SHOULD BE SAID ABOUT ERGONOMIC DESIGN. THERE HAVE BEEN SEVERAL
MODELS THAT SEEM TO HAVE BEEN EXTREMELY WELL THOUGHT OUT WITH REGARD TO
PROPER PLACEMENT OF OF CONTROLS. THE PENTAX ZX-5N IS ONE SUCH CAMERA. IT
BECOMES APPARENT TO JUST ABOUT ANYONE WHO HANDLES ONE.

I'M NOT DONE YET. THE EYEPIECE FEATURES A DIOPTRIC CORRECTION ADJUSTMENT
FOR USERS WHO WEAR GLASSES, ENABLING ONE TO REMOVE THE GLASSES AND TO
CLARIFY THE IMAGE IN THE FINDER WITH A SLIGHT PUSH OF A SLIDING CONTROL.
ONE CAN ALSO SEE 100% OF THE FINDER'S IMAGE BY HAVING THE EYE UP CLOSE
AND PERSONAL WITH THE EYEPIECE.

THE ISO OVERIDE ALLOWS THE PHOTOGRAPHER TO "RATE" THE FILM SPEED HIGHER
OR LOWER THAT IT IS ACTUALLY DESIGNATED FOR "PUSHING" AND "PULLING" FILM.
THIS IS ESPECIALLY HELPFUL WHEN SHOOTING BLACK & WHITE OR TRANSPARENCY
(SLIDE) FILMS.

THOSE WHO LIKE TO MAKE AN OCCASIONAL - OR FREQUENT - PANORAMIC FORMAT
PHOTOGRAPH WON'T BE LET DOWN. ALSO IN ITS PROPER LOCATION (RIGHT THUMB)
IS THE PANORAMA OR NORMAL TWO-POSITION SWITCH.

MY TWO CR-2 LITHIUM BATTERIES LAST ME AT LEAST A YEAR OR 30 TO 40 ROLLS
OF FILM. I TOOK IT TO SWITZERLAND ON ASSIGNMENT WITH FRESH BATTERIES,
USED IT TO SHOOT 32 ROLLS WITHOUT USING MY SPARE SET. THE ZX-5N WAS VERY
FAST-HANDLING, EVEN USING MY TRIPOD 90% OF THE TIME. SOMETIMES I DEPLOYED
THE QUARTZ DATE FEATURE WHEN APPROPRIATE (NOT FOR SCENIC PICTURES.) MOST
IMPORTANTLY, THEY WERE RUGGED. AS MANY TIMES AS I STOPPED SHORT IN MY
RENTAL CAR, CAUSING THE PENTAX TO SLIDE ONTO THE FLOOR OF THE VEHICLE,
NOT ONCE DID I NOTICE ANY PROBLEMS, AND I NEVER HAD TO REMOVE MY SECOND
BODY FROM ITS CASE.

FOR ANYONE WHO'D LIKE TO FIND A 35mm FILM CAMERA WITH WHICH TO TAKE UP PHOTOGRAPHY, IT IS THIS WRITER'S CONSIDERED OPINION THAT THE ZX-5N CAN
ENABLE THE BEGINNER OR THE ADVANCED PHOTOGRAPHER TO DO EXTREMELY WELL.
rows.title: PENTAX ZX5n 35MM SLR CAMERA

rows.text: I ENJOY ELVIS MOVIES. I THINK THE ONLY OTHER CATEGORY OF MOVIES I HAVE MORE OF OTHER THAN ELVIS PRESLEY MOVIES ARE MUSICALS AND BEACH MOVIES, FROM THE "50's AND 60's" OF COURSE. WHAT I WOULD LIKE TO KNOW IS WHY WAS THE MOVIE TITLED: "TICKLE ME"? THIS IS ONE OF MY FAVORITES OF HIS FILMS, BEING ONE OF THE FIRST I ENJOY WATCHING WHEN I WANT TO HAVE AN "ELVIS MOVIES DAY". I FIRST SAW THIS ONE BACK IN THE "90's" WHEN ONE OF THE CABLE STATIONS WAS HAVING AN "ELVIS WEEK" TO CELEBRATE HIS BIRTHDAY. I RECORDED IT, AND EVENTUALLY I BOUGHT IT ON VHS. I GUESS FOR THE LACK OF A BETTER TITLE, "TICKLE ME" WAS IT. THE MOVIE OPENS WITH "LONNIE BEALE" (ELVIS) ON A BUS HEADING TO A FICTITIOUS TOWN CALLED "ZUNI WELLS". HE WAS SUPPOSED TO MEET A FRIEND HE NAMED AS "PETE BULLMAN" WHO WAS SUPPOSED TO GET HIM A JOB, WORKING ON A RANCH. HE WAS THEN INFORMED THAT "PETE" HAD GOTTEN INTO A FIGHT AND QUIT. THEN BEING STRANDED WITHOUT A JOB HE LITERALLY HAD TO SING FOR HIS SUPPER. DO YOU THINK THIS IS WHERE THE TERM "SING FOR YOUR SUPPER" CAME FROM! ANYWAY, WHILE HE IS IN A LOCAL CLUB, SINGING, HE IS SPOTTED BY "VERA RADFORD", (JULIE ADAMS) SITTING WITH HER ESCORT & SWIMMING INSTRUCTOR AT HER RANCH, "BRAD BENTLEY", (EDWARD FAULKNER). "VERA" OFFERS HIM A JOB AFTER HE GETS INTO A FIGHT WITH ONE OF THE CUSTOMER'S WHOSE GIRL WAS COMING ONTO HIM, ON HER RANCH. HE ACCEPTS THE JOB, NOT KNOWING THE RANCH IS FOR THE "RECONDITIONING" OF CAREER WOMEN: ACTRESSES, BUSINESS WOMEN, AND MODELS. WHILE HE'S THERE HE GETS INVOLVED WITH "PAMELA MERITT" WHO HAS BEEN LOOKING FOR HER GRANDFATHER'S HIDDEN MONEY. SHE ONLY HAVE AN OLD LETTER THAT GIVES HER LITTLE OR NO DETAILS, EXCEPT THAT IT IS HIDDEN SOMEWHERE IN AN OLD GHOST TOWN. APPARENTLY, SOMEONE ELSE IS ALSO INTERESTED IN PAM'S TALE OF HER GRANDFATHER'S TREASURE BECAUSE SHE IS ATTACKED TWICE AND RESCUED BOTH TIMES BY "LONNIE". "LONNIE" ALSO GETS HIMSELF INTO HOT WATER WHEN HE IS CONSTANTLY BREAKING INTO SONG EVERYTIME THE "RANCH GUESTS" ARE IN THE MIDDLE OF SOMETHING, SUCH AS A MASSAGE, OR A SWIMMING LESSON. ALL OF THE PERSONEL BEGAN COMPLAINING, BUT "PAM" SMOOTHS IT OUT FOR HIM TO "VERA" BUT THE OTHER PERSONEL STILL COMES DOWN HARD UNTIL "VERA" AGREES TO SPEAK WITH HIM ABOUT THE SITUATION. "BRAD" IS A BIT JEALOUS BECAUSE ALL OF THE LADIES ARE SMITTEN WITH "LONNIE", INCLUDING "PAM" WHOM HE SEEMS TO WANT HIMSELF. WHEN "LONNIE" GETS CAUGHT KISSING "VERA RADFORD", BY "PAM", SHE REFUSES TO SEE HIM ANYMORE. RODEO SEASON BEGINS AND "LONNIE" LEAVES THE RANCH TO CONTINUE ON WITH HIS PROFESSION, THAT OF A "CHAMPION RODEO RIDER". BUT HE CAN'T MAKE A DIME, BECAUSE HIS MIND IS ON "PAM". "STANLEY" SHOWS UP AT ONE OF THE RODEO LOCATIONS WHERE "LONNIE" WAS AND INFORMS HIM THAT "PAM" IS MISERABLE WITHOUT HIM, AND WHY HASN'T HE GOTTEN IN TOUCH WITH HER. "LONNIE" PULLS A LETTER OUT OF HIS POCKET AND SHOWS IT TO HIM INFORMING HIM THAT HE'S BEEN WRITING AND CALLING BUT "PAM" KEEPS HANGING UP ON HIM AND SENDING HIS LETTERS BACK. "STANLEY" THEN SUGGEST TO HIM THAT HE SHOULD JUST TELL HER OFF AND "LONNIE" AGREES AND RETURNS WITH "STANLEY" TO THE RANCH, ONLY TO CATCH "PAM" TRYING TO GET AWAY IN HER JEEP. THEY BOTH THEN PURSUE HER TO THE GHOST TOWN WHERE SHE HAD BEEN SNEAKING OFF TO, LOOKING FOR HER GRANDFATHER'S FORTUNE. (DOES ANYONE CATCH "LONNIE" LOOKING RIGHT INTO THE CAMERA, AS HE AND "STANLEY CHARGES OFF IN HOT PURSUIT AFTER "PAM"?)THEY ALL GET CAUGHT IN A FLASH FLOOD AND WIND UP HAVING TO SPEND THE NIGHT AT A RESTORED HOTEL. THEY DID NOT KNOW THAT THE MEN WHO HAD TRIED TO KIDNAP "PAM" TO GET THE LETTER, LEADING TO HER GRANDFATHER'S FORTUNE, HAD FOLLOWED THEM TO THE GHOST TOWN TOO. A STRING OF COMEDIES THEN BEGIN TO HAPPEN. FIRST "STANLEY" ENCOUNTERS A "GHOST" IN A ROCKING CHAIR, WHO IN AN EERIE VOICE TELLS HIM TO GET OUT OF HIS ROOM, A SLIDING PANEL WHERE A FIST COMES OUT AND SOCKS HIM IN THE NOSE, AND GHOSTS AT HIS ROOM'S DOOR AND AT THE WINDOWS. "LONNIE" THEN GETS BUSY ANSWERING MANIACAL SCREAMS FROM BOTH "PAM" AND "STANLEY". "PAM" IS ONCE AGAIN ASSAULTED BY SOMEONE IN A GHOSTLEY MASK AND THE CONTENTS OF HER PURSE IS STOLEN. IT'S "LONNIE" TO THE RESCUE AGAIN, AS HE SHOWS HOW SKILLFUL OF A FIGHTER HE IS AND KNOCKS THE GUY OUT. IT TURNS OUT TO BE "ADOLF" THE CHEF AT "VERA RADFORD'S" RANCH. THEN PUTS AN END TO THE REST OF THE GHOSTLEY CLAN BY TRICKING THEM INTO FALLING INTO A MUD BATH, OBVIOUSLY AN UNFINISHED PART OF THE HOTEL. WHEN "STANLEY" ACCIDENTALLY FALLS THRU THE CEILING OF THE CELLAR, VIA STEPPING OUT OF THE SAME DOOR THAT LANDED THE "GHOSTS" INTO THE MUD BATH, LITTLE DID HE KNOW HE HAD FALLEN INTO WHERE THE "TREASURE" WAS. "LONNIE" AND "PAM" HURRIES TO HIS RESCUE, WHEN THEY SPOT A TRUNK WITH THE INITIALS "MW" ON IT. "STANLEY" PULLS A CROWBAR FROM THE WALL TO PRY OPEN THE TRUNK, PULLING A PIECE OF WALL AWAY, RELEASING THE MONEY FROM IT'S HIDING PLACE. THE SHERIFF THEN ARRIVES, DEMANDS THEY HAND OVER THE MONEY TO HIM. HE IS DISARMED WHEN "PAM" HITS HIM OVER THE HEAD, AND THE MOVIE ENDS WITH THEM GETTING MARRIED. "STANLEY" ACCIDENTALLY WINDS UP IN TOW, RIDING IN A BIG WASH TUB THAT WAS CONNECTED TO THE CAR, THAT HE HAD FALLEN INTO. "LONNIE" AND "PAM" ARE ENDS THE MOVIE WITH ONE OF HIS SONGS AND HE AND "PAM" RIDES OFF INTO THE SUNSET TO THEIR HONEYMOON. I GAVE THIS MOVE FOUR STARS BECAUSE IN MY OPINION IT IS ONE OF ELVIS BETTER ONE'S. I NOTICED ON THE LINER NOTES, IT CLAIMS THERE ARE TEN SONGS ON THE SOUNDTRACK. I HAVE ONLY COUNTED NINE. MAYBE THAT WAS A TYPING ERROR. NEVERTHELESS, THERE ARE ONLY NINE SONGS. EVERY SONG IS WORTH LISTENING TO. THIS MOVIE AND THE SOUNDTRACK IS A MUST BUY. DON'T LEAVE THIS SITE WITHOUT PURCHASING EITHER THE MOVIE AND OR THE SOUNDTRACK.
rows.title: WHY IS THIS MOVIE TITLED: "TICKLE ME?"

THIS SUPERB 2-CD SET FEATURES THE AMADEUS WINDS DELIVERING A SPELLBINDING PERFORMANCE OF MOZART'S WIND SEXTETS WITH HIS MOST SERENE SERENADES AND DIVERTIMENTI COMPOSED AS ENTERTAINMENT MUSIC!

THE AMADEUS WINDS ARE RENOWNED AS ONE OF THE WORLD'S TOP RATED PERIOD INSTRUMENT CHAMBER MUSIC ENSEMBLES AND THEY DELIVER A WORLD CLASS PERFORMANCE OF MOZART'S WIND SERENADES AND DIVERTIMENTI ON THIS 2-CD SET THE WAY MOZART WOULD HAVE EXPECTED THEM TO BE PLAYED AND TO BE HEARD! SOFTER THAN MODERN CLASSICAL INSTRUMENTS, THE SOUND QUALITY OF THE AMADEUS WINDS'S PERIOD INSTRUMENTS EXHIBITS CHAMBER MUSICAL PERFECTION SO THE AUDIENCE HEARS EVERY MUSICAL NOTE COMPOSED BY MOZART.

MOZART'S SERENADE GRAN PARTITA K.361 HAS BEEN REGARDED FOR THE LAST 250 YEARS AS ONE OF HIS GREATEST CLASSICAL MUSIC MASTERPIECES. THERE IS A MAGICAL MOMENT IN THE FILM AMADEUS IN WHICH THE VILLAN ANTONIO SALIERI LISTENS FOR THE FIRST TIME TO MOZART'S GRAN PARTITA K.361. SALIERI'S TEAR JERKING DESCRIPTION OF GRAN PARTITA'S THIRD MOVEMENT ADAGIO IS QUOTED AS FOLLOWS: "ON THE PAGE IT LOOKED NOTHING. THE BEGINNING SIMPLE, ALMOST COMIC. JUST A PULSE - BASSOONS AND BASSET HORNS - LIKE A RUSTY SQUEEZEBOX. THEN SUDDENLY - HIGH ABOVE IT - AN OBOE, A SINGLE NOTE, HANGING THERE UNWAVERING, TILL A CLARINET TOOK OVER AND SWEETENED IT INTO A PHRASE OF SUCH DELIGHT! THIS WAS NO COMPOSITION BY A PERFORMING MONKEY! THIS WAS A MUSIC I HAD NEVER HEARD. FILLED WITH SUCH LONGING, SUCH UNFULFILLABLE LONGING, IT HAD ME TREMBLING. IT SEEMED TO ME THAT I WAS HEARING A VOICE OF GOD."

ABOUT MOZART'S DIVERTIMENTI & SERENADES ENTERTAINMENT MUSIC
IN THE 18TH CENTURY, ONE OF MOZART'S SPECIALTIES WAS COMPOSING FESTIVE ENTERTAINMENT MUSIC CALLED DIVERTIMENTI AND SERENADES TO BE PLAYED AS BACKGROUND MUSIC BY A SMALL CHAMBER MUSIC ENSEMBLE AT OUTDOOR SOCIAL EVENTS SUCH AS NAME DAYS, BIRTHDAYS, NEW YEAR'S FESTIVITIES, WEDDINGS, AND SCHOOL GRADUATION CELEBRATIONS WHERE PARTY GUESTS ENJOYING A DRINKS AND MEALS. THE WELL-TO-DO PATRON'S OF MOZART'S ENTERTAINMENT MUSIC [ALSO CALLED CHAMBER MUSIC] WERE USUALLY THE ARISTOCRACY IN MOZART'S NATIVE SALZBURG AND VIENNA. AT SOME ENTERTAINMENT MUSIC OCCASIONS, MOZART HIMSELF OFTEN PLAYED THE SOLO VIOLIN, VIOLA, AND PIANO PASSAGES OF HIS DIVERTIMENTI AND SERENADES.

ALTHOUGH MOZART'S DIVERTIMENTI AND SERENADES WERE FUN LIGHT HEARTED CHAMBER MUSIC UNLIKE HIS SERIOUS SYMPHONIES AND CONCERTOS WHICH WERE INTENDED TO BE PERFORMED IN A THEATRE OR CONCERT ROOM, MOZART'S ENTERTAINMENT MUSIC [ALSO CALLED CHAMBER MUSIC] OFFERS CLASSICAL MUSIC ENTHUSIASTS THE SAME BEAUTY, CHARM, AND UNIQUE QUALITY AS HIS MORE SERIOUS MATURE CLASSICAL WORKS.

THE HUGE ADVANTAGE OF LISTENING TO MOZART'S DIVERTIMENTI AND SERENADES PERFORMED BY A SMALL CHAMBER MUSIC ENSEMBLE VERSUS A LARGE ORCHESTRA IS THE SUPERIOR PERFECT SOUND OF PERIOD INSTRUMENTS HEARD BY THE AUDIENCE THAT IS TONALLY EXCELLENT, CLOSE UP, AND NATURALLY BALANCED!

ABOUT CHRISTOPHER HOGWOOD & THE ACADEMY OF ANCIENT MUSIC [AAM]
CHRISTOPHER HOGWOOD IS A WORLD RENONWED ENGLISH CONDUCTOR, CONCERTMASTER, HARPSICHORDIST, WRITER, AND SCHOLAR OF MUSIC. IN 1973, CHRISTOPHER HOGWOOD FOUNDED THE ACADEMY OF ANCIENT MUSIC [AAM] IN LONDON ENGLAND AS THE WORLD'S FIRST PERIOD-INSTRUMENT CLASSICAL MUSIC ORCHESTRA THAT IS RATED #1 BY CLASSICAL MUSIC AUDIOPHILES. SINCE 1973, THE ACADEMY OF ANCIENT MUSIC HAS PERFORMED 500 CONCERTS ACROSS SIX CONTINENTS AND OVER RECORDED OVER 250 CLASSICAL MUSIC CDS CLEARLY DEMONSTRATES THE ACADEMY OF ANCIENT MUSIC'S PRE-EMINENCE AS THE WORLD'S FINEST PERIOD INSTRUMENT CLASSICAL MUSIC ORCHESTRA!

ABOUT AMADEUS WINDS CHAMBER ENSEMBLE
FOUNDED IN 1983 BY THE FAMED OBOIST STEPHEN HAMMER TO PERFORM MOZART'S MOST POPULAR CHAMBER MUSIC ON PERIOD INSTRUMENTS, THE AMADEUS WINDS CHAMBER ENSEMBLE MUSICIANS ARE:
*STEPHEN HAMMER & MARC SCHACHMAN [OBOE]
*ERIC HOEPRICH & LAWRENCE MCDONALD [CLARINET]
*DENNIS GODBURN & ROBIN HOWELL [BASSOON]
*LOWELL GREER & WILLIAM PURVIS [HORN]

rows.text:
I BOUGHT THIS TENT TO TAKE MY FAMILY OF FOUR TO THE BEACH SO WE CAN HAVE A SHELTER TO PROTECT OURSELVES, SPECIALLY THE LITTLE ONES, FROM THE SUN WHENEVER IT GETS TOO STRONG.

IT'S PRETTY GOOD. IT OPENS UP IN SECONDS AND CAN BE INSTALED ALSO PRETTY QUICKLY ON THE BEACH AS LONG AS THERE IS NOT MUCH WIND, BUT I GUESS THIS WOULD ALSO BE TRUE FOR ANY TENT AT ALL.

BEFORE I RECEIVED THIS TENT I READ SOME USERS REVIEWS SAYING THAT IT WOULD COLAPSE AND ALSO THAT THE JOINTS ON THE POLES WILL BREAK WHEN INSTALED IN A WINDY PLACE. WELL, I HAVE TO SAY THAT WHEN I GOT IT I TRIED IT FIRST AT HOME AND, BEING A CIVIL ENGINEER AND A HANDY MAN, I DECIDED NO TO WAIT UNTIL THE JOINTS BROKE, SINCE THEY DO LOOK THAT THIS COULD REALLY HAPPEN, AND WENT AHEAD WITH MAKING SOME ALUMINUM REINFORCENTS FOR THEM. NOT THE FANCIEST ONES BUT THEY WILL CERTAINLY ABSORV MOST OF THE EFFORT PLACED ON A JOINT WHEN WIND HITS THE TENT. I BELIEVE THAT THERE IS A VERY EASY WAY TO MAKE A PRETTY EASY TO INSTALLL REINFORCEMENT FOR THIS TENT'S JOINTS SO THEY GET PROTECTED AND CAN WITHSTAND ANY WIND SITUATION BUT THIS WOULD BE FOR ABO GEAR TO CONSIDER. ALSO, RELATED TO THIS, ABO HAS INCLUDED FOUR PEACES OF ROPE, APROXIMATELY 6 1/2 FOOT EACH, AND FOUR NOTCHES SEWN TO THE TENT AT MID HEIGHT SO IT CAN BE SECURED TO THE SAND USING THE ALSO SUPPLIED STAKES. THIS IS A MUST ON WINDY SITUATIONS AND I WOULD SAY THAT, MOST OF THE TIMES, IT WOULD BE A MUST WHEN ON THE BEACH SINCE MOST OF THEM HAVE A LOT OF WIND, BUT I WOULD RECOMEND TO ATTACH THE ROPE TO THE POLE ITSELF AT EACH NODE INSTEAD OF USING THE SEWN NOTCHES SINCE THIS CAN BE DONE IN THIS THIS PARTICULAR TENT. I USED THE SEWN NOTCHES TO SECURE THE TENT ON THE BEACH AND, UNFORTUNATELLY, MY WIFE RAN OVER ONE OF THEM AND SOME TENT SEAM GOT BROKEN. ALSO SECURING THE TENT TO THE SAND AT NODE HEIGHT WILL TRANSFORM A SUBSTANCIAL AMOUNT OF FLEXURAL EFFORT AT THE NODE INTO SHEAR EFFORT (THIS PART FOR PEOPLE KNOWING ABOUT EFFORTS ONLY), WICH WILL ALSO HELP KEEP THE NODES FROM BREAKING DUE TO WIND HITTING THE TENT.

THE FIRST TIME I TOOK THE TENT TO THE BEACH ACTUALLY THERE WAS A LOT OF WIND AND I DIDN'T HAD ANY PROBLEM SINCE I USED THE NODE'S REINFORCEMENTS THAT I MADE AND ALSO SECURED THE SEWN NOTCHES TO THE SAND USING THE ROPE AND STAKES SUPPLIED WITH THE TENT. THAT DAY I HAD ANOTHER TENT BESIDE THE INSTENT MAX. THIS SECOND TENT WAS ONLY SECURED TO THE BEACH USING THE FLOOR GEARS AND IT KEPT BENDING DOWN ALMOST TO FLOOR LEVEL DUE TO WIND. THIS WASN'T THE CASE WITH THE INSTENT MAX.

FOR TENTS USING THE OLD POLES MECHANISM IT WOULD BE EASIER TO SET UP IN A WINDY SITUATION SINCE YOU CAN ATTACH THE FLOOR OF THE TENT TO THE SAND FIRST AND THEN OPEN IT UP, BUT WITH INSTENT MAX THIS IS NOT POSSIBLE SINCE GEARS ON EACH CORNER OF THE TENT FLOOR WILL LAY DOWN ON THE BEACH VERTICALLY INSTEAD OF HORIZONTALLY BEFORE OPENNING THE TENT SO, IN ORDER TO ATTACH THE TENT FLOOR TO THE SAND, FIRST YOU MUST OPEN THE TENT, WICH WILL MAKE IT MORE DIFFICULT TO SECURE IF WINDY, AND THEN ATTACH IT TO THE SAND; NEVERTHELESS I BELIEVE THAT IT CAN STILL BE DONE EASIER THAN WITH THE OLD POLES MECHANISN.

I DIDN'T HAD ANY PROBLEMS WITH THE TENT COLLAPSING OVER ME AND, FOR THIS, I DIDN'T TOOK ANY MEASURES DIFFERENT THAN TO TIE BOW WITH THE ROPE AT THE TOP OF THE TENT WHICH IS EXACTLY WHAT THE MANUAL SAIS. IT IS PRETTY QUICK AND EASY TO DO. SAND POCKETS ARE ALSO VERY USEFULL SINCE THEY KEEP THE FLOOR OF THE TENT PRETTY WELL SECURED TO THE BEACH.

ALSO, FOR THE MOST SUN PROTECTION BOTH TENT DOORS SHOULD BE PLACED ONE BESIDE EACH OTHER INSTEAD OF ONE IN THE FRONT AND THE OTHER ONE IN THE BACK OF THE TENT AS IT IS RIGHT NOW.

ALSO, THERE IS A WARNING AT THE END OF THE MANUAL SAYIN "WARNING: DO NOT USE IN STRONG WINDS. THIS PRODUCT IS NOT A WIND SHELTER. ABO GEAR ACCEPTS NO RESPONSIBILITY FOR MISUSE OF THIS PRODUCT". I GOT, IN SOME WAY, DISSAPOINTED WHEN I SAW THIS. IT IS SIMPLY NOT THE CASE IN MOST OF THE BEACHES AND THIS IS SUPPOSED TO BE A BEACH TENT.

BOTTOM LINE

ON THE UP SIDE

I REALLY LIKE THE QUICK SETTING MECHANISM IT IS PRETTY PRETTY GOOD

PRETTY QUICK AND EASY TO SET UP

CAN BE SECURED TO THE BEACH QUICK AND EFFICIENTLY EVEN ON WINDY SITUATIONS

YOU'LL HAVE MORE TIME TO ENJOY THE BEACH WITH YOUR LOVED ONES USSING THIS TENT

EASY TO FOLD BACK WHEN NOT ON WINDY SITUATIONS (ME, I JUST WRAPPED IT UP AS FAST AS I COULD AND PLACED IN MY CAR'S TRUNK. BACK IN THE HOUSE I OPENED IT UP AGAIN, CLEANED IT AND FOLD IT BACK INTO IT'S BAG)

ON THE DOWN SIDE

I BELIEVE NODES ARE WEAK AND WILL BREAK, AS READ IN OTHER REVIEWS, IF NOT REINFORCED (I HAVE TO ACCEPT I DIDN'T GAVE THE NODES A CHANCE TO BREAK BEFORE REINFORCING THEM. I THINK IT WAS BETTER THIS WAY)

BOTH TENT DOORS SHOULD BE ONE BESIDE THE OTHER INSTEAD OF ONE IN THE FRONT AND ONE IN THE BACK OF THE TENT (THIS IS FOR MOST SUN PROTECTION)

GOT DISSAPOINTED WHEN I SAW THE WARNING NOTE IN THE MANUAL ABOUT PLACING THE TENT IN STRONG WIND SITUATIONS (MOST OF THE BEACHES HAVE A LOT OF WIND. !BOOOOO.....!)
rows.title: A TOP PRODUCT THAT MUST BE IMPROVED

rows.text:
MY FAVORITE TRILBY MOVIE IS 1931s SVENGALI (INCLUDED IN THIS DVD WITH THE 1955 MOVIE). THE 1955 VERSION IS CLOSEST TO THE BOOK FROM THE 1800s. THE 1955 HAS GREAT ACTING BUT BILLEE IS WRITTEN FAR LESS SYMPATHETHIC THEN HE IS PORTRAYED IN THE BOOK AND THE 1931 MOVIE. THE 1983 FILM WITH PETER OTOOL AND JODIE FOSTER HAS NEXT TO NOTHING TO DO WITH THE BOOK OR ALL OF THE PREVIOUS MOVIES, BUT IS ENJOYABLE.
THE BOOK IS MOSTLY EXPOSITORY PROSE WITH LITTLE ACTION AND DIALOGUE, BUT I LIKE IT. I LAUGHED SEVERAL TIMES. THERE IS A LOT OF FRENCH IN IT WHICH I DIDN'T UNDERSTAND. THE AUTHOR WROTE IT BEFORE THEATRICAL MOVIES BECAME A BIG THING AT THE TURN OF THE CENTURY.
BECAUSE OF THIS, THE SCREENWRITERS HAD A LOT OF FREEDOM. THE GREAT SCENES OF THE 1931 FILM, LIKE SVENGALI'S HANDLING OF HIS PREVIOUS VICTIM, AND THE BATH SCENES WERE NOT IN THE BOOK AT ALL, AND YET THEY ARE AMONGST THE BEST PARTS OF THE FILM, BECAUSE THEY CONTRAST GOOD LOVING PEOPLE WITH THOSE THAT PRACTICE WICKEDNESS (IE: THE SVENGALI'S, COSSUTIUS'S, AND JEZEBEL'S OF LIFE). THE LIGHTHEARTED INTRODUCTION OF TRILBY TO THE 3 MUSKETEERS OF THE BRUSH, SVENGALI'S HYPNOTISM TO TAKE AWAY TRILBY'S HEADACHE, AND HOW HE TOOK CONTROL OF TRILBY, ARE ALLUDED TO BUT NOT SPELLED OUT IN THE BOOK. THE BOOK TALKED OF HIS MESMERISM. THE MOVIE HAD THE 3 MUSKETEERS WARN TRILBY ABOUT SVENGALI'S HYPNOTISM. THE BOOK DID NOT REVEAL MESMERISM UNTIL AFTER TRILBY'S DEATH, BY GECKO, SVENGALI'S ASSISTANT AND FAVORITE VIOLINIST. UNFORTUNATELY, THE 1931 MOVIE DID NOT INCLUDE TWO IMPORTANT SCENES: 1) BILLEE'S MOTHER VERBALLY CRUSHING TRILBY'S SELF ESTEEM AND CAUSING HER TO DISAPPEAR FROM FIANCE BILLEE AND FRIENDS LIVES. THIS LEFT TRILBY UNPROTECTED AGAINST SVENGALI'S SELFISH PLANS TO CONTROL HER IN ORDER TO GET RICHES AND FAME. 2) NEAR THE END, BILLEE'S MOTHER EXPRESSING SORROW AT RUINING THEIR LIVES, AND ALSO TALKING TO TRILBY ABOUT GOD. THE 1955 MOVIE ALSO DIDN'T COVER #2, NOR DID EITHER MOVIE DEAL WITH TRILBY'S AND BILLEE'S PROLONGED SICKNESS, DEATH, AND GECKO'S REVELATION OF WHAT HAPPENED. I FEEL THAT THE SCREENPLAYS NEEDED TO REVEAL SVENGALI'S LIFE DESTROYING, SELFISH, AND GREEDY WAYS TO INCREASE THE EMOTIONAL IMPACT OF THE INJUSTICE OF PEOPLE (WITCHES IF YOU WILL) THAT DECEIVE, DESTROY, AND CONTROL PEOPLE TO EVERYONE'S HURT OR DESTRUCTION THAT IS INVOLVED.
SVENGALI IS REALLY MY LIFE STORY. PLEASE READ MY REVIEW OF SVENGALI 1931 AND THE WIZARD OF OZ. HAVING NOW COMPLETED THE BOOK AND SEEING THAT MY FAVORITE 1931 VERSION IS LOOSELY BASED ON THE BOOK, I ALL THE MORE WANT TO REDO THE 1931 MOVIE ALMOST EXACTLY AS IT IS WITH MORE SCENES, AND WRITE AT LEAST ONE SEQUEL!
IN MY LIFE, THERE IS THE DESTRUCTIVE WITCH, AND THE PEOPLE THAT BELIEVE THIS DECEPTIVE FRAMER THAT DESTROYS PEOPLE WHILE STEALING FROM US. IN THE CASE OF "TRILBY," THE BOOK, BILLEE'S MOTHER APPEARS TO BE THE TYPE THAT BELIEVES WHATEVER NEGATIVE EVIDENCE SHE RECEIVES. THE AUTHOR DESCRIBES BOTH TRILBY AND BILLEE AS ANGELS. THE MOTHER MANAGES TO REMOVE 'ANGEL" TRILBY'S SUPPORT SYSTEM WITHOUT ANY APPARENT HELP FROM SVENGALI. THE SVENGALI'S OF LIFE BENEFIT FROM PEOPLE LIKE BILLEE'S MOTHER THAT BELIEVE OR ASSUME BAD THINGS WITHOUT COMMUNICATING IN PRIVATE GENTLY AT PROPER LENGTH WITH THOSE THAT THEY HAVE ISSUE WITH. MY WITCH HAS THE SVENGALI POWER TO DECEIVE AND CONTROL PEOPLE AGAINST THEIR WILL, THE COSSUTIUS PERSONALITY THAT GETS THEIR JOLLIES OFF OF INFLICTING SUFFERING ON OTHERS (WATCH SPARTACUS: VENGEANCE), AND THE POWER OF THE BIBLE'S EVILEST WITCH, JEZEBEL (REFER TO 1KINGS 21).

IN THE MOVIE, "EVIL GENIUS," ALSO STARRING JOHN BARRYMORE, MARIAN MARSH, AND LUIS ALBERNI, JOHN PLAYS A MANIPULATIVE MAN THAT RAISES A BOY THAT HE BASICALLY KIDNAPPED 15 YEARS BEFORE, CONTROLS HIM, SEPARATES HIM FROM THE TRILBY OF THIS MOVIE, NANA, ANOTHER INWARDLY AND OUTWARDLY BEAUTIFUL FEMALE THAT IS A PERFORMER, AND JOHN'S CHARACTER TAKES TO BED EACH PERFORMER THAT WANTS FAME, WITH THE SAME PREDICTABLE RESULTS: THE MONSTER DAMAGES MANY LIVES AND DESTROYS HIS OWN.
WHEN ARE THE EVIL WITCHES GOING TO LEARN THAT WHAT YOU SOW ON THIS WORLD, GOD PROMISES THAT YOU ARE GOING TO REAP? THAT EVERY THOUGHT AND ACTION WILL SOONER OR LATER COME UNDER GOD'S JUDGEMENT? THOSE THAT ACCEPT JESUS AS THEIR LORD AND SAVIOR AND OBEY HIS COMMANDS WILL BE REWARDED WITH ETERNAL BLISSFUL LIFE IN HEAVEN! IT IS BETTER TO SUFFER FOR RIGHTEOUSNESS ON THIS WORLD, THAN IT IS TO DENY THE GOD THAT LOVES YOU AND WILL REWARD YOU SOONER OR LATER.
rows.title: THE ENDS OF EVIL GENIUS'S

rows.text:
I purchased this item on February 22, 2018. I WAITED A LITTLE BIT BEFORE REVIEWING IT DUE TO A FEW ISSUES I HAD PLUS I WANTED TO SEE HOW IT HELD UP OVER A LITTLE BIT OF TIME.

INITIAL THOUGHT UPON FIRST ARRIVAL IN FEBRUARY/MARCH:

I HAD TO HELP THE DELIVERY GUY UNLOAD IT BECAUSE IT WAS WAY TOO HEAVY FOR JUST HIM - EVEN THE BOX SAID TEAM LIFT.

***ITS SUPER HEAVY***

I WAS A MAINTENCE WOMAN WORKER FOR MANY YRS AT A TRUCK STOP AND WAS USED TO VERY HEAVY LIFTING OF WELL OVER 100 POUNDS BY MYSELF WITHOUT STRUGGLING AT ALL TO DO IT.

THE ITEM DESCRIPTION STATED IT WAS ONLY 90 POUNDS BUT I AM TELLING YOU IT IS A LOT HEAVIER THEN THAT. THE GUY COULDN'T GET IT OUT OF THE DELIVERY TRUCK. I HAD TO JUMP IN HIS TRUCK AND BOTH OF US COULD BARELY LIFT IT.

DO NOT BE SCARED OFF BY THE WEIGHT - SOMETIMES QUALITY WEIGHS MORE - THATS MY NEW PICKUP LINE AND EXCUSE NOW AFTER HAVING 4 KIDS :) KIDDING HA HA

ANYWAYS THIS SET IS AIR TIGHT VACCUMED IN THE BOX AND WHILE WE ALL KNOW WHEN SOMETHING IS AIR TIGHT VACUMM SEALED IT WILL POOF OUT AND EXPAND, BUT LET ME TELL YOU THIS NOW DO NOT CUT THE PLASTIC TO OPEN IT BY ANY WINDOWS. WHILE I KNEW IT WOULD POP OUT AND POOF UP I DIDN'T REALIZE JUST HOW MUCH OR HOW FAST IT WOULD DO THIS UPON OPENING IT. I HAVE MY BED BY THE WINDOW AND I WENT FROM JUST A MATTRESS ON THE GROUND TO THIS AMAZING BED BECAUSE WITH 4 KIDS I ALWAYS GET THEIR NEEDS AHEAD OF MINE, BUT I DECIDED AFTER 5 YRS OF BASICLY SLEEPING ON THE FLOOR (OLD MATRESS WAS SO THIN AND FLAT) THAT I NEEDED AND DESERVED A GOOD BED.

SO I PLACED DOWN THE BOX SPRINGS THAT CAME WITH THIS (NEVER HAD ANY BEFORE) THEY WERE SIMPLE TO DO- IT IS LITERALLY 2 TWIN SIZED BOX SPRINGS TOGETHER BUT SEPERATE ( YOU COULD BUY 2 TWIN MATTRESSES AND HAVE 2 BEDS SINCE THESE ARE 2 TWIN BOX SPRINGS THAT SIMPLY SLIDE AGAINST EACHOTHER TO FORM THE CALI KING SIZE FRAME THAT I BOUGHT) (I STOOD OLD CALI MATRESS STRAIGHT UP AND SLID AWAY FROM WHERE IT WAS) THESE BOX SPRING HAVE A HINGE AND LITTERALLY UNFOLD AND GO FLAT TO FORM A TWIN BOX SPRING - THERES 2 TWIN BOZ SPRINGS THAT PUSH AGAINST EACH OTHER TO MAKE THE CALI BOX SPRING - NO CONNECTORS NO TOOLS.

WHILE THE BOX SPRINGS LITTERALLY UNFOLD WITH NO ASSEMBLY AT ALL THEY ARE TRASH - THEY ARE CHEAP MADE WITH MINIMAL CONSTRUCTION AND SIMPLY A PIECE OF FABRIC SEWN OVER IT. FOR $614 DOLLARS (PRICES CHANGE - THATS WHAT I SPENT AT THAT TIME) I EXPECTED QUALITY OR AT LEAST NOT CHEAPLY MADE BOX SPRINGS. I ABSOLUTLEY CANNOT RECOMEND THESE BOX SPRINGS DUE TO QUALITY LACKING. THEY WILL WORK OUT OK FOR ME FOR A SHORT TIME ( I WILL USE IT PROBABLY FOREVER - HECK I SLEPT ON ONLY A THIN MATRESS FOR 5 YRS ON THE FLOOR BASICLY HA HA HA), BUT I DO EXPECT THEM TO BREAK QUICKLY BECAUSE THEY FEEL LIKE THEY WILL PUSH THROUGH AND BREAK THE THIN WOOD FROM NORMAL USE AND PRESSURE OF WEIGHT LAYING/SLEEPING ON TOP OF IT PLUS DUE TO THE WEIGHT OF THE MATRESS WITHOUT EVEN BEING ON IT.

I HAVE KIDS AS MENTIONED AND MY YOUNGEST ARE 6 AND 8 YRS OLD. WHILE OBVIOUSLY KIDS SHOULD NEVER JUMP ON BEDS THEY SOMETIMES DO THIS EVEN AFTER BEING TOLD NOT TO - COMMON NOW WE AS PARENTS KNOW THE THINGS KIDS DO. AND LET ME JUST SAY IF THEY JUMP ON MY BED ONCE IT WILL CAUSE THE CHEAP THIN WOOD IN THE BOX SPRINGS TO BREAK AND IF THAT HAPPENS I WILL BE FORCED TO HAVE TO THROW THE BOX SPRINGS OUT BECAUSE IF NOT THE WOOD WILL STAB INTO THE MATTRESS ON TOP AND START TO TARE IT OR PUT A HOLE INTO IT.

BACK TO OPENING THE MATTRESS FROM THE PLASTIC BY THE WINDOW.

WHILE I KNEW BEING VACUUM SEALED WOULD POP OPEN AND PUFF UP I NEVER KNEW THE AMOUNT OF FORCE THIS WOULD ACTUALLY CAUSE. I WEIGH ABOUT 130 POUNDS AND AM IN PRETTY GOOD SHAPE, SO WHEN I STARTED OPENING THE PLASTIC TO RELEASE THE MATTRESS FROM THE VACUUM SEALED PLASTIC I PUT MY BODY/WEIGHT AGAINST IT AS I MADE A VERY SMALL SCISSORS CUT TO BEGIN TEARING THE PLASTIC. I HAVE BOUGHT VACUUM SEALED MATTRESSES BEFORE AND KNOW HOW YOU NEED TO ALLOW IT TO POP UP AND OUT SLOWLY. WELL THIS SMALL HOLE WAS ENOUGH TO CAUSE THE ENTIRE MATTRESS TO RIP FROM THE BAG WITH SUCH FORCE I KID YOU NOT IT THREW ME NOT ONLY AGAINST BUT THROUGH MY GLASS BEDROOM WINDOW BREAKING IT AND LITERALLY THROWING ME OUTSIDE THROUGH MY WINDOW AS I HAD THE BOX SPRINGS ON THE FLOOR AND THE MATTRESS ON TOP OPENING IT / SETTING IT UP. I AM FINE BUT MY WINDOW WASN'T. I ONLY GOT MAYBE 2 SMALL CUTS ON ME FROM THE GLASS. NO WORRIES BUT BEWARE DO NOT OPEN THIS NEAR ANY WINDOWS FOR REAL! LAST THING I EXPECTED WHILE BUYING AND SETTING UP A BED WAS THE NEED OF HAVING TO REPLACE A GLASS WINDOW. LUCKILY AS I SAID I AM FINE AND I LIVE FIRST FLOOR, COULD HAVE BEEN MUCH WORSE.

THE MATTRESS:

THE MATTRESS IS AMAZING! HANDS DOWN THE BEST MATTRESS I HAVE EVER HAD MY WHOLE LIFE AND THAT INCLUDES THE MANY MATTRESSES THAT I HAVE PURCHASED FOR MY KIDS OVER THE YRS. THE QUALITY OF THE MATTRESS FROM THICKNESS TO THE ACTUAL MATERIAL BEING DURABLE AND STRONG IS AMAZING. THE MATTRESS WAS MADE TO LAST. THE MATTRESS AND THE FACT I WOULD NEVER MAKE MYSELF LIFT THIS AGAIN WERE THE ONLY 2 REASONS THIS DID NOT GET RETURNED.

MY OVERALL IMPRESSION SUMMED UP:

BOX SPRINGS ARE COMPLETE JUNK
THE MATTRESS MAY THROW YOU THROUGH A GLASS WINDOW FROM VACUUM SEALED FORCE ERUPTING WHEN OPENING THE PLASTIC
THE QUALITY OF THE MATTRESS IS AMAZING

WOULD I RECOMEND THIS SET?

NO - I FEEL FOR $614 (WHAT I PD AT THE TIME - PRICES MAY CHANGE) I COULD HAVE GOTTEN A BETTER QUALITY SET.
rows.title: GREAT MATTRESS BAD BOX SPRINGS

rows.text:
I BOUGHT THIS UNIT 2 WEEKS. I GENERALLY LIKE CANON AND I DID DOWNLOAD AND READ THE USER MANUAL BEFORE I BOUGHT IT. THE LISTED FEATURES SEEMED TO MEET MY NEEDS, AND I HAVE A VERY LOW MONTHLY COPY OUTPUT, SO I DIDN'T NEED ANYTHING MORE HEAVY DUTY. BUT I WAS EXPECTING SOMETHING MORE THAN A SIMPLE OFFICE COPIER.
THE COPIER ITSELF WORKS WELL, AND THE ONLY COMPLAINT I HAVE IS THAT THE ADF AND COPY FUNCTION BOTH PRODUCE COPIES THAT ARE ROUTINELY OUT OF SQUARE AND PARALLEL WITH THE PAPER. ITS NOT SERIOUS, BUT IT IS ANNOYING. I USE THE COPIER FOR PRESENTATION PURPOSES AND I LIKE THE PRESENTATION COPIES TO BE CLEAN AND PRECISE. FOR MANY THIS MIGHT NOT BE IMPORTANT, BUT I WAS DISAPPOINTED. HOWEVER, THE GOOD NEWS IS THAT THE ADF DOES WORK RELIABLY. I HAVE HAD OTHER COPIERS WITH ADF's THAT NEEDED TO BE HAND FED MOST OF THE TIME. SO FAR I HAVE ONLY USED 20# BOND PAPER. I HAVE NOT TRIED OTHER WEIGHTS AND TEXTURES THAT THE MANUAL SAYS IT CAN HANDLE.
THE BAD NEWS, AND FOR ME IT IS VERY BAD NEWS, IS THAT THE COPIER DOCUMENTATION IS PATHETICALLY INCOMPLETE, AND THE PRINTER/SCANNER SOFTWARE AND DOCUMENTATION THAT COMES WITH THE D-550 IS INCOMPREHENSIBLE. I AM A RETIRED ARCHITECT WITH AN M.A. AND HAVE SPENT MOST OF MY ADULT LIFE WRITING DOCUMENTATION AND SPECIFICATION FOR LARGE SCALE PROJECTS. I AM EMBARRASSED TO ADMIT THAT I HAVE SPENT OVER 15 HOURS READING THE PRINTER/SCANNER DOCUMENTATION AND TRYING TO USE THE SOFTWARE, AND I STILL CANNOT PREDICT WHAT WILL COME OUT OF THE COPIER/PRINTER WHEN I CHANGE SOFTWARE PARAMETERS. AFTER APPROX 10 HOURS I GAVE UP ON THE DOCUMENTION AND WENT TO TRIAL AND ERROR. YOU KNOW: SET UP THE PARAMETERS; PRINT IT OUT; CHANGE 1 OR 2 PARAMETERS; PRINT IT OUT; SEE WHAT CHANGED. I HAVE USED ALMOST 2 REAMS OF PAPER (BOTH SIDES) TRYING TO UNDERSTAND THE UNDERLYING LOGIC OF THE SOFTWARE. I STILL HAVE NO CLUE. THERE ARE STILL COMMANDS ON THE DROPDOWN BOXES I CAN'T EVEN FIND IN THE DOCUMENTATION.
TO BE SPECIFIC - HERE IS ONE EXAMPLE OUT OF DOZENS: YOU CAN CROP A SCANNED IMAGE IN THE SOFTWARE, BUT SOMETIMES WHEN YOU PRINT THAT SCANNED IMAGE, THERE IS A VERY DARK VERTICAL LINE ON THE RIGHT SIDE OF PAGE WHERE IT WAS CROPPED. SOMETIMES NOT. ITS UNPREDICTABLE. THIS PROBLEM IS MENTIONED ONCE IN THE DOCUMENTATION, SO CANON IS AWARE OF IT. IT SAYS IT CAN BE ELIMINATED BY USING 2 NAMED FUNCTIONS. THE FUNCTIONS ARE LISTED, BUT I WASN'T ABLE TO FIND THEM ANYWHERE IN THE DROPDOWN BOXES. PERHAPS, THOSE FUNCTIONS ARE ONLY FOR COPIERS WITH A MORE COMPLETE SOFTWARE PACKAGE? HOWEVER, THE DOCUMENTATION DOESN'T MENTION ANYTHING REGARDING DIFFERENT VERSIONS OF SOFTWARE. I WAS NEVER ABLE TO FIND THE FUNCTIONS, AND I WAS NEVER ABLE TO EITHER PREDICT OR ELIMINATE THE PROBLEM. ESSENTIALLY IT RENDERED THE CROPPING FUNCTION OF THE SCANNER UNUSEABLE.
THIS IS ONE OF THE SIMPLER FRUSTRATIONS.
ALSO, DON'T EVEN TRY TO USE OR UNDERSTAND ANY OF THE DOUBLE SIDED PRINT FUNCTIONS FROM THE SOFTWARE. I WAS NEVER ABLE TO GET A SINGLE DOUBLE SIDED COPY WITH CORRECT MARGINS, AND PROPERLY LINED UP ON THE FRONT AND BACK AFTER THE ABOVE MENTIONED 15 HOURS OF STUDY AND USE. I HAVE A STRONG SUSPICION THAT NO ONE AT CANON KNOWS HOW TO USE THE DOUBLE SIDED FUNCTIONS EITHER. (PLEASE NOTE: I AM NOT TALKING ABOUT THE DOUBLE SIDED FUNCTION OF THE COPIER. THAT WORKS WELL. ALL OF THE ABOVE REFERS TO THE SOFTWARE THAT CONTROLS SCANNING AND PRINTING FROM THE COMPUTER).
HAVING SOME EXPERIENCE WITH DOCUMENTION FOR LARGE SCALE PROJECTS, IN MY OPINION WHAT CANON HAS DONE IS JURY-RIG TOGETHER VARIOUS PARTS OF PREVIOUS, CLOSELY RELATED, SOFTWARE AND DOCUMENTATION EITHER TO SAVE SOME MONEY OR TO MEET SOME DEADLINE OR BOTH. IN THE PROCESS THEY DIDN'T BOTHER TO INTEGRATE OR STREAMLINE ANY OF THE PARTS AND ENDED UP WITH A KIND OF PUT-TOGTHER FRANKENSTEIN PACKAGE THAT SOMETIMES WORKS; SOMETIMES DOESN'T, AND SOMETIMES WORKS IN UNPREDICTABLE WAYS.
I SHOULD MENTION THAT I HAVE BEEN USING A CANONSCAN 9950F HIGH QUALITY FLATBED COLOR SCANNER FOR YEARS, WITH A VERSION OF ADOBE PHOTOSHOP FOR PRINT FUNCTIONS. THE TWO HAVE WORKED TOGETHER FLAWLESSLY. BOTH HAVE BEEN A PLEASURE TO USE. INTERSTINGLY, THE SCANNER CONTROL SCREEN FOR THE 9950F IS VIRTUALLY IDENTICAL TO THE SCREEN FOR THE D-550. THAT IS ONE OF THE REASONS THAT I AM AMAZED AT HOW BADLY THE D-550 SOFTWARE WORKS, AND WHY I THINK THAT CANON MAY HAVE JUST AD-HOC'D SOME POORLY FITTED PRINTER SOFTWARE ONTO THEIR EXISTING SCANNER SOFTWARE. IF THE 9950F HAD AN ADF, I WOULD TRY TO USE ITS SOFTWARE WITH THE D-550.
AGAIN, DON'T MISUNDERSTAND. THE COPIER ITSELF WORKS WELL. AND IF ALL YOU WANT IS A SIMPLE STANDARD OFFICE COPIER THAT MAKES STANDARD LETTER-SIZE ONE-SIDED AND TWO-SIDED COPIES, AND YOU KNOW YOU WILL NEVER REQUIRE ANYTHING ELSE, THEN THIS WILL WORK FOR YOU. IF YOU NEED ANYTHING MORE COMPLEX THAT INVOLVES A USB CABLE TO CONNECT THE D-550 TO YOUR COMPUTER, THEN GO ELSEWHERE.

rows.text:
SUBSTANCE ABUSE AND ADDICTIONS ARE KILLING OUR CHILDREN AND YOUR LOVED ONES, IN DROVES ON A DAILY BASIS, AND THE WORLD IS STILL IN DENIAL!!! IF THIS BOOK DOES NOT GET YOU RIGHT BETWEEN THE EYES, BREAK YOUR HEART INTO A MILLION PIECES, CAUSE YOU TO GET HELP IMMEDIATELY IF NOT SOONER, WANT TO PUT THIS BOOK IN THE HANDS OF EVERYONE YOU KNOW, MAKE IT REQUIRED READING IN ALL SCHOOLS, UNIVERSITIES AND SEEK IT OUT AS COMPLETE TRUTH, YOU ARE MOST DEFINITELY IN THAT CATEGORY, AND DON'T HAVE A CLUE WHAT YOUR LOVED ONES ARE UP TO, AND BETTER YET, MAKE ADVANCED PLANS FOR THEIR FUNERALS!! IF YOU ARE ONE OF THOSE WHO TURN THEIR HEADS IN DISGUST WHEN THEY LOOK UPON AN ADDICT AS THE SCOURGE OF THE UNIVERSE, CONVINCED THAT THEY MUST HAVE COME OUT OF BROKEN HOMES, OR HAD PARENTS WHO DIDN'T CARE ANYTHING ABOUT THEM, OR THAT THEY WERE THE 'BAD' SEEDS IN THE FAMILY CHOOSING DRUGS OVER EVERYTHING ELSE, YOU WILL BE IN FOR THE BIGGEST REALITY CHECK OF YOUR LIFE!!! IF YOU ARE AMONG THOSE WHO THINK THAT ADDICTS ARE THOSE WHO HANG OUT IN DARK ALLEYS IN FILTHY CLOTHES, OR WHO SHOULD BE HUNG FROM THE HIGHEST TREE FOR SELLING 'THAT STUFF' TO THE VULNERABLE AND HELPLESS.....KEEP READING!!! IF YOU ARE AMONG THOSE WHOSE HEARTS CANNOT BE PENETRATED BY ANYTHING OR ANYONE WHO COULD POSSIBLY DO SOMETHING 'LIKE THIS' AND NOT BE MOVED BY THE STORIES OF THE PARENTS WHOSE PRECIOUS LIVES HAVE BEEN BROKEN FOREVER, OR IF YOUR HEARTS COULD NOT POSSIBLY BE SHATTERED BECAUSE THESE THINGS COULD HAPPEN ONLY TO 'THOSE LOSERS' AND NEVER YOURS, OR YOU HIDE THE SECRET BECAUSE OF YOUR OWN SHAME AND EMBARRASSMENT, AND TOTALLY AVOID SUCH SUBJECTS AMONG YOUR FINE FRIENDS AND FAMILY......THINKING IT WILL ALL GO AWAY, IF YOU JUST DON'T TALK ABOUT IT.......OR SEE CANCER AND DIABETES AS LIFE THREATENING ILLNESS, BUT NOT SEE ADDICTION AS AN INCREDIBLE KILLER,.....IT'S TIME TO OPEN YOUR EYES AND OPEN THEM WIDER THAN EVER BEFORE!!! FINALLY, IF YOU THINK THAT YOU COULDN'T POSSIBLY EVER ATTEND THE FUNERAL OF YOUR OWN BELOVED CHILD AND/OR LOVED ONE, WHO WERE SELF-DESTRUCTING INFRONT OF YOUR VERY EYES AND YOU DID EVERYTHING YOU KNEW ALMOST NOTHING ABOUT EXCEPT WHAT YOU SAW ON TV., YET WERE STILL UNABLE OR UNWILLING TO SAVE THEM FROM THEMSELVES..... BECAUSE THEY WERE NO GOOD OR THEY WERE GOOD STUDENTS AND EXCELLED IN EVERYTHING OR IN NOTHING,.......YOU MUST NOT PASS GO, AND STOP EVEN FOR A SPLIT SECOND TO COLLECT THE $200.00, WHICH YOU DON'T EVEN POSSESS ANYMORE, AND READ THIS BOOK,WHICH WILL OPEN YOUR EYES WIDER THAN THEY HAD EVER BEEN OPEN BEFORE, AND ENCOURAGE YOUR LOVED ONE, FRIENDS AND WHO ARE IN SUCH DESPERATE NEED TO HEAR THE ABSOLUTE REALITY OF ADDICTION WHICH COULD DESTROY YOUR LOVED ONE, AND YOU.....IN A HEART BEAT, NEVER TO FIND THE LEVEL OF PEACE AGAIN THAT YOU ONCE THOUGHT COULD NEVER TOUCH YOUR LIFE, BECAUSE YOU WOULD NEVER KEEP COMPANY SUCH BAD PEOPLE!!!

I AM YOUR DISEASE: THE FACES OF ADDICTION, IS FULL OF TRUE STORIES BY PARENTS WHO NEVER COULD POSSIBLY IMAGINE IN THEIR WILDEST NIGHTMARES THAT THE CHILDREN WHO THEY ADORED MORE THAN THEIR OWN LIVES, WOULD HAVE TO BURY THEM LONG BEFORE THEY HAD A CHANCE TO LIVE THEIR LIVES TO THE FULLEST, TAKING WITH THEM THE VERY SPIRIT OF THEIR PARENTS' LIVES, AND WHO WILL NEVER BE THE SAME AGAIN!!! FROM THE 1ST PAGE TO THE LAST, YOU WILL BE KEPT SPELLBOUND BY THE BOOKS HONESTY AND IT'S HEART. IN THE WORLD IN WHICH WE LIVE TODAY, ASK YOURSELF WHO YOU KNOW, AND IF YOU ARE FORTUNATE ENOUGH NOT TO HAVE IT IN YOUR FAMILY.....YET, (BECAUSE IF YOU HAVEN'T BEEN TOUCHED BY ADDICTION, WHETHER ALCOHOL, STREET DRUGS, PRESCRIPTION DRUGS, GAMBLING ADDICTION AND SO MANY OTHER DESTRUCTIVE ADDICTIONS, IT IS ONLY A MATTER OF A VERY SHORT TIME)!!!! DO YOURSELF AND THE WORLD A FAVOR, AND MAKE CERTAIN THAT AFTER YOU HAVE READ THIS BOOK, THAT YOU MAKE SURE THAT IT GETS INTO THE HANDS OF YOUR CHILDREN'S EDUCATORS, SO THAT THE YOUNG ONES WILL THINK NOT TWICE, BUT A THOUSAND TIMES, BEFORE THEY BEGIN EXPERIMENTING, BECAUSE THEY WILL EXPERIEMENT, AND THE VERY FIRST TIME THEY TRY...CAN.....AND WILL....STEAL THEIR LIVES AND.....YOURS!!!! THIS BOOK IS NOTHING SHORT OF COMPELLING AND A MUST READ FOR ALL WHO ARE FORTUNATE ENOUGH TO GET THEIR HANDS ON IT!!

With sincere hope and peace,

Agnes "Sparky" Sparnecht

Deerfield Beach, Florida

rows.text:
THIS BOOK WAS WRITTEN IN 2006 BY CRISTINA MARCANO AND ALBERTO BARRERA TYSZKA, THIS IS A BIOGRAPHY OF HUGO CHÁVEZ A PRESIDENT TURNED DICTATOR.
THIS IS AN UNBIASED BIOGRAPHY VERY DIFFERENT FROM THE APOLOGETIC PICTURE PRESENTED BY THE LOONY LEFT.
IT STARTED IN JULY 28,1954 WHEN HUGO CHÁVEZ WAS BORN IN THE TOWN OF SABANETA LOCATED IN BARINAS STATES,
THE VENEZUELAN PLAINS ( LLANOS),HE
WAS UPBROUGHT BY HIS GRANDMOTHER
ROSA CHÁVEZ.
IN HIS ADOLESCENSE HE MOVED TO THE CITY OF BARINAS TO STUDY HIGH SCHOOL, HE
STARTED TO READ LEFTIST BOOKS GIVEN BY ESTEBAN RUIZ GUEVARA A COMMUNIST MILITANT, IN 1971 HE MOVED TO CARACAS
BECAUSE HE ENTERED THE ARMY,HE VISITED
PERÚ AND BECAME FASCINATED WITH THE LEFTIST PRESIDENT JUAN VELASCO ALVARADO.
IN 1977 HE DECIDED TO BREAK WITH THE SYSTEM AND DURING THE EIGHTIES HE STARTED TO CONSPIRE WITH OTHER DISSIDENT OFFICERS AND FAR LEFT CIVILIANS, THIS WAS UNBEKNOWNST TO THE VENEZUELANS, HE WAS IN THE SHADOWS.
THE DEMOCRATIC SYSTEM LOOKED STRONG AND SOLID BUT THIS ILLUSION CAME TO
AN END ON FEBRUARY 4,1992 WHEN CHÁVEZ
AND OTHER OFFICERS TRIED TO OVERTHROW PRESIDENT CARLOS ANDRÉS PÉREZ, THE COUP FAILED BUT HUGO CHÁVEZ JUMPED
FROM ANONYMITY TO THE FOREFRONT OF THE VENEZUELAN POLITICS, TWO YEARS
LATER HE WAS FREED BY PRESIDENT RAFÁEL CALDERA,A VERY BIG MISTAKE AS IT TURNED TO BE OUT, SHORTLY AFTERWARDS HE WENT
TO CUBA AND HIGHLY PRAISED THE DICTATOR FIDEL CASTRO, SHOWING HIS
TRUE COLORS ; IN THE TWO FOLLOWING YEARS HE SANK INTO ANONYMITY, TO BE
RESCUED BY LUIS MIQUELENA A VETERAN COMMUNIST MILITANT,HE PREPARED HIM
FOR THE UPCOMING ELECTIONS IN 1998.
AT THAT TIME THE VENEZUELAN BIPARTISAN SYSTEM WAS ALREADY EXHAUSTED AND ROTTEN TO THE CORE, IN FACT RAFÁEL CALDERA WON THE 1993 ELECTION WITH THE SUPPORT OF A MOTLEY OF POLITICAL PARTIES ,AS A RESULT MOST OF THE VENEZUELAN PEOPLE, NOT ONLY THE CHAVISTAS,WANTED A CHANGE.
ANOTHER FACTOR WAS THE NEO LIBERAL
ECONOMIC POLICIES THAT WERE LAUNCHED
IN LATIN AMERICA IN THE NINETIES,WITH
THEIR UNBRIDLED CAPITALISM, SHOCK THERAPIES AND PRIVATIZACION RUSH, IT
BROUGHT FINANCIAL RUIN AND SOCIAL DISRUPTION, THE GAP BETWEEN RICH AND
POOR BECAME MUCH WIDER,IN THE END
THIS POLICIES PAVED THE WAY FOR THE LEFT,
OF COURSE CHÁVEZ BECAME THE FIRST BENEFICIARY ,AS A RESULT HE WAS ELECTED
PRESIDENT IN 1998 BY 57 PERCENT OF THE
VOTE.
ONCE HE TOOK POWER HE DID NOT WASTE
TIME TO DISMANTLE THE WHOLE SYSTEM,
A NEW CONSTITUTION WAS APPROVED IN
1999 AND THE NATIONAL ASSEMBLY WAS
CREATED IN LIEU OF THE BICAMERAL SYSTEM.
FROM DAY ONE HE ALIGNED VENEZUELA WITH FIDEL CASTRO AND THE LATIN AMERICA
RADICAL LEFT.
HUGO CHÁVEZ WAS A DEMAGOGUE AND
OVERALL A RABBLE ROUSER, HIS SPEECHES
WERE FULL OF HATRED AND INTOLERANCE,
BUT THIS WAS EXPECTED HE HAS ALWAYS
BEEN A SOCIAL RESENTFUL WITH A CHIP
ON THE SHOULDER, HE CREATED A DIVISION
IN THE SOCIETY THAT EXTENDED TO MEMBERS OF INDIVIDUAL FAMILIES AS NO
OTHER VENEZUELAN PRESIDENT HAS DONE,
IN A TYPICAL LEFTIST WAY HE CREATED THE
CLASS WAR, THIS IS NOT TO SAY THAT HOSTILITIES NEVER EXISTED BEFORE, BUT
WITH HIM CLASS HATRED BECAME PART OF
THE STATE POLICY.
THE AUTHORS DELVED INTO THE ILL ATTEMPTED COUP OF APRIL 11, 2002
HEADED BY PEDRO CARMONA WHO WAS
HEAD OF FEDECAMARAS( PRIVATE ENTERPRISE ASSOCIATION),THE REINSTATEMENT OF CHÁVEZ THREE DAYS
LATER BY THE ARMY,INCLUDING GENERAL
RAUL BADUEL WHO BECAME A FOE FIVE
YEARS LATER, THEN THE PURGE IN PDVSA
( PETRÓLEOS DE VENEZUELA), THE REVOCATORY REFERENDUM OF 2004 AND
THE INFAMOUS TASCÓN LIST THAT RUINED
AND DISGRACED THOUSANDS OF VENEZUELANS.
THE AUTHORS ALSO DELVED INTO THE PERSONAL LIFE OF CHÁVEZ,HIS TWO WIVES (NANCY COLMENARES AND MARISABEL RODRIGUEZ), HIS LOVER (HERMA MARKSMAN)
AND HIS WHOLE FAMILY.
UNFORTUNATELY FOR VENEZUELA CHÁVEZ HAD THE GOOD LUCK THAT THE PRICE OF OIL
SKYROCKETED DURING MOST PART OF HIS REGIME, THIS ALLOWED HIM TO CONSOLIDATE HIS POWER, ALSO THE FACT
THAT HE COINCIDED WITH THE ADMINISTRATION OF THE DESPICABLE GEORGE W BUSH, WHO WITH GOOD REASONS WAS VERY UNPOPULAR IN THE
WHOLE WORLD, CHÁVEZ CAPITALIZED ON
THAT, WITH HIS ANTI BUSH DISCOURSE.
AS THE AUTHORS POINTED OUT CHÁVEZ
WAS A MAN OF CONTRADICTIONS, WHILE
HE PREACHED AUSTERITY AND LOVE FOR THE
POOR,HE AND HIS ACOLYTES SPENT THE MONEY LAVISHLY, HE TRAVELED TO THE WHOLE WORLD AS NEVER OTHER VENEZUELAN PRESIDENT HAS TRAVELED BEFORE HIM, ALSO THEY BOUGHT LUXURY
CARS AND CLOTHES, HE PROMISED TO END
CORRUPTION,BUT HIS GOVERNMENT (AND
MADURO LATER IN),PLUNDERED THE COUNTRY EXPONENTIALLY, IN SPITE OF
ALL THE GREAT QUANTITY OF INCOME THAT
HIS ADMINISTRATION RECEIVED,THE COUNTRY BECAME A TOTAL FINANCIAL
RUIN, THE CHAVISTAS SQUANDERED THE
MONEY AND ENRICHED THEMSELVES.
AS FOR THE POVERTY ,VENEZUELA NOT ONLY
BECAME ON OF THE POOREST COUNTRIES
IN LATIN AMERICA BUT ALSO THE MIDDLE AND UPPER MIDDLE CLASS BECAME IMPOVERISHED,THE SO CALLED SOCIAL
PROJECTS WERE NOTHING MORE THAN
A SCHEME OF CORRUPTION AND THE
EMBEZZLEMENT OF FUNDS.
AS FOR THE MISIONES,THAT WAS AN INSTRUMENT OF CASTROITE PENETRATION,
IN FACT WHILE CHÁVEZ TALKED ABOUT AMERICAN INTERFERENCE HE SOLD VENEZUELA TO CASTRO'S CUBA.
THE BOOK FINISHED AT THE END OF 2006
BEFORE THE PRESIDENTIAL ELECTIONS AGAINST ROSALES, AS EXPECTED( BECAUSE
ALL THE INSTITUTIONS INCLUDING THE
NATIONAL ELECTORAL COUNCIL WAS AND
ARE NOWADAYS IN CHAVISTAS HANDS) HE WON, FIVE MONTHS LATER IN MAY 2007,
RCTV ( RADIO CARACAS TELEVISION) WAS
CLOSED AND LATER ON HE TRIED TO INTRODUCE A REFERENDUM TO AMEND
THE CONSTITUTION TO PERPETUATE HIMSELF
IN POWER.
HE PLANNED TO STAY IN POWER UP TO THE
YEAR 2030, BUT IT WOULD NOT BE, ON MARCH 5,2013 HE PASSED AWAY ; AFTER THAT
NICOLAS MADURO BECAME PRESIDENT UP TO
THE PRESENT, THE COUNTRY KEEP
GOING DOWNWARD, MANY AWFUL THINGS
HAVE HAPPENED, BUT THIS IS FOR ANOTHER
STORY.
rows.title: HUGO CHÁVEZ.

rows.text:
WARNING!! SPOILER ALERTS!!
THE MAIN REASON I BOUGHT THIS BOX SET IS BECAUSE I AM A HUGE FAN OF JOSHUA JACKSON, WHO PLAYS
COLE LOCKHART, AND WHO ALSO PLAYS A HUGE PART IN THE TV SERIES, FRINGE. NOW THAT, IS AN AMAZING SERIES IF YOU LIKE FBI, TECHNOLOGY AND SCIENCE FICTION, WITH A DASH OF HUMOR AND SPRINKLE OF A LOVE AFFAIR. IT IS CURRENTLY PLAYING ON IMDb TV APP WITH COMMERCIALS. IT'S WORTH IT. SEASON 1 IS GOOD, SEASON 2 IS GREAT, SEASON 3 IS AWESOME, AND SO ON...
BACK TO THE AFFAIR. THE MAIN THING TO KNOW BEFORE YOU WATCH IT, ACTUALLY, THE TWO MAIN THINGS IS ONE, THERE ARE A LOT OF SEX SCENES, AND TWO, THE SECOND MAIN CHARACTER, NOAH SOLLOWAY, THE MAN WHO HAS AN AFFAIR WITH ALISON BAILEY, IS A PIG. HE HAS SOME GOOD TRAITS ALSO, THOUGH. BUT WHEN IT COMES TO WOMEN, HE IS JUST A PIG. LOLOL.
NOAH IS A TEACHER, WHO IS WRITING ANOTHER BOOK. HE ISN'T SURE WHAT TO WRITE ABOUT UNTIL HE SEES ALISON, A WAITRESS, FOR THE FIRST TIME. MAYBE IT'S AFTER THEY RUN INTO EACHOTHER ON THE BEACH AT NIGHT. I THINK THAT IS WHEN IT STIRRED THINGS UP. ANYWAY, AT FIRST, I THOUGHT THAT HE WAS A GENTLEMAN, TO ALISON. HE FELL IN LOVE WITH HER VERY QUICKLY. I HAD A HARD TIME BELIEVING HIM, BECAUSE HE CLAIMED HE HAD THE PERFECT FAMILY LIFE AND LOVED HIS WIFE, AND DIDN'T UNDERSTAND WHY THIS WAS HAPPENING TO HIM. SO, BASICALLY, HE DECIDED TO LEAVE HIS WIFE AND 4 CHILDREN! JUST TO BE WITH A YOUNGER WOMAN HE BARELY KNEW ANYTHING ABOUT.
ALISON BAILEY LOVES HER HUSBAND COLE LOCKHART. HE LOVES HER TO DEATH. THEY HAVE A HUGE PROBLEM THAT THEY HAVE BEEN DEALING WITH FOR THE LAST 2 YEARS. THE DEATH OF THEIR 4 YR OLD SON.
IT PRIES THEM APART WHEN THEY SHOULD BE SHARING THEIR PAIN. BUT COLE STILL LOVES HER TO DEATH.
AND ALISON PULLS AWAY, SOMETIMES. SO SHE MOVES OUT EVENTUALLY, AFTER SOMEO ONE TELLS COLE ABOUT HER AFFAIR WITH NOAH. AND NOAH MOVES OUT AFTER TELLING HIS WIFE, HELEN.
THEN THERE ARE A COUPLE OF SEASONS. AFFAIRS. SPLITTING UP. NEW RELATIONSHIPS. NEW BOOK.
HIT AND RUN. WITH A SECRET, WHO DUNNIT? THEN WE GET TO SEASON 4. I LOVED AND I HATED SEASON 4.
IT WAS VERY WELL DONE, BUT I LOST TWO OF MY FAVORITE CHARACTERS AFTER THE END OF SEASON 4.
FIRST OF ALL, I WAS VERY ANGRY THAT ALISON WAS KILLED TOWARDS THE END OF SEASON 4.
Ruth Wilson requested to leave ahead of season four, and her character was killed off at the end of the season.[19] Although Wilson did not fully disclose the reason for her departure in 2019, The Hollywood Reporter did an exposé alleging that Wilson had been uncomfortable with the amount of nudity required for the role and naming showrunner Sarah Treem and executive producer and director Jeffrey Reiner as behaving inappropriately towards actors on set.
ALISON WAS DATING AN ALCHOHOLIC, BEN CRUZ, WHO WAS GOING TO AA FOR TREATMENT OF ALCHOL, DRUGS AND SEX. HE GAVE ME THE HEEBEE JEEBEES RIGHT FROM THE GET GO. HE SUNK HIS CLAWS INTO ALISON RIGHT AWAY! AND HE FREAKED OUT AND KILLED HER. :*(…
WHAT REALLY KILLED "ME", WAS THE FACT THAT COLE HAD MADE HIS DECSION ABOUT WHICH WOMAN HE WANTED TO BE WITH, AND HE HAD CHOSEN ALISON! :*(…
WHILE COLE WAS DRIVING HOME FROM HIS TRIP TO CALIFORNIA, A TRIP TO CLEAR HIS HEAD, POOR ALISON WAS BEING KILLED AND DRAGGED TO HER LAST RESTING PLACE, THE WORST PLACE EVER FOR HER! THE WATER!!!! SHE WASN'T EVEN COMPLETELY DEAD WHEN BEN THREW HER INTO THE BAY. BUT SHE WAS OUT OF IT ENOUGH THAT SHE COULDN'T SAVE HERSELF. SO SHE ENDED UP DROWNING. AND ALMOST EVERY PERSON AROUND THOUGHT SHE PURPOSELY DROWNED HERSELF. BUT NO, NOT COLE. IN THE BEGINNING, HE THOUGHT BEN HAD KILLED HER. HE HAD MET BEN, AND HE DIDN'T TRUST HIM. SO THE ONE THING THAT PISSED ME OFF, MAJORLY, IS THAT COLE NEVER FOUND OUT WHO KILLED HER. ACTUALLY, I WISH HE WOULD HAVE MADE IT HOME AND TOLD HER HIS FEELINGS, AND SHE WOULD HAVE SAID YES, I WANT YOU BACK AGAIN.
YOU ONLY NEED ONE EPISODE TO DO THAT. OR STRETCH IT OUT TO A FEW IF YOU CAN!
MY SECOND BIG BUMMER IS THAT COLE (JOSHUA JACKSON) DIDN'T COME BACK FOR SEASON 5.
BUT I GUESS THAT IT MAKES SENSE FOR HIM NOT TO. HE WOULD BE SUPER BUMMED AND ABSORBED WITH THE PAIN OF LOSING ALISON. AND HE WOULD BE SITTING AROUND DOING NOTHING AT HOME.
IT STILL PISSES ME OFF. ESPECIALLY BECAUSE I WASN'T THAT THRILLED WITH THE ACTING JOB BY THE ACTOR,
ANNA PAQUIN, WHO PLAYS THE ADULT JOANIE LOCKHART. I DON'T KNOW, MAYBE IT'S JUST THE SCRIPT THAT WAS WRITTEN FOR HER. SHE IS JUST SO HARSH. EVERYTHING IS DISCOVERED SO QUICKLY, IT SEEMS UNLIKELY TO ME. THAT IS DEFINITELY THE WRITERS. AND WHAT REALLY DRIVES ME CRAZY IS THE ON AND OFF EMOTIONS OF HELEN AND NOAH IN SEASON 5. GIVE ME A BREAK.
SO THAT'S IT. I STILL WATCH SEASON 5. THERE IS OTHER STUFF TO WATCH. BUT I AM STILL HEARTBROKEN ABOUT THE MISSING ALISON AND COLE. I BASICALLY WANTED THEM BACK TOGETHER AND I WANTED NOAH
AND HELEN BACK TOGETHER TOO. HELEN KEPT NOAH ON THE STRAIGHT AND NARROW. PLUS NOAH WAS A GREAT FATHER, FOR THE MOST PART.

SO THAT'S IT. IF YOU ONLY WATCHED IT ON SHOWTIME ONCE, YOU NEED TO WATCH THIS A COUPLE OF TIMES MORE. I PAYED FOR SHOWTIME AND BINGE WATHCED IT FOR A WEEK OR TWO. I ENDED UP SEEING IT FROM BEGINNING (1) TO END (5) FOUR TIMES. THAT'S A LOT FOR THE AVERAGE PERSON. I KNOW. BUT I LIKE TO REWATCH THINGS AND SEE WHAT I'VE MISSED. PLUS, IT GETS BETTER EVERY TIME IV'E SEEN IT IN TOTAL.

FINALLY, FOR THIS PRICE, THIS IS A GREAT, SEX FILLED, SOAPY OPERA DRAMA, TV SERIES. IT NEEDS TO BE
VIEWED AT LEAST 3 TIMES OR MORE. I JUST ORDERED IT AFTER SEEING IT 4 TIMES ON SHOWTIME. I DON'T HAVE SHOWETIME ANYMORE, SO I WANT THIS IN MY COLLECTION. GOTTA HAVE Y JOSHUA JACKSON, TOO!!

I ALMOST FORGOT TO MENTION THE SUPERB ACTING BY DOMINIC WEST, WHO PLAYS NOAH SOLLOWAY AND WE CAN'T FORGET RUTH WILSON, WHO PLAYS ALISON BAILEY. THESE TWO WERE THE TWO MAIN CHARACTERS OF THE SHOW. THEY BOTH WERE NOMINATED FOR DIFFERENT AWARDS AND WON SOME AWARDS. :*)

THAT'S ALL FOLKS.
rows.title: A DECENT SEX FILLED SOAPY DRAMA

rows.text:
I WAS FEELING SO VERY SAD FOR IRA HAYES, ALSO, THE BLOCKING OF ONE OF THE TRUE FLAG RAISERS WAS
HARLON BLOCK, BECAUSE THIS POLITICIAN THOUGHT OF ONLY OF RAISING MONEY FOR THE WAR BONDS
AND IT BEING TOO LATE TO NAME HARLON BLOCK. WHAT A SHAME HIS MOTHER COULD NOT BE HONORED
AS WAS THE OTHER MOTHERS WHO WERE STILL ALIVE, BUT HARLON BLOCKS MOTHER KNEW IT WAS HIM.
WHEN HER OTHER SON ASKED WHY, I CHANGED HIS DIAPERS AS A BABY, AND I KNOW HIS BEHIND VERY
WELL. SO, NO ONE IS GOING TO ME THIS IS NOT MY SON. AFTER TELLING THIS TO HIS YOUNGER BROTHER
HE RAN CALLING HIS FATHER WHO WAS IN ANOTHER ROOM TO TELL HIM THIS. JAMES BRADLY, WAS ALSO
A TRUE HERO, HIS LATER YEARS WHEN HE WAS ON THE STAIRS, WITH HIS GRANDSON, WHERE ARE THEY, WHERE ARE THEY!!!! IT MADE ME AND MY HUSBAND CRY. MY HUSBAND THEN SAID TO ME, DOESN'T THIS REMIND US OF YOUR UNCLE CARMINE, WE WERE AT A WEDDING ON MY MOTHES SIDE OF THE FAMILY AND
MY HUSBAND WAS IN A CONVERSATION WITH HIM, SAYING, UNCLE CARMINE, DIDN'T YOU JOIN THE SERVICE
AT THAT TIME, THEN, AND YOU HAVE NEVER TALKED ABOUT. HE ANSWERED YES. MY HUSBAND ASKED WHERE
DID YOU FIGHT, UNCLE CARMINE SAID, IN THE BATTLE OF THE BULDGE. WHAT!! THE BATTLE OF THE BULDGE WAS A MAJOR BATTLE, AND YOU HAVE NEVER SAID ANYTHING ABOUT IT, WHAT ABOUT YOUR WIFE, AUNT CARMELA, DOES SHE KNOW, HE SAID NO. YOU MUST HAVE GOTTEN MEDALS FOR THAT BATTLE, HE SAID YES,
I HAVE THEM THROWN IN A DRAWER IN MY HOUSE. MY HUSBAND ASKED UNCLE CARMINE CAN I SEE THEM,
HE SAID YES BECAUSE HE KNEW HE ALSO SERVED IN THE ARMY. WHEN MY HUSBAND, GOT TO HIS HOUSE
SURE ENOUGH THE METALS WERE IN THAT DRAWER, WITH A FLAG, AND THE MEDALS WERE FOR THE COMBAT CROSS AND MANY MANY OTHERS, BEFORE COMING OFF A SMALL BOAT THE HEAD OF THE THEM TOLD THEM ALL THAT BEFORE THEY LAND, TIE THEIR BOOTS AROUND THEIR SHOULDERS, NOT TO GET THEM WET.HE ALSO HAD A FILM THAT HE SHOWED TO MY HUSBAND, A MAN WITH A CAMERA FILMING THEM FROM BEHIND COMPING OFF THE SMALL LANDING CRAFT, YEARS LATER MY UNCLE CARMINE WAS LOOKING FOR THE INFO ON THE MILITARY CHANNEL AND SAW THAT A FILM WAS COMING ON ABOUT THE BATTLE OF THE BULDGE. HE TURNED ON THE CHANNEL, AND SAW, MANY SMALL BOATS COMING OUT OF THE WATER LANDING ON THE
BEACH. ALL OF A SUDDEN HE SEES HIMSELF ALONG WITH ALL THE OTHER MEN WITH THEIR BOOT LACES TIED OVER THEIR BACKS. AS THEY LANDED, THE ONLY DIFFERENCE WAS HE TURNED AROUND AND THE FILM MAKER CAUGHT HIS FACE AS HE LANDED ON THE BEACH AND THE FACE WAS INDEED HIS. MY HUSBAND ASKED HIM NOW IF HE COULD TAKE ALL THE METALS, AND OF THE FILM SHOWING HIM COMING OFF THE RAFT. MY UNCLE FIGHTING IN THE BATTLE OF THE BULDGE, AND ALL THE MEDALS HE RECEIVED. PRINTED HIS NAME, RANK, AND A SMALL INJURY HE HAD. MY HUSBAND LOOKED AT THE FILM, TOOK THE FILM AND THE METALS AND GAVE THEM TO A STORE THAT PUT METALS IN A LONG VELVET BROWN FRAMED BOX AND PUT ALL THE METALS IN IT.
AND THE CERTIFICATE SHOWING HIS TIME IN THE BATTLE OF THE BULDGE. AFTER HE DIED, HIS DAUGHTERS WAS GIVEN THE BOX AS HE HAD NO SONS. THEY ALSO DIED, AND NOW WE DO NOT KNOW WHERE THIS BOX IS.
ALSO, MY HUSBAND THOUGHT IT WAS TIME TO BE CALLED UP, WHEN HE WAS 18 YEARS OLD, HE JOINED THE ARMY. ALSO, HE WAS ONE OF 7 BROTHERS, EACH ENLISTING IN EVERY BRAND OF THE ARMED SERVICES. HIS PARENTS PROUDLY PUT ON THE FRONT DOOR, ALL OF THE SYMBOLS THAT EA ONE SERVED. SADLY, ONE OF
HIS BROTHERS, WAS IN VIETNAM AND GOT AGENT ORANGE, AND SADLY DIED FROM IT. AS THE FAMILY WAS SITTING AROUND THE DINING ROOM TABLE, WHEN HE TOLD US THAT THE DOCTORS ALL TOLD HIM HE DID NOT HAVE LONG TO LIVE.
HE OPENED HIS COLLAR AND UNBUTTONED HIS SHIRT TO SHOW US ALL THE VERY RED SCAR ALONG HIS ENTIRE THROAT. A FEW MONTHS LATER, HE DIED. MY BROTHER ENLISTED ALSO, DURING VIET NAM AND WANTED TO FIGHT, BUT AFTER A TEST THEY GAVE HIM, THEY SAW HE WAS MUCH MORE SUITED TO TAKE THE LAST WISHES OF THE MEN WHO WERE DYING, THEY WANTED HIM TO SEND THEM WHAT HE WROTE AND MAIL IT TO THEM, TILL TODAY HE THINKS ABOUT THEM ALOT. I CALLED THE PROGRESSO COMPANY TO SEND PACKAGES TO THEM, IN MY BROTHERS NAME SO HE COULD GIVE THEM OUT. I CALLED PROGRESSO COMPANY A
NUMBER OF TIMES, AND THEY CONTINUED TO DO SO. GOD BLESS THEM. ALSO MY SON TRIED TO JOIN THE MARINES WHEN HE WAS SEVENTEEN, AND THOUGHT THAT ME AND HIS FATHER WOULD NOT OBJECT TO SIGN PAPERWORK GIVING PERMISSION. WE TOLD HIM NO. PLEASE WAIT WE WANT YOU TO FINISH HIGH SCHOOL FIRST TO GET OUR PERMISSION AND THEN YOU CAN ENLIST IN THE MARINE CORP. WELL EVEN THE MARINE RECRUITER TRIED AND TRIED, AND MY SON KEPT CALLING THE MARINE RECRUITER TO REMIND THEM HIS 18TH BIRTHDAY IS COMING UP. SINCE HE NEVER MENTIONED IT, WE THOUGHT MAYBE HE CHANGED HIS MIND
AND WOULD WANT TO GO ON TO COLLEGE. EXACTLY ON HIS EIGHTEENTH BIRTHDAY, OUR DOORBELL RANG, AN ARMY RECRUITER WAS AT THE DOOR, MY SON WAS ALREADY COMING DOWN THE STAIRS, WITH A KNAP
SACK ON HIS BACK. WHEN WE ASKED HIM WHAT HE WAS AT DOOR FOR, HE LOOKED AT US, AND SAID, MOM, DAD, I'M SORRY BUT I AM OLD ENOUGH NOT TO KNEED YOUR PERMISSION. WHEN WE ASKED HIM WE THOUGHT YOU WANTED TO BE IN THE MARINE CORP, THE ARMY RECRUITER SAID HE WAS THE ONLY ONE
WHO WHO WAITED TO RECRUIT HIM, HE SAID WE WERE THE ONLY PART OF THE MILITARY WHO WAITED FOR HIM. IT MUST HAVE BEEN GOD'S WILL. HE LEARNED TO FLY HELICOPTERS AND WORKS FOR A MAJOR DELIVERY COMPANY. AND SO WE SO ENJOYED READING AND WATCHING THE FILM, "BATTLE OF THE BULDGE"
WE ARE SO GRATEFUL THAT HIS GRANDSON WROTE THIS TRUE STORY.

rows.text: I CAN'T BELIEVE I WASTED MY MONEY ON THIS "DOCUMENTARY". THESE GUYS PRODUCED BETTER STUFF ON THEIR YT CHANNEL. SERIOUSLY! IT DOES NOT HAVE EITHER THE APPEARANCE OR THE DEPTH OF A PROJECT WHICH (SUPPOSEDLY) TOOK AT LEAST TWO REASONABLY INTELLIGENT PEOPLE  **THREE WHOLE YEARS**  TO COMPLETE! I WAS EXPECTING A SUBSTANTIVE, INFORMATIVE AND TIMELY TOPIC DOC. AND INSTEAD WAS PRESENTED WITH A PRESSURED AND HASTILY PREPARED, VOICED-OVER, PETITE YOUTUBE-ESQUE, UTTERLY UN-PROFOUND, FILM NOIR --> (AND HERE'S THE KICKER) THAT CONTAINS  **ABSOLUTELY NO NEW REVELATIONS ABOUT THE CIA'S MKULTRA PRGM. NONE. NICE WORK GUYS. I APPRECIATE THE EFFORT YOU PUT IT AND REALIZE THAT IT IS INDEED AN ACHIEVEMENT AND I AM BY NO MEANS INTENDING TO BELITTLE OR TEAR DOWN YOUR WORK- IT'S JUST NOT ANYTHING AT ALL LIKE I THOUGHT IT WOULD BE. GIVEN THE CONTENT I HAVE COME TO EXPECT FROM YOUR YT CHANNEL I THOUGHT, ALBEIT MISTAKENLY, THAT  **THIS** (SUPER DUPER LONG ANTICIPATED FILM RELEASE) WOULD BE MORE CLOSELY RESEMBLING A DOCUMENTARY FROM/OF A WHOLE OTHER LEVEL ALTOGETHER--> NOT JUST MORE OF THE SAME --> ONLY THIS TIME PLEASE PAY US.  SORRY GUYS- NO DICE. I DO NOT LIKE THAT THERE ARE NO INTERVIEWS, THAT YOU USED SOME PECULIAR SOUNDING MAN'S VOICE TO READ WHAT THE TYPED OUT WORDS ON SCREEN ABOVE THE TYPEWRITER ARE--> WITHOUT CONTEXT, , THAT  **ALL FOOTAGE**  IS SEEMINGLY RAPIDLY SEQUENCED LIKE SCREEN SHOTS, THAT OFTEN TIMES THE DATA CONTAINED IN THOSE RAPID SEQUENCE SHOTS (THAT TAKE UP 2/3 OF THE FILM) DO NOT HAVE ANY DIRECT BEARING ON/TO THE ASPECT(S) OF THE TOPIC BEING DISCUSSED, THAT THE FILM IS TOTALLY IN B&W--> WITHOUT REPRIEVE (WHICH IS FINE BUT TENDS TO GET TIRESOME RATHER QUICKLY), THAT NEITHER OF YOU THOUGHT IT IMPORTANT ENOUGH TO THIS ENDEAVOR TO SECURE FIRST PERSON TESTIMONY AND/OR ACCOUNTS OF THE VARIOUS ASPECTS TO/OF THE TOTALITY OF THE SUBJECT YOU'RE COVERING (MKULTRA), OR (AND FINALLY) THAT NEITHER OF YOU [APPARENTLY] DECIDED TO GO AND GET A TRULY OUTSIDE OPINION OF YOUR WORK, IN TERMS OF ITS APPEARANCE/EFFECTS, GENERAL TIMING/FLOW AND/OR STYLE IN EDITING--> PRIOR TO ITS RELEASE; I SAY THIS AS A PERSON WHO HAS A GREAT RESPECT FOR THE WORK YOU BOTH DO IN PUTTING OUT INFO. YOU BELIEVE IS OF VITAL IMPORTANCE. HOWEVER, I WAS, SIMPLY PUT, EXPECTING WORK OF A MUCH MUCH HIGHER CALIPER AND SOMETHING A BIT MORE PROFESSIONAL FROM YOU BOTH THAN I THINK, SADLY, WAS PRODUCED; THIS HAS FALLEN WELL SHORT OF THE EXPECTATIONS I HAD IN YOUR GRAND LEAD UP TO ITS RELEASE.  PERHAPS NEXT TIME (IF THERE IS A "NEXT TIME") YOU SHOULDN'T EVEN TALK ABOUT THE FACT THAT YOU'RE WORKING ON SOMETHING OR DISCLOSE  **HOW LONG IT TOOK YOU TO FINISH**  BECAUSE THE SHEER VOLUME OF TIME INVOLVED AND THE VERY VOCAL AND REPETITIVE FOCUS ON THE AMOUNT OF TIME/WORK/EFFORT INVOLVED HELP FEED THE ANTICIPATION BY THOSE (MYSELF INCLUDED) OF YOUR REGULAR VIEWING AUDIENCE WHO PATIENTLY AND EAGERLY AWAITED THE RELEASE OF THIS FILM; WITHOUT A WAY TO MANAGE EXPECTATIONS, AND/OR CONSCIOUS EFFORT TO DO SO, THOSE ANTICIPATIONS CAN QUICKLY TURN INTO UNMITIGATED DISAPPOINTMENT- ESPECIALLY IF ALL THE CRITERIA TYPICALLY THOUGHT OF AS ASSOCIATED TO/WITH YOUR [BRAND] PREVIOUS WORK(S) AREN'T SURPASSED IN SPECTACULAR FORM. YOU MIGHT TAKE IT AS A BACK-HANDED COMPLEMENT THAT I THINK YOU ARE SO CAPABLE THAT THIS PARTICULAR WORK REPRESENTS THE BASE LEVEL OF YOUR TALENT AND POTENTIAL; AN EXPECTATION WHICH ONCE CULTIVATED SHOULD NOT BE SOMETHING TRADED OVER LIGHTLY. IN CLOSING, I WOULD LIKE TO POINT OUT THAT I THINK YOU GUYS DID A GOOD JOB OF PRESENTING THE INFO. IN A/THE SIMILAR MANNER TO THAT WHICH WAS EMPLOYED, METHODICALLY SPEAKING, BY THOSE WHOM RAN THE SUBJECT PROGRAM ITSELF. I ACTUALLY CAN'T EVEN FINISH IT--> BUT--> I WILL SAY TO ANYONE WANTING TO KNOW WHETHER THEY SHOULD BUY IT OR NOT THAT MY OPINION IS OF NO CONSEQUENCE AND THEY (AARON & MELISSA) DO REALLY GOOD WORK. SO SPEND THE $5 AND MAKE UP YOUR OWN MIND. TRUE, YOU PROBABLY  **ALREADY** PRETTY WELL KNOW AND UNDERSTAND WHAT YOU NEED TO ABOUT THIS PROGRAM (MKULTRA) AND, OF COURSE, ITS LEAD INTO WHAT'S GOING ON IN THE WORLD TODAY. THAT WOULD HAVE ACTUALLY BEEN A NICE TRANSITION AND/OR TIE-IN FOR THE FILM TO HAVE MADE AND PROBABLY SHOULD'VE BEEN PRIORITIZED EARLIER ON IN THE PROCESS--> I THINK THE FILM'S FOLLOW-THROUGH WAS STRANGELY LACKING, SORRY.  (~_~) BUT I AM GLAD TO HAVE SUPPORTED YOUR WORK IN SOME [SMALL] WAY, REALLY. THANK YOU FOR YOUR EFFORTS. I CAN'T WAIT TO SEE YOUR NEXT PRODUCTION!
rows.title: I CAN'T BELIEVE I WASTED MY MONEY ON THIS "DOCUMENTARY"

rows.text:
FREY'S BOOK IS HANDS DOWN THE WORST BOOK ON ADDICTION I HAVE EVER READ, AND QUITE POSSIBLY EVER WRITTEN FOR THE SIMPLE REASON THAT IT IS IN NO WAY BASED ON FACT.

THE AUTHOR STARTS OUT THE BOOK STATING THAT HE CAME TO ON AN AIRPLANE 20 MINUTES BEFORE IT LANDED. HE HAD A GAPING HOLE IN THE SIDE OF HIS FACE, WAS BLEEDING FROM THE MOUTH AND HEAD, AND WAS COVERNED IN URINE, BLOOD, AND VOMIT, ETC. FIRST OF ALL, NO MAJOR COMMERCIAL AIRLINE IS GOING TO LET SOMEONE IN THAT CONDITION ON AN AIRCRAFT. THAT'S NOT ONLY A RULE AIRLINES FOLLOW, IT IS PART OF F.A.A REGULATIONS. NOT TO MENTION THAT HE WAS UNATTENDED. HE CLAIMS THAT A DOCTOR BROUGHT HIM ON, AND TOLD THE FLIGHT CREW TO JUST LET HIM SLEEP. WHAT KIND OF A DOCTOR PUTS SOMEONE WHO IS CLEARLY IN NEED OF IMMEDIATE MEDICAL CARE ON A PLANE INSTEAD OF TREATING THEM? CERTAINLY NOT A REPECTABLE ONE-BUT HEY, THIS IS FICTION AFTER ALL.

I HAVE BEEN TO HAZELDON, WHERE THIS BOOK TAKES PLACE. FREY WOULD HAVE LASTED ALL OF 1 DAY IN THIS FACILITY IF HE DID ANY OF THE THINGS THAT HE CLAIMS HE DID. I HAVE ALSO BEEN TO TWO OTHER REHABS. IF ONE PATIENT PHYSICALLY ASSAULTS ANOTHER, HARASSES/THREATENS/INTIMIDATES ANOTHER PATIENT OR STAFF MEMBER, THEY ARE DISCHARGED IMMEDIATLEY!!!! THIS IS A 'ZERO TOLERANCE', NO QUESTIONS ASKED POLICY, UNIVERSAL AMONG REHABS. THE FACILITY MUST PROTECT THE WELLFARE & SAFETY OF ALL PATIENTS, AND IF MR. FREY, THE WANNA-BE BADASS IS TO BE BELIEVED HE WAS A THREAT, AND WOULD HAVE BEEN REMOVED. WHAT HE CLAIMS HE DID COULD BE LIKENED TO BEING IN A REGULAR HOSPITAL AND HAVING THE PERSON IN THE NEXT BED,WAKE UP ONE NIGHT, START TO FREAK OUT, THREATEN YOU, PHYSICALLY HURT YOU, THEN PROCEED TO TRASH ALL THE FURNITURE IN THE ROOM, AND THE HOSPITAL STAFF DO NOTHING ABOUT IT. HE WOULD HAVE BEEN SENT TO A PSYCH WARD OR SOMETHING.

HE ALSO NEVER WOULD HAVE BEEN ALLOWED IN THE REHAB TO BEGIN WITH. SOMEONE WHO IS IN THAT KIND OF SHAPE MUST GO THROUGH A MEDICALLY MANAGED DETOX THAT THIS FACILTY DOES NOT OFFER. HE NEEDED MAJOR DENTAL SURGERY, STICHES, AND HIS NOSE RE-SET. ONLY WHEN HE HAD HAD THIS WORK DONE WOULD HE HAVE BEEN ALLOWED IN. PATIENTS MUST HAVE A MEDICAL CLEARANCE IN OPRDER TO BE ADDMITTED.

IF A PATIENT DECIDES THAT THEY ARE NOT GOING TO COMPLY WITH RULES, OR DO THE WORK THAT THEY ARE GIVEN, THEY'RE OUT-IT'S THAT SIMPLE. THERE ARE PLENTY OF PEOPLE OUT THERE WHO DO WANT THE HELP, AND MR. FREY WAS DOING NOTHING MORE THAN TAKING UP SPACE.

A COUNSELOR SPENDS APPROX. 4+ YEARS IN ORDER TO BE CREDENTIALED BY THE STATE IN ORDER TO WORK IN A REHAB. IT IS A LONG, DETAILED PROCESS. NO WAY IN HELL WOULD A COUSELOR DRIVE A PATIENT TO A REHAB TO PICK UP HIS GIRLFRIEND. HE NOT ONLY WOULD HAVE LOST HIS JOB, BUT IT WOULD HAVE ENDED HIS CAREER.

SO FREY ALSO CLAIMS THAT HE KILLED A PRIEST IN PARIS WHO TRIED TO TAKE ADVANTAGE OF HIM IN A CHURCH RECTORY. I WILL NEVER BE ONE TO DEFEND THA CATHOLIC CHURCH FOR ALL ITS COVER-UPS, BUT COME ON, PLEASE!! THIS PART IS JUST SO CONTRIVED AND FAKE, IT'S ALMOST LAUGHABLE. THE SAD PART IS, IT'S NOT LAUGHABLE-THIS IS A SICK BOOK THAT HAS THE POTENTIAL TO DO A LOT OF DAMAGE, ESPECIALLY TO THE PEOPLE WHO DON'T KNOW ANY BETTER.

I BOUGHT THIS BOOK BECAUSE THE HIGHER POWER PART OF THE AA PROGRAM HAS ALWAYS BEEN AN ISSUE FOR ME, ALTHOUGH I DO CONTINUE TO WORK THE PROGRAM ANYWAY. I WAS EXPECTING TO FIND AN ENLIGHTENING TAKE ON HOW TO DEAL WITH THIS, ONLY TO DISCOVER THAT FREY HAD A HIGHER POWER WHETHER HE WAS AWARE OF IT OR NOT: HE USED THE TAO;THAT WAS HIS HIGHER POWER.

IT'S SAD TO THINK THAT THIS BOOK COULD HAVE BEEN AN INSPIRATION. I STOPPED GOING TO MEETINGS FOR 2 YEARS BECAUSE I BECAME TIRED OF THEM. I WANTED SOMETHING DIFFERNET THAT I WAS NOT GETTING FROM AA. I AM BACK THERE NOW, AND IT HAS TAKEN ON A NEW MEANING FOR ME. I CAN SAY THAT FREY MAY HAVE HIS REASONS FOR NOT WANTING AA (EVEN THOUGH HE PRACTICED SOME OF ITS MAJOR PRICIPLES), BUT IT'S FOR ALL THE WRONG REASONS: HE DOESN'T QUITE UNDERSTAND THE PROGRAM, OR WHAT IT'S REALLY ALL ABOUT.

THIS BOOK IS ACTUALLY VERY MEAN SPIRITED AND SADISTIC. FREY KNOWS THIS IS A LIE, AND HE MUST BE THE MOST UNCONSCIONABLE PERSON TO WRITE A BOOK LIKE THIS, SENDING OUT A MESSAGE OF FALSE HOPE AND LIES TO SOMEONE WHO MIGHT BE ON THE VERGE OF ASKING FOR HELP, ONLY TO DECIDE NOT TO AFTER READING THIS PIECE OF TRASH.

OPRAH RECCOMMENDED THIS BOOK OUT OF IGNORANCE. SHE DOESN'T KNOW ANY BETTER. BUT TO THOSE OF US WHO DO, IT'S CLEAR RIGHT FROM AGE 1 THIS BOOK IS BY NO MEANS AMEMIOR-NOT EVEN CLOSE.

I DID NOT WRITE THIS REVIEW TO BE MEAN SPIRITED, AND COMPARE MY STORY WITH FREY'S. I WROTE THIS TO HOPEFULLY EDUCATE SOMEONE, AND MAYBE EVEN HELP SOMEONE BEFORE THEY READ THIS BOOK. IT'S NOT TRUE, AND THERE IS A BETTER WAY!!(NOT NECESSARILY AA EITHER. BUT, PLEASE DON'T TAKE THIS BOOK TO HEART, IT'S NOT WORTHY OF IT.

GOOD LUCK, AND BE WELL EVERYONE.
rows.title: BAD FICTION DISGUISED AS A MEMIOR

rows.text:
I MUST SAY THIS IS A TOTALLY DIFFERENT READ THAN WHAT I’M USED TO FROM GRIFFIN…BUT WHAT AN ESCAPE!! I LOVED EVERY MINUTE OF MEGAN AND LAURA! BEING A FAN OF ROAD TRIPS MYSELF I MUST SAY THESE TWO LADIES TAKE THE CAKE. THERE ISN’T ANYTHING DARK OR ANY INSANE EARTH SHATTERING DISCOVERIES. BUT WHAT THERE IS, IS…FRIENDSHIPS, LOVE, LAUGHTER, FAMILY, LIFE, JOKES, TEARS, FIGHTS, HEARTBREAK, LOYALTY, PASSION, WINE, WHISKEY…AND A STORY OF WHAT IT MEANS TO FIND ONESELF THROUGH A SEA OF EXPECTATIONS. LOL AND ALL THIS HAPPENS BECAUSE OF A ROAD TRIP! GET READY TO LOSE YOURSELF FOR AN EVENING IN THIS DELIGHTFUL YET DEEP READ, THAT DEMONSTRATES WHAT IT IS TO LOVE THOSE IN YOUR LIFE, AND FINDING OUT WHAT IT MEANS TO LOVE ONESELF. BEYOND EVERYTHING ANYONE HAS COME TO EXPECT, WAKING UP AND KNOWING EVERYTHING YOU DO IS BECAUSE IT MAKES YOU HAPPY! GAH I’M GUSHING AND I KNOW IT! #FANGIRL

S-ASS, MEGAN HAS WORKED SO HARD TO GET TO WHERE SHE IS. ALL HER FOCUS IS ON NAILING TODAY.
U-SHERED, A PULL HAS DIRECTED MEGAN HOME AND WHAT SHE SEES WILL LEAD HER TO A LIFE SHE COULD NEVER IMAGINE.
N-OTORIOUS, ALWAYS SO STRONG ALL MEGAN HAS EVER WANTED IS TO MAKE PARTNER HER DRIVE IS AN IMMOVABLE FORCE TO BE RECKONED WITH.
S-HAME, MEGAN HAS LEARNED A VERY IMPORTANT LESSON LATELY WITH THE HELP OF HER FAMILY AND FRIENDS SHE WILL FORGET THE MEMORIES THAT LAY JUST BEHIND HER EYELIDS.
H-OPE, LIFE HAS BROUGHT LAURA BACK BY MEGAN’S SIDE. TOGETHER THESE TWO WILL FIGURE OUT WHAT TO DO NEXT.
I-MMINENT, LEAVING HER LIFE WAS BOUND TO HAPPEN. MEGAN WILL LET PEOPLE BELIEVE WHAT THEY WANT BUT THE TRUTH IS ALL SHE WANTS IS TO FIGURE OUT WHO SHE REALLY IS.
N-ICE, A MEETING WITH HER FAMILY WILL GIVE MEGAN THE PUSH TO SOLIDIFY HER PLANS OF A NEW BEGINNING THAT WILL GIVE HER THE OPPORTUNITY TO REFLECT ON WHAT SHE TRULY WANTS.
E-SCAPE, A TRIP ACROSS THE COUNTRY WILL GIVE MEGAN AND LAURA THE MEANS TO FIND THEIR WAY IN THIS WORLD AND A BREAK FROM REALITY.

&

W-ORRY, MEGAN DOES NOT WANT TO FALL BACK INTO HER USUAL PATTERN. THIS TRIP WILL GIVE HER THE OPPORTUNITY TO MAKE DECISIONS SHE NEVER THOUGHT SHE WOULD.
H-IDDEN, BEHIND A MASK OF STRENGTH AND DETERMINATION IT IS VERY HARD FOR MEGAN TO GIVE UP HER USUAL CONTROL OF THINGS.
I-NTRUSION, KNOWING HER PAST COULD BE THERE WASN’T ENOUGH TO STOP MEGAN. ADMISSIONS OF LOVE WILL CAUSE GREAT PAUSE.
S-TRAINED, HURT BY THE ACTIONS OF THE PAST WILL CONFUSE MEGAN ENOUGH TO MAKE HER DECIDE ON ACTIONS THAT AREN’T NORMAL. A PAST LOVE IS NOT ENOUGH TO HEAL THE HURT FROM THE HEARTBREAK THAT ALTERED HER LIFE.
K-NOWINGLY, AWARE OF THE PULL MEGAN DEEMS HIM MAGIC BUT THERE ARE MANY THINGS THAT KEEP HER WALL UP. NEVERTHELESS WALKER HAS THIS PULL THAT WILL MAKE MEGAN CLOSE ALL OTHER DOORS AND OPEN HER HEART.
E-LUDE, MAKING A MOVE THAT COULD COST HER EVERYTHING WILL NOT STOP MEGAN AND LAURA FROM DOING WHAT THEY KNOW IS RIGHT. NOW MEGAN MUST FACE WHAT IS COMING HER WAY.
Y-ESTERDAY, THE PAST NO LONGER HAS A HOLD ON HER AND EVERYTHING IN HER FUTURE IS BRIGHT. TOGETHER WITH THE POSSIBILITIES OF WHAT COULD BE IS ALL THAT SHE WANTS. LOVE HAS FOUND ITS WAY BACK INTO HER HEART AND NO ONE PLANS ON LETTING GO ANYTIME SOON.

GAH THIS WAS SUCH A FUN READ!! I FU*&ING LOVE UNICORNS AND RAINBOWS!!!! EVERYTHING THAT MEGAN WENT THROUGH WAS REAL AND RELATABLE. WE'VE ALL BEEN THERE DOWN TO EVERY SINGLE FEELING SHE FELT. EVEN THE AMAZING BESTIE THAT JUST GETS YOU UNLIKE ANYONE ELSE. I WON’T SAY THIS IS A PERFECT FAIRYTALE CAUSE ITS NOT THERE IS PLENTY OF MISTAKES AND HEART ACHE BUT IT IS PERFECTLY IMPERFECT. I CANNOT RECOMMEND THIS ENOUGH FOR A WONDERFUL AFTERNOON FULL OF LAUGHTER AND KNOWING A WONDERFUL ENDING IS YET TO COME. I CAN’T WAIT FOR THIS SERIES TO CONTINUE. I’M CURIOUS TO SEE WHAT HAPPENS WITH LO AND ALL OF THE WONDERFUL CHARACTERS I’VE COME TO LOVE. THIS WAS A SURPRISE OF A READ FULL OF DELIGHTFUL MOMENTS AND THE END BROUGHT PLENTY OF HEARTFELT TEARS AND GOODBYES. I CANNOT RECOMMEND THIS ONE ENOUGH! MEGAN AND LAURA ARE AN EPIC TEAM AND I FELL IN LOVE WITH THEIR ADVENTURES!!

MY RATING

4.5 DEPOSITION, STAIN, RAMMING, NEXT DAY, STRAPLESS DRESS, BEST FRIEND, ROAD TRIP, SOCIAL MEDIA, CONCERTS, MUSTANG, ONE NIGHT STANDS, PETER, LOVE, MISTAKES, NAPA, WINE WHISKEY, INVESTMENTS, CHRISTMAS, VINEYARDS, PROPOSAL, TATTOO, BELIEVING IN MAGIC FILLED STARS!!! EEEEEEP I HEART THIS READ SO HARD!!!!!
