rows.title: Star Trek: Discovery Season 1 ...

rows.text:
THIS HAS GOT TO BE THE WORST, MOST UNREALISTIC MOVIE I'VE EVER SEEN. I DEMAND SCRUPULOUS REALISM FROM ALL MOVIES I SEE, PARTICULARLY ACTION MOVIES. AND ALTHOUGH I HATE ACTION MOVIES, AND SHOULD'VE KNOWN BETTER THAN TO GO SEE THIS ONE I'M GONNA REVIEW THIS ANYWAY BECAUSE REVIEWS OF GENRE FILMS COMING FROM NON-GENRE FANS ARE BY FAR THE MOST USEFUL SORT. AFTER ALL, IF I DON'T TELL PEOPLE THAT THEY WON'T LIKE THIS ACTION MOVIE IF THEY DON'T LIKE ACTION MOVIES, HOW WILL THEY EVER KNOW? THIS MOVIE IS SIMPLY RIDICULOUSLY ACTION PACKED. I'M PRETTY SURE THAT THERE ISN'T A SINGLE SECOND IN THIS FILM THAT DOESN'T CONTAIN VIOLENCE. WHO WOULD IMAGINE THAT AN ACTION MOVIE WOULD CONTAIN SO MUCH ACTION? NOT ME, AND I DOUBT THAT ANY WHO ACTUALLY SEES AND ENJOYS ACTION MOVIE ACTUALLY ENJOYS THE ACTION IN THEM, AND WOULD IN FACT PREFER THAT THEY CONTAIN A GREAT QUANTITY OF IT. AND IT'S ABSURDLY GOREY AND OFFENSIVE. THIS MOVIE SHOULD'VE BEEN NC-17, AND THE MPAA WAS SURELY BRIBED TO GIVE IT THE R RATING, AS NO REASONABLE ADULT COULD BELIEVE THAT THIS ACTUALLY DESERVED THE R, AND THAT THE VIOLENCE WAS SIMPLY PLAYFUL RIDICULOUS AND CARTOONISH. EVERYONE KNOWS THAT GORE IS INHERENTLY VERY OFFENSIVE, AND IS FAR WORSE THAN SIMPLY PORTRAYING VIOLENCE IN GENERAL. IF YOU EVER HAVE TO MURDER SOMEONE IN THE REAL WORLD I PLEAD WITH YOU TO POISON THEM OR SUFFOCATE THEM OR KILL THEM IN SOME OTHER NON-GRAPHIC FASHION. WE WILL ALL BE VERY APPRECIATIVE OF YOUR THOUGTFULNESS.
STILL, IT'S THE UNREALISM THAT REALLY BOTHERS ME. FOR EXAMPLE, HOW DID THE BRIDE TAKE THE SWORD ON THE PLANE? HOW? THIS COULDN'T POSSIBLY HAVE BEEN INTENTIONAL, AND WOULD'VE COMPLETELY RUINED THE MOVIE HAD IT NOT ALREADY SUCKED, EVEN THOUGH IT ONLY LASTED A FEW SECONDS. HOW DOES THE BRIDE SURVIVE BEING SHOT IN THE HEAD. IF ANYONE IN THE WORLD HAS EVER SURVIVED SEVERE HEAD TRAUMA MY NAME IS PHINEAS GAGE, WHICH IT AIN'T. THAT AND IF YOU WATCH CAREFULLY YOU CAN SEE THAT THERE WASN'T EVEN AN ENTRANCE WOUND. ARE WE TO BELEVE THAT HER BRAINS JUST BLASTED THEMSELVES OUT THE BACK OF HER HEAD. I DON'T THINK SO. AND HOW DID SHE KILL LIKE 50 GUYS AT ONCE, AND WHY DIDN'T ANYONE JUST STAB HER IN THE BACK, AND WHY DIDN'T A SINGLE PERSON IN A WHOLE DAMN YAKUZA CLAN NOT HAVE A GUN OF ANY SORT AND HOW COME THE POLICE NEVER SHOWED UP. SURE THOSE THINGS WOULD'VE INTERRUPTED THE ACTION AND FLOW OF THE MOVIE, BUT THAT DOESN'T MATTER BECAUSE IT'S NOT REALISTIC, AND TARANTINO AND ALL THE CRITICS OF THIS FILMS PROMISED THAT IT WOULD BE 100% REALISTIC. FURTHERMORE, SOME OF THE SCENES IN THIS MOVIE WERE IN BLACK AND WHITE AND OTHERS WERE ANIMATED. THE REAL WORLD IS IN FULL COLOR, AND IS NEVER ANIMATED. SUCH UNREALISTIC DISCREPENCIES CANNOT BE IGNORED. IT JUST GETS WORSE. UPON CLOSE INSPECTION, I REALIZED THAT THE FILM HAD ONLY 2 PHYSICAL DIMENSIONS, THUS MAKING IT ODDLY AND UNREALISTICALLY FLAT. THIS IS ABSOLUTELY RIDICULOUS AND UNBELIEVABLE. NOT ONLY THAT I NOTICED THAT SOME OF THE SOUNDS MADE DURING THE FILM WERE ACTUALLY COMING FROM BEHIND ME OR TO THE SIDE, DESPITE THE FACT THAT THE ACTION ALL TOOK PLACE IN THE FRONT. HOW IS THIS POSSIBLE. IT'S JUST ISN'T, SISTER. ALSO THIS MOVIE MOVED REPEATEDLY BACK AND FORTH IN TIME, WHICH IS, ONCE AGAIN, IMPOSSIBLE. IT'S ALMOST AS IF THIS MOVIE TOOK PLACE IN A COMPLETELY DIFFERENT UNIVERSE, WHICH IS JUST CRAZY. AS IF ANYONE WOULD WANT TO GO TO A MOVIE THEATER TO SEE SOMETHING WEIRD OR EXCITING OR DIFFERENT FROM THE REST OF THEIR LIVES. NOT ME. INSTEAD SQUARE-ANTINO SHOULD'VE MADE A MOVIE OF ME RIDING A BUS AND THEN WORKING FOR 2 HOURS. THAT WOULD'VE BEEN EXCITING, INSIGHTFUL AND AMAZING, AND UTTERLY REALISTIC. BUT ALAS WE ARE LEFT WITH THIS WORTHLESS TRIPE, WHICH IS ONLY OF VALUE TO SUCH CONFUSED, MORONIC INDIVIDUALS WHO INSIST ON GOING TO THE MOVIES TO SEE SOMETHING DIFFERENT FROM THE REAL WORLD.
rows.title: WHO DOES HE THINK HE'S FOOLING?? BOO!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

rows.text:
SEE ATTACHED PICTURES.

GRIPES, PROBLEMS, ETC.

COMPLETED BUILDING TODAY. I HAVE BUILT HUNDREDS OF KITS (IN FACT I JUST FINISHED 2 OTHER ELENCO KITS THIS LAST MONTH, NO PROBLEMS) AND THIS TECSUN 2P3 KIT IS PRETTY AWFUL AS FAR AS INSTRUCTIONS, FIT FINISH, TEST AND ALIGNMENT. ITS AWFUL. THE FIT AND FINISH IS THE WORST, QUALITY.

PWB ASSEMBLY GRIPES:
1. THIS KIT WAS NEVER “PROOF OF ASSEMBLY FOR HOME ASSEMBLERS” BY A LAYMAN DO IT YOURSELF KIT BUILDER. YOU APPEAR TO NEVER HAVE DONE ANY TRIAL ASSEMBLY WITH A HOME DIY KIT BUILDER GUYS TO GET BUGS OUT. I THINK I’M FIRST BECAUSE YOU HAVE SERIOUS MISTAKES, OMISSIONS, MISSING PARTS ETC., ESPECIALLY SEE #3, #11! REQUIRED FILING TO FIT! THAT’S JUST POOR QUALITY !

2. ARE THE BLUE TRACES SHOWN ON THE ASSEMBLY DRAWING JUMPER WIRES? IF SO YOU SAY NOTHING ABOUT THEM. WHAT DO I DO? FOR NOW I’LL ASSUME THEY ARE NOT JUMPER WIRES AND NOT ADD THEM. I DOUBLE CHECKED WITH MAGNIFYING GLASS AND THEY ARE TRACES.

3. MISSING PARTS FROM THE KIT. R13, R14 10K RESISTORS. YOU OBVIOUSLY HAVE NO QUALITY CONTROL ON BAGGING / KITTING THE PROPER PARTS, ALL THE CORRECT PARTS. YOU SHIPPED PARTS MISSING, SHORT!

4. POOR QUALITY RESISTOR, COLOR CHIPPING OFF, COLOR WASHED OUT, HARD TO READ. HAD TO VERIFY MANY WITH OHM METER.

5. MISSING MANY ASSEMBLY DETAILS. IE HOW MOUNT BATTERY HOLDER, HOW MOUNT ANTENNA.
ANTENNA WIRE CONNECTIONS UNCLEAR. OTHER KITS I’VE DONE SHOW LOOP STICK WIRES IN GREAT DETAILS, YOU DO NOT. ALSO “PLASTIC RIBBON” MISSING FROM ANTENNA MOUNT. SHOWN IN DRAWING,BUT ITS NOT IN THE KIT. MORE MISSING PARTS.

6. NO CHECK OFF FOR EACH COMPONENT AS INSTALLED.

7. POLARITY MARKING OF CAPACITOR HORRIBLY CONFUSING, INDUSTRY STANDARD IS TO LABEL A + SIGN ON PWA SILKSCREEN, YOUR HASH MARKS, WHAT THE HELL DO THEY MEAN? C13, WHAT IS POLARITY? THE PWB HAS HASH MARKS, NO PLUS SIGN. I ASSUME BY CAREFULLY CHECKING YOU MEAN HASH MARKS ON PWA IS +?????. CONFUSING!

8. NO LOGIC TO ASSEMBLY. SAYS, BUILD STAGES AND TEST, BUT HOW? START WITH WHICH? YOU SAY TEST COMPONENTS BUT GIVE NO WAY TO TEST THEM. DO YOU NEED TO BE COMPONENT TEST ENGINEER TO TEST THESE? YOU ARE SUPPOSED TO GIVE GOOD PARTS, I SHOULDN’T HAVE TO TEST THEM AGAIN.

9. MISSING GLUE. CHASSIS BOX WHITE PLATE FALLS OFF. NO GLUE IN KIT.

10. VOLUME CONTROL BOARD REQUIRED FILING WITH FILE TO GET THE PWA TO SNAP IN PLACE. IF YOU HAD EVER PROOFED ASSEMBLED THIS KIT, YOU WOULD HAVE CAUGHT THAT AND YOU DID NOT. POOR QUALITY!

11. IS THERE A SHIELD OVER C6, C7,R11? YOU SHOW A SHIELD CAN IN THE ASSEMBLY DRAWING, BUT NONE IN THE KIT. WHICH IS CORRECT, NO SHIELD, OR SHIELD CAN?

THIS IS ONE OF THE MOST HORRIBLE KITS I EVER PUT TOGETHER. ITS JUST AWFUL! I COMPARE YOU TO TEN TEC, EXCELLENT KITS, XTAL SET SOCIETY, EXCELLENT KITS, BORDEN RADIO KITS EXCELLENT; THOSE KIT COMPANIES ARE EXCELLENT, YOU ARE NOT.

FINAL ASSEMBLY GRIPES:

12. THE EARPHONE HOLE IS TOO SMALL AND NEEDS TO BE FILED BIGGER. MAJOR MISTAKE IN THE MECHANICAL DESIGN. SEE PICTURE. YOU NEVER PROOFED THIS KIT OR YOU WOULD HAVE CAUGHT THIS MAJOR MISTAKE!

13. THE FINISHED PRINTED WIRING BOARD PWA DOESN’T FIT PROPERLY IN THE CASE.

14. THE THREE MOUNTING SCREWS ATTACHING THE PWA TO CASE ARE VERY DIFFICULT TO LINE UP.
THERE IS A BIG BULGE IN THE PWA AND THE BOTTOM PLASTIC CASE DOESN’T FIT PROPERLY, SEE PICTURES. WHAT’S CAUSING THIS I DON’T KNOW AS IT A BLIND FIT AND I CAN’T SEE. SO THE CASE BULGES. SEE PICTURE.

15. KIT MISSING GLUE.

16. BOTH CONTROLS, VOLUME, AND TUNING CHAFE, RUB AND ARE VERY DIFFICULT TO TURN BECAUSE OF THE MECHANICAL FIT PROBLEMS. THE RADIO IS BARELY USEABLE THIS WAY. MECHANICAL IS AWFUL!

TEST/ ALIGNMENT GRIPES:

17. NO TEST EQUIPMENT LIST.

18. NO CLEAR CONCISE ALIGNMENT PROCEDURES WITH TEST EQUIPMENT, OR EVEN WITHOUT TEST EQUIPMENT.

19. NO ALIGNMENT SPECIFICATIONS, SETUP CONDITIONS, OR PROCEDURES.

20. CUT JUMPER AT GAPS A, B, C: VERY CONFUSING. WITH THEM OPEN THE KIT DOES NOT WORK.
JUMPER GAP CURRENTS: I’VE NEVER SEEN SUCH A THING! YOU NEVER EVER ASK CONNECTIONS TO BE DONE WITH SOLDER BLOBS ONLY, EVER!!!!!! SOLDER HAS NO STRENGTH!.

21. I CHECKED CURRENTS AT A, B, C ANYWAY, ALL THREE AT A, B, C IN SPECIFICATION. WHY YOU HAVE THE TESTER KIT BUILDER DO THIS IS BEYOND ME. IT ADDS NOTHING TO TELL YOU THE KIT IS WORKING. THEN YOU ARE UNCLEAR AS TO WHEN TO APPLY SOLDER BLOB JUMPER BRIDGE. WHICH?

22. TEST SELECT AND CHANGE RESISTORS R1, R5, R6? I’VE NEVER EVER SEEN THIS DONE IN ANY KITS. YOUR DESIGN SHOULD HAVE NO TEST SELECTS. BESIDES, CHANGING THESE LIKELY DOES NOT AFFECT READING MUCH. THIS IS JUST AWFUL AND WILL RESULT IN MORE DAMAGE TO THE PWB TRACES.

23. VOLTAGE TEST POINTS USELESS. ALSO REFERENCE TO GROUND?

24. NO 455 KHZ IF ALIGNMENT. I ENDED UP PEAKING FOR MAXIMUM MEASURING MVPP WITH MY OSCILLOSCOPE ACROSS THE SPEAKER TERMINALS AND A LOW LEVER RF GENERATOR OR SET TO 455 KHZ MODULATED 1 KHZ. PEAKED T2, T3.

BOTTOM LINE:

25. THE RADIO DOES WORK, BUT YOUR ASSEMBLY INSTRUCTIONS, TESTING , MECHANICAL DESIGN AND QUALITY, MISSING PARTS, NO ADEQUATE TESTING PROCEDURE NEEDS TO BE FIXED.
rows.title: TECSUN 2P3 KIT FULL OF ASSEMBLY AND MECHANICAL PROBLEMS

rows.title: OMG THAT WAS SOO AMAZING!!!!!!!!!

rows.text:
THIS IS THE FIRST BOOK BY MELISSA FOSTER THAT I HAVE EVER READ, WHICH INFLUENCED MY FEELINGS A LITTLE WHEN I WAS READING SEIZED BY LOVE BECAUSE IT IS PART OF THIS EXPANSIVE SERIES OF HERS, LOVE IN BLOOM, WHICH HAS THESE MINI-SERIES WITHIN IN IT AND THAT WAS A LITTLE DAUNTING AT FIRST. BUT, ALL I CAN SAY IS THAT I HAVE THE FIRST BOOK IN THIS SERIES, SISTERS IN LOVE, AND I WILL DEFINITELY BE READING THAT ASAP BECAUSE I COULD NOT GET ENOUGH OF THE WORLD THAT WAS DEPICTED IN SEIZED BY LOVE AND IF THE CHARACTERS IN THE OTHER BOOKS IN THIS SERIES ARE JUST AS AMAZING AS THE CHARACTERS IN THIS BOOK THEN I CAN’T WAIT FOR MORE EMOTIONALLY CHARGED AND OVERALL EPIC ROMANCES.

WHILE LIZZIE AND BLUE’S ROMANCE WAS SO ENGROSSING AND ADORABLE AND BASICALLY EVERYTHING I WOULD WANT WHEN I FIND THE PERSON WHO I AM MEANT TO SPEND THE REST OF MY LIFE WITH, THE SETTING OF THE BOOK AND HOW IT TOOK PLACE ON CAPE COD REALLY HIT HOME FOR ME AND HEIGHTENED ALL MY FEELINGS AND EMOTIONS UP A NOTCH. CAPE COD HOLDS A SPECIAL PLACE IN LIZZIE’S HEART BECAUSE SHE GREW UP THERE AND ALWAYS WANTED TO OPEN UP HER FLOWER SHOP IN PROVINCETOWN, OR P-TOWN, AND IT ALSO HOLDS A SPECIAL PLACE IN MY HEART BECAUSE COINCIDENTALLY MY FAMILY IS FROM BREWSTER AND I HAVE BEEN SPENDING MY SUMMERS THERE SINCE I WAS A BABY. THIS CONNECTION JUST MADE MY EXPERIENCE OF READING THIS BOOK SO MUCH MORE BECAUSE I COULD COMPLETELY PICTURE WHAT WAS GOING ON AND THEREFORE INVESTED SO MUCH INTO LIZZIE AND BLUE RELATIONSHIP AS THEY FINALLY REALIZE THEIR FEELINGS FOR EACH OTHER AFTER A YEAR OF KNOWING EACH OTHER AND DECIDE TO GO FOR IT.

LIZZIE BARBER COULD EASILY BE COMPARED TO WONDER WOMAN BECAUSE SHE DOES SO MUCH WITH HER BUSINESS AT HER FLOWER SHOP AND THEN WITH HER SECOND BUSINESS, THE WEBCAST THE NAKED BAKER, AND THEN IN BETWEEN SHE HAS TIME TO BRING THE LEFT OVER FLOWERS FROM HER SHOP TO UNATTENDED GRAVES AT THE CEMETERY AS WELL AS DROPS OFF THE TREATS SHE MAKES TO THE LOCAL HOMELESS SHELTER. SHE IS SELFLESS, KIND, UNBELIEVABLY DETERMINED, AND FIERCELY LOYAL TO HER FAMILY ESPECIALLY HER SISTER MADDY WHOM SHE IS SUPPORTING FINANCIALLY AS SHE ATTENDS COLLEGE. I WAS IN AWE OF HOW MUCH STRENGTH AND GENEROSITY LIZZIE HAD BECAUSE IT MADE HER SO PERSONABLE AND I ADMIRED HER SO MUCH FOR WHAT SHE WAS DOING ESPECIALLY WITH HER WEBCAST SINCE IT WAS NOT SOMETHING SHE WANTED TO CONTINUE DOING BUT SHE DID IT ANYWAY BECAUSE OF HER SISTER. SHE VERY MUCH INSPIRES YOU THROUGH THE WORK SHE DOES BECAUSE REGARDLESS OF HOW SHE FEELS ABOUT CONTINUING TO FILM HER WEBCAST SHE APPROACHES IT FROM A BUSINESS STANDPOINT AND USES HER KNOWLEDGE TO TURN IT INTO A PROFIT THAT WILL HELP HER SISTER. INTELLIGENCE, GENEROSITY, LOYALTY, AND DETERMINATION ARE ALL QUALITIES THAT LIZZIE EMBODIES AND IT WAS SUCH A JOY TO SEE THEM COME TO LIFE THROUGHOUT THE BOOK.

I CAN PRETTY MUCH SUM UP BLUE RYDER WITH ONE WORD: PERFECTION. NOW IT MAY BE BOLD TO USE THAT WORD BUT HONESTLY HE IS PERFECTION. THE MORE I READ, THE MORE I THOUGHT “COULD HE GET ANYMORE PERFECT?” AND THE ANSWER TIME AFTER TIME WAS YES. WHILE I AM NOT COMPLETELY SOLD ON HIS NAME, BLUE AS A PERSON, MORE SPECIFICALLY AS A MAN, COULD PUT A LOT OF THE MALE POPULATION TO SHAME. HIS HONESTY AND THE AFFECTION HE SHOWED TOWARD LIZZIE MADE MY HEART FLUTTER SO MANY TIMES I LOST TRACK. SOME OF HIS CONFESSIONALS TO LIZZIE WERE JUST SO SINCERE AND GENUINE THAT I ALMOST DIDN’T REALLY BELIEVE HIM BECAUSE I DIDN’T HAVE THE PREVIOUS CONTEXT THAT THEY HAD KNOWN EACH OTHER ALREADY FOR A YEAR. ONCE I WAS ABLE TO TAKE THAT INTO CONSIDERATION, THE DEGREE OF SEPARATION I FELT FROM NOT HAVING READ THOSE PREVIOUS MEMORIES BETWEEN THEM QUICKLY FADED AND I FELL FOR BLUE AS HARD AS LIZZIE DID IN THE BOOK. I DARE SOMEONE TO READ THIS BOOK AND TRY NOT TO FALL IN LOVE WITH BLUE BECAUSE IT IS NOT POSSIBLE. MEN SHOULD TAKE NOTES BECAUSE BLUE CAN ABSOLUTELY SHOW THEM HOW IT IS DONE.

OBVIOUSLY NOT READING ANY OF THE PREVIOUS BOOKS IN THE LOVE IN BLOOM SERIES IMPACTED MY READING OF SEIZED BY LOVE A LITTLE BUT I HONESTLY THINK THAT YOU ARE STILL ABLE TO GAIN ENOUGH CONTEXT THAT BY THE MIDDLE OF THE BOOK THAT DOES NOT EVEN MATTER. THE SETTING, THE CHARACTERS, AND THE ROMANCE WHICH WAS BOTH ADORABLY HEARTWARMING AND WONDERFULLY GENUINE WILL PULL YOU IN FROM THE VERY BEGINNING LEAVING YOU ENGROSSED IN LIZZIE AND BLUE’S RELATIONSHIP AS THEY TACKLE OBSTACLES THAT ARISE OVERCOMING THEM AND DISCOVERING HOW POWERFUL IT IS WHEN YOU FIND THE ONE YOU ARE MEANT TO BE WITH. THEY ARE SEIZED BY THEIR LOVE FOR ONE ANOTHER AND I GUARANTEE YOU WILL BE TOO AS YOU WITNESS HOW KNOWING EACH OTHER FOR A YEAR SET THEM UP FOR A LOVE THAT WILL LAST THEM THE REST OF THEIR LIVES.
rows.title: A heartwarmingly adorable and wonderfully genuine romance!!

rows.text:
PROCOL HARUM, TO PUT IT BLUNTLY, STARTED OFF WONDERFULLY WEIRD WITH A WHITER SHADE OF PALE, AND GOT EXPONENTIALLY WEIRDER WITH SEEMINGLY EVERY NEW RELEASE. THIS IS NOT MEANT AS AN INDICTMENT, BUT RATHER AS AN ENDORSEMENT OF THEIR MELODICALLY POETIC APPROACH TO PROGRESSIVE ROCK (?) MUSIC.

GARY BROOKER, RATHER THAN PURPORTING TO BE A SAVANT (A LA KEITH EMERSON OR RICK WAKEMAN), PLAYS THE PIANO WITH A CLASSICALLY TRAINED, ALBEIT EMPHATIC, RESERVE - A TOOL FOR THE COMPOSITION OF A GREATER WORK. BROOKER KNOWS WHEN TO BOB AND WHEN TO WEAVE - IN SHORT, WHEN TO YIELD TO A MORE POWERFUL INSTRUMENT (TROWER'S GUITAR, WILSON'S DRUMMING), OR TO A POTENT LYRIC - OR TO HIS OWN CONSIDERABLE VOCAL BREADTH.

TRUE, THE ONE CONSTANT TO PROCOL HARUM'S PECULIARITY IS THE LYRIC, AS CONSTRUCTED BY THE MAD POET, KEITH REID. AS THE ONLY LYRICIST I CAN THINK OF CONSIDERED (AND DESERVEDLY SO) AN OFFICIAL MEMBER OF THE BAND, REID PAINTS SOME OF THE MOST ENIGMATIC AND YES, PRETENTIOUS PORTRAITS IN ALL OF ROCK MUSIC.

ROBIN TROWER WILL ALWAYS BE THE QUINTESSENTIAL GUITARIST OF PROCOL HARUM. TROWER ALWAYS WEAVES HIS MELODIES INTO THE CONTEXT OF THE MATERIAL. FEW GUITARISTS ARE CAPABLE OF THE RANGE TROWER TYPICALLY EXERCISES - FROM WANTON BEAUTY TO LURID EMPHASIS, WITH SOME OF THE SAME RESERVE EMPLOYED BY BROOKER.

B.J. WILSON ON PERCUSSION, AND CHRIS COPPING ON ORGAN AND BASS KEYBOARD, PROVIDE AN EFFICIENT, UNCOMMONLY TASTEFUL RHYTHM SECTION - ANOTHER KEY COMPONENT TO PROCOL'S UNIQUE BLEND. WILSON CANNOT BE IGNORED FOR HIS ROLE IN SHAPING PROCOL'S SIGNATURE SOUND - QUICK SNARE DRUMMING, A SLAPPING, FLAT BASS DRUM, ALWAYS BALANCED BY TINNY CIMBALS TO CREATE A DISTINCTIVE, DRIVING BACKBEAT ENGINE. CHRIS COPPING WOULD LATER TRANSCEND HIS YEOMAN EFFORT HERE FOR A STRONGER ROLE IN THE SHAPING OF GRAND HOTEL, PROCOL HARUM'S ELEGANT FOLLOW-UP TO BARRICADES.

BROKEN BARRICADES, THEIR 1971 RELEASE, IS PERHAPS, ON BALANCE, THEIR GREATEST WORK. TYPICALLY, THE TITLE CUT IS SURE TO STRIKE A DIFFERENT CHORD WITH EVERY LISTENER, DUE TO ITS AMBIGUOUS LYRIC AND SORROWFUL MELODY. [I, FOR INSTANCE, HAVE NEVER BEEN ABLE TO LISTEN TO THE TUNE WITHOUT VISIONS OF THE SEIGE OF TROY - BUT THAT'S JUST ME]; OF COURSE, YOU WON'T GET ANY ADVICE FROM EITHER REID OR BROOKER ON SONG INTERPRETATION - AND THAT'S THE BELLY OF THE BEAST THAT IS PROCOL HARUM.

THE ALBUM BEGINS WITH SIMPLE SISTER, APOCALYPTIC PROCOL - BROOKER'S VOCAL AND PIANO FRAMING A TERRIFIC BACKBEAT, A DEFT UNDERPINNING FOR THE BROOKER-PENNED LEAD AND BASS RIFFS. MEMORIAL DRIVE IS ITS MATCHING BOOKEND (THOUGH A REID/TROWER COMPOSITION) WITH ANOTHER SUPERB BACKBEAT AND STILL ANOTHER COOL TROWER HOOK. POWER FAILURE IS MORE OF THIS SAME POWERFUL HARUM GROOVE, WITH WILSON'S PERCUSSION MIXED TO THE FOREFRONT AND CAPPED BY BROOKER'S OVERDUBBED CHORUS.

AS ALWAYS, PROCOL HARUM DISPLAYS A WONDERFUL SENSE OF HUMOR AMIDST ALL THAT LYRICAL TRAGEDY AND MELODIC DRAMA, AND NOWHERE IS IT BETTER SHOWN THAN ON THIS RELEASE. LUSKUS DELPH IS A NONE TOO WELL DISGUISED, LEWD PAEN TO THE FEMALE ANATOMY.

POOR MOHAMMED AGAIN FEATURES TROWER'S WRITING TALENT, IN AN EARSTWHILE ROCKER WITH A SAUCY TROMBONE/SLIDE GUITAR MIX. TROWER'S TRIBUTE TO THE THEN RECENTLY DEPARTED JIMI HENDRIX, SONG FOR A DREAMER, PRESAGES HIS ESOTERIC LEANINGS LATER REALIZED IN HIS SUCCESSFUL SOLO CAREER. PLAYMATE OF THE MOUTH IS BROOKER WITH HIS TONGUE IN CHEEK, BUT HE DOESN'T SCRIMP ON HIS SIGNATURE PRODUCTION STYLINGS, AS TROMBONES AGAIN ABOUND.

FOR PROCOL HARUM, THE DRAMA IS CREATED BY THE MUSIC; THE STORY SPAWNED FROM THE LYRICS. BROOKER NEVER SHIES AWAY FROM PRODUCTION, AND HIS USE OF HORN AND STRING ARRANGEMENTS IS INGENUOUS, VITAL AND BEATIFIC, NEVER STRAINED OR PRETENTIOUS. KEITH REID REFUSES TO ALLOW LOGIC (OR PRETENSE) TO CORRAL HIS REMARKABLE ABILITY TO BEND A PRETTY PHRASE, HOWEVER NON-SENSICAL. TOGETHER, BROOKER AND REID DEFINE PROCOL HARUM, AND THEY BOTH SHINE ON BROKEN BARRICADES.
rows.title: PROCOL'S EXQUISITE BEST

rows.text: tHE DESCRIPTION OF THIS TROWEL IS VERY UNCLEAR AND AFTER READING THE COMMENTS, AND THOSE WHO HAVE SAID THEY HAVE DONE DRYWALL FOR 20 PLUS YEARS, I NOW KNOW WHY I SEE SO MANY STRUGGLE. i CAN'T EVEN WORD THE QUESTION PROPERLY TO GET THE ANSWER I NEED SO I FIGURED THIS MAY HELP MANY OTHERS. DRYWALL EDGES LENGTH WISE HAS A CONCAVE SECTION APPROX. 2" WIDE ON EVERY 4' PIECE. CALLED THE "FLATS". THE 4' WIDTH PART IS CALLED THE "BUTT" THESE ARE NOT CONCAVED. THEY ARE THE SAME THICKNESS AS THE VERY MIDDLE OF THE SHEET. a TRUE DRYWALL TROWEL HAS A CAMPHOR, LIKE A SNOW SKI. IF YOU SET IT ON A FLAT SERVIDE LIKE A COUNTER TOP, DEPENDING ON THE LENGTH OF THE TROWEL YOU CAN SLIDE A PIECE OF CARDBOARD, OR SAY 2 QUARTERS STACKED ON EACH OTHER, UNDER THE VERY MIDDLE OF THE TROWEL. THIS IS FOR THE FLATS, AND BUTT JOINTS. TAPE WITH A 6"KNIFE, NOT A TROWEL. TROWELS COME IN DIFFERENT LENGTHS. 10" , 10.5" 12" , 14", & 16". i LOVE MY 16". THE MIDDLE SIZE TROWELS ARE USED FOR THE 2ND COAT. CONSTANT PRESSURE IN, PLENTY OF MUD, NUMEROUS PASSES UNTIL A VERY SMOOTH FINISH. wORKING THE AIR BUBBLES OR DRY COMPOUND ETC. DRY OVER NIGHT.  IF YOU USE THE RIGHT AMOUNT OF MUD, YOU WILL LEAVE SOME BEHIND AT BOTH ENDS OF THE TROWEL. NOT EVERYTIME, WHEN YOU GET THE AMOUNT JUST RIGHT. IT DOESN'T MATTER, USE YOUR 6" KNIFE AND CLEAN IT UP. PUT MORE PRESSURE AWAY FROM THE MIDDLE OF THE SEAM, AND YOU WILL REMOVE ANY RIDGE.  I USE THE 12" TROWEL FOR THIS AND THE 10.5 FOR MY OUTSIDE CORNERS. THIRD COAT, EITHER THE 14 OR 16" TROWEL. REPEAT THE SAME PROCESS. PRESSURE IN MAKING NUMEROUS PASSES TO SMOOTH OUT. REMOVE ANY COMPOUND THAT SNEAKS OUT AT THE ENDS OF THE TROWEL. NOW THE BUTTS. YOU HAVE 2 PIECES THE SMAE THICKNESS BUTTING EACH OTHER AND YOUR ADDING DRYWALL COMPOUND AND DON'T WANT TO SEE ANY BUILT UP LUMP. FIRST TRY AND AVOID TOTAL BUTTS WHEN HANGING. MAKE YOUR SEAMS FALL OVER DOORS OR WINDOWS IN THE MIDDLE. BEST NOT TO BREAK AT THE CORNERS. TRIMMING, YOU WILL HAVE A LARGER THAN NORMAL WALL THICKNESS, RIGHT AT THE POINT WHERE YOUR TRIM BUTTS EACH OTHER. WHEN YOU HAVE A FULL 4' BUTT, I USE MY 12" TROWEL AND DO MY 2ND COAT RIGHT AFTER i TAPE IT. NO WAIT. DON'TAPPLY AS MUCH PRESSURE. uSE YOUR 6" KNIFE TO ADD A LITTLE TO THE OUTSIDES OF THE MUD. ON THE 3RD COAT, I USE MY 14 OR 16" AND HIT BOTH SIDES OF THE BUTT SEAM, MIDDLE OUT. NOW I'M OUT 32" REMOVE RIDGES ON THE OUTER AREAS. BECAUSE THERE WAS MUD APPLIED WHEN YOU TAPED, THE 3RD COAT WILL DRY SOONER PULLING THE WATER INTO THE DRY COMPOUND. I THEN USR MY 16" DOWN THE MIDDLE OF THE BUTT WITH A FAIR OUT OF PRESSURE, AND MY 6" TO FEATHER THAT INTO WHAT I HAVE THERE FROM THE NED COAT. REMEMBER I MADE 2 PASSES ONE ON EACH SIDE. NOW I'M ABOUT 32 " WIDE, AND FEATHERED OUT. THE LAST COAT THE I ALREADY STATED GOES RIGHT UP THE MIDDLE OF THE  BUTT. THE MUD GOES ANOTHER AO" OR SO BEYOND THAT ON BOTH SIDES. USE YOUR 6" KNIFE AGAIN LIKE YOUR SKIM COATING A WALL, AT THE EDGES OF YOUR OAST PAST WITH 16" TROWEL AND AT THE OUTSIDE OF THE DOUBLE PASS YOU MADE ON THE SECOND COAT. SO NOW YOUR BUTT JOINT IS ABOUT 3 FT. WIDE, AND FEATHERED TO A FLAT SURFACE. YOU CAN REMOVE SMALL RIDGES WITH YOUR KNIFE, AND SKIM ANY AREA'S YOU FEEL NEED TOUCHING UP. YOU CANNOT DO THIS WITH A PLASTERING TROWEL. YOU CAN, BUT DOING A WHOLE HOUSE WITH THE WRONG TROWELS IS A NIGHTMARE. PLASTERING TROWELS ACTUALLY WITH HAVE A SMALL UPWARD TURN SO IT DOESN'T DIG INTO THE PLASTER OR COMPOUND. THE DRYWALL ROWEL IS SHAPED LIKE A C, EXAGGERATION YES. SO THE ITEM DESCRIPTION FOR THIS TROWEL IS NOT CLEAR. TWO DIFFERENT TOOLS COMPLETELY. oFTEN WHEN I'M DOING ANY PLASTERING OR SKIP TROWELING A CEILING I USE A POOL TROWEL. THE ENDS OF THE TROWEL ARE ROUND OR OVAL. THE SHAPE OF THE TOWEL IS FLAT OR EVEN SLIGHTLY TURNED AWAY FROM THE SURFACE YOUR WORKING ON. THE POOL TROWEL ALSO COMES IN A 10 AND 14". MY DAYS  PUSHING ON A 14" TO SKIP TROWEL A CEILING ARE IN THE REARVIEW. i USE THE LARGER WITH 2 HANDS IF I'M REALLY WORKING A PLASTER WALL AND WANT IT LIKE GLASS. SPRAYING WITH WATER AND REALLY RUBBING IT OUT, SAME AS FINISHING CRETE. jUST ON THE WALL. I WOULD BE HESITANT TO BUY THESE TROWELS OR ANY ONLINE. KIND OF LIKE A HAMMER OR HOCKEY STICK, IT HAS TO FEEL RIGHT. TRYING TO PLASTER WITH A DRYWALL TROWEL WILL ALWAYS BE A FIGHT.  A BIG WASTE OF TIME. LOOK DOWN THE TROWEL IF IT'S BOWED UP TOWARDS THE HANDLE IT'S FOR DRYWALL. IT ITS FLAT ITS FOR PLASTERING. A 12" FLAT PLASTERING TROWEL WORKS GREAT FOR SKIP TROWELING. THERE IS STILL A TENDENCY TO STILL CATCH YOUR CORNERS, SO DUE TO AGE  I HAVE GONE TO THE POOL TROWEL SHAPE. AND USE IT FOR PLASTERING ALSO.  I USE  THE LONGER ONE WHEN I'M FINISHING THE BOTTOM OF A CONCRETE TABLE, OR FOR THE TOP IF ITS A IN PLACE POUR. SORRY FOR THE LONG SCRIP, HOPE THIS HELPS MANY.
rows.title: DIFFERENCE BETWEEN A DRYWALL AND PLASTER TROWEL.

rows.text:
THIS IS THE 2ND BOOK IN THE 3 BOOK TRILOGY. .. ITS A VERY VERY GOOD BOOK THAT I ABSOLUTELY LOVED.... THE 1ST BOOK IN THIS TRILOGY IS CALLED " INSIDE", AN EVEN MORE AWSOME READ!!! I USUALLY ONLY LOVE JUST ROMANCE NOVELS, BUT BRENDA TALKED ME INTO TRYING A SUSPENCE ROMANCE NOVEL SO I DID & LOVED THESE 3 BOOKS... BRENDA HAS AN AWSOMELY GREAT NACK AT CAPTURING YOUR INTREST & HOLDING IT TIL THE VERY END.. YOU ACTUALLY DON'T WANT IT TO STOP!!! I KNOW I DIDN'T. "IN SECONDS" WAS OF COURSE THE 2ND BOOK TO THE 1ST BOOK "INSIDE". THIS BOOK RESUMES A COUPLE OF YEARS LATER FROM THE 1ST ONE & KEEPS YOU INFORMED OF WHAT HAS BEEN GOING ON SINCE THE 1ST BOOK ENDED. I'M GRATEFUL TO BRENDA FOR ALWAYS DOING THAT. I HATE ENDING A BOOK & NEVER KNOW WHAT HAD BECOME OF THE MAIN CHARACTERS!!! THIS BOOK HELP INFORM EVERYONE, PLUS HAD MORE HEAT & ACTION TO KEEP YOU ENTERTAINED!!! THIS BOOK DEALS MORE ABOUT PART OF THE DANGEROUS GANG FROM BOOJ 1, BUT THIS ONE ALSO DEALS MORE WITH THE HERO OF BOOK1'S SISTER & HER HOT SEXY WIDOWED SHERIFF NEIGHBOR, WHO HAS A TEENAGE 13 YR OLD DAUGHTER.
SHE & HER BROTHER & HIS WIFE, CHILD, WITH ANOTHER ON THE WAY, & REX-AKA EX-PRETTY BOY. THEY ALL TOOK OFF FROM THE WITSEC BC SOMEHOW TTHERE'S A MOLE & THE GANG WHOSE AFTER THEM KEEP FINDING THEM, SO THEY ALL DESIDE TO LEAVE WITSEC & GO THERE SEPERATE WAYS SO THEY WONT BE SO EASY TO FIND TOGETHER. THINGS SEEM FINE FOR ALMOST 2 YRS AFTER SPITTING UP, UNTIL 1 DAY WHEN SHE HEARS ABOUT A HORRIBLE MURDER THAT JUST DOESN'T SOUND OR SET RIGHT WITH HER-ESPECIALLY SINCE THE SMALL TOWN IS USUALLY MURDER FREE ATLEAST HAS BEEN FOR SEVERAL YEARS. SO SHE GETS NERVOUS & TRIES TO FIND OUT WHAT HER HOT SEXY NIEGHBOR WILL TELL HER, BUT THE PROBLEM IS, SHE'S BEEN AVOIDING HIM SINCE SHE MOVED THERE, NOT ONLY BC HER BROTHER TELLS HER NOT TO TRUST COPS BC THEY CAN BE DIRTY, BUT BC SHE KNOWS HE'S HOT & SEXY & SHE'S NOT READY FOR A NEW RELATIONSHIP BC SHE & HER 2 SMALL KIDS MAY HAVE 2 TAKE OFF IN A SECONDS NOTICE IF THE GANG FINDS HER & SHE ALSO DOESN'T WANT TO PUT HIM IN DANGER, ESPECIALY SINXE HIS WIFE DIED FROM CANCER 3-4YRS AGO & HIS 13YR OLD DAUGHTER WOULD BE POSSIBLY PARENTLESS IF ANYTHING WOULD HAPPEN. ALTHOUGH, ATTRACTION HAS A MIND OF ITS OWN & CHEMISTRY CAN'T BE DENIED. SO, WHAT SHOULS SHE DO??? SHE DECIDES SHE'S TIRED OF RUNNING & WANTS A MORE NORMAL LIFE, WITH A MAN IN IT. 1ST SHE NEEDS TO FIND OUT ABOUT THE MURDER & TALK TO HER BROTHER, WHO SHE'S SUPPOSE TO ONLY CONTACT IN CASE OF EMERGANCIES ONLY & THERE 1 TIME A WK E-MAIL. SHE GOES 2 E-MAIL HIM TO FIND 1 FROM HIM TO SAY REX WAS MISSING & HASN'T BEEN HEARD OF FOR OVER 2WKS.. FEAR RUNS THROUGH HER, HER & REX USED TO DATE & STILL CARED DEEPLY FOR 1 ANOTHER, THEY JUST COULDN'T BE TOGETHER BC THERE USED TO THERE OWN WAYS.. SHE DOES FIND OUT FROM HER BRO THAT 1 OF THE GANG MEMBERS WHO FOUND HER & HER 2 SMALL KIDS IN BOOK 1, WHO ALSO WAS TRYING 2 RAPE HER BEFORE KILLING HER, BUT REX-PRETTY BOY COULDN'T STAND IT, HE WAS WITH THEM TO TRACK HER DOWN BC THE GANG WAS REALLY AFTER HER BRO & TO GET TO HIM THROUGH HER DEATH & HER KID'S WOULD SENT HER BRO A MESSAGE, BUT REX WAS BEST FRIENDS WITH VIRGIL-SKIN FOR 14YRS IN PRISON & THOUGHT OF THEM AS FAMILY BC HE GOT TO READ ALL VIRGILS LETTERS & PIC'S FROM HIS SIS THROUGH THE YRS. THAT HE COULDN'T BARE WHAT WAS ABOUT TO HAPPEN, SO HE TOOK MATTERS IN HIS OWN HANDS, WHICH LANDED HIM WITH A BOUNTY ON HIS HEAD FOR SAVING HER & THE KIDS & KILLING HIS "SO CALLED BROTHERS FROM THE GANG". THAT'S HOW HE GOT IN WITSEC ALSO. BUT, WHILE HE'S IN L, A.- THE LAST PLACE REX SHOULD BE, HE HERES THAT 1 OF THE GUYS HE SHOT (WHO) SERVIVED BARELY, HAD BROKEN OUT OF PRISON WITH SOME YOUNG 19YR OLD KID THAT WANTED TO BE IN THE GANG. THEY FOUND OUT HER CLOSE AREA BC SHE HAD CALLED HER MOM FROM A PAY 9HONE A LIL WAYS OUTTA TOWN, SO THERE DEFFENITELY LOOKING FOR HER. REX COMES TO HER HELP, BUT HE'S NOT DOING SO GOOD HIMSELF BC HE WAS DETOXING BY HIMSELF TO GET OF PILLS WHEN HE HEARD THE NEWS. BY THE TIME HE SHOW UP THOUGH, SHE & THE HOT NIEGHBOR HAD AGREED TO A NO STRINGS JUST A RELEASE DATE NIGHT, HER IDEA-DEFINITELY NOT HIS. HE'S REALLY CRAZY ABOUT HER, BUT SHE'S CRAZY BOUT HIM BUT DON'T WANT TO HURT HIM OR GET HIM HURT. BUT REX NOTICES THE TENSION BETWEEN THE 2 & KNOWS SOMETHINGS UP!! THEY'VE BOTH MOVED ON BUT STILL LOVE & CARE FOR 1 ANOTHER. HE JUST DOESN'T LIKE BEING REPLACED BY A "COP" OF ALL PPL. HE TEASES A BIT.. BUT THEY HAVE MORE IMPORTANT MATERS TO ATTEND 2.. I'M NOT GOING TO INTO THE WHOLE BOOK, YOU'LL NEED TO BUY ALL OF THEM TO FIND OUT ALL I LEFT OUT PLUS ALL I DIDN'T FINISH, BUT ITS TRULY WORTH THE PRICE & TIME FOR THIS 3 BOOK TRILOGY! !!! HAVE A GOOD READ & ENJOY THEM LIKE I DID!!!! :-) LOVE ME SOME ROMANCE & LOVE!!!!!

rows.text: I READ THE HUNGER GAMES TWO YEARS AGO AND NEVER HAD A CHANCE TO WRITE A REVIEW. I WASN'T ONE OF THE EARLIEST FANS BUT I READ THE BOOK IN 2011 AND TO BE HONEST I WASN'T A BOOKS PERSON BACK THEN. BUT AFTER I READ THE HUNGER GAMES, I HAD THIS SUDDEN URGE TO READ MORE AND MORE OF ANYTHING. SO I ASKED MY FRIENDS ABOUT RECOMMENDATIONS, I WENT TO THE LIBRARY AND CHECKED THE INTERNET AND PRETTY SOON THERE WERENT MANY BOOKS LEFT THAT I HAVENT READ REALLY. HUNGER GAMES REALY GAVE ME THE LOVE OF READING. I REALLY LEARNED THE MEANING OF READING ONCE I READ THESE BOOKS. BEFORE THAT, I USED TO JUST SKIP OVER THE PAGES, FALL ASLEEP WHILE I READ BECAUSE I JUST COULD NOT FOCUS WHEN I KEPT THINKING OF OTHER THINGS, LIKE I DIDN'T UNDERSTAND THE POINT OF READING WHEN I COULD JUST WATCH THE MOVIE OR GO OUT AND CHILL. WELL HUNGER GAMES PRETTY MUCH CHANGED THAT FOR ME. I REALLY UNDERSTOOD WHAT A NARRATOR DOES TO A READER BECAUSE I CAN PUT MYSELF IN THEIR SHOES AND EMPATHIZE WITH THEM AND EXPERIENCE THEIR WOLRD AS IF IT WAS MY OWN LIFE. I THOUGHT ABOUT KATNISS IN MY HEAD AND IMAGINED MY SELF AS HER, EVEN THOUGH WE DON'T HAVE THAT MANY SIMILARITIES. BUT I THOUGHT ABOUT MYSELF AS HER AND THOUGHT WHAT WOULD IT BE LIKE IF I HAD THIS LIFE? I GOT HOOKED IN SUPER EASILY AND FOCUSED QUICKLY TOO AND I JUST COULD NOT STOP READING. SO I READ THEM ALL IN THREE DAYS AND I READ THEM ALL AGAIN BECAUSE FIRST TIME I READ THEM I READ THEM SO FAST THAT I DIDN'T EVEN KNOW HOW I FINISHED IT. I HAD NEVER READ ANYTHING FASTER. SO I READ THEM ALL AGAIN. AND I TOLD ALL MY FRIENDS ABOUT THEM AND THEY WERE LIKE "YOU'RE SO OBSESSED!!" AND THEN I MADE SOME PEOPLE READ THEM AND SOME PEOPLE JUST DON'T LIKE READING SO THEY WERE LIKE "NO THANKS, I'M JUST GONNO WATCH THE MOVIE" AND I DON'T KLNOW WHAT TO TELL THOSE PEOPLE OTHER THAN THAT READING IS SOMETHING THAT GROWS IN YOU, IT'S NOT JUST SOMETHING THAT YOU TELL YOUR SELF ABOUT AND IT HAPPENS. AND BECAUSE I AM AN OBSESSED FAN I HAVE QUITE A RIDICULOUS AMOUNT OF THINGS RELATED TO THE HUNGER GAMES. I HAVE ALL THE BOOKS AND I ALSO HAVE A COPY OF THE FIRST BOOK IN MY NATIVE LANGUAGE WHICH IS TURKISH. I HAVE FOUR BOOKMARKS. I HAVE THIS MAGAZINE FROM THE EDITORS OF US AND I BOUGHT IT BEFORE THE MOVIE CAME OUT AND SAW LOTS OF SNEAK PEEKS WHICH WAS PRETTY DARN COOL. I AM OBSESSED WITH JOSH HUTCHERSON. HE IS JUST SO CUTE, I CAN'T DESCRIBE HOW MUCH HE FITS FOR THE ROLE AND HOW GLAD I WAS WHEN THEY CHOSE HIM AS PEETA. I WASN'T REALLY SURE ABOUT JENNIFER LAWRENCE FIRST BUT NOW I LIKE HER AND THE REST OF THE CAST IS ALSO AMAZING. I WAS ONLY SURPRIZED BY CINNA'S ACTOR BUT WHEN I READ THE BOOK AGAIN, I SAW THAT I MISSED IT, AND I IMAGINED HIM COMPLETELY DIFFERENT IN MY HEAD BUT IT'S OKAY, HE WAS STILL AWESOME, AND I FOLLOWED THE WHOLE CAST ON INSTAGRAM AND TWITTER AND I LOVED IT WHEN THEY POSTED PICTURES AND SNEAK PEEKS FROM BEHIND THE SCENES, I WAS SO THANKFUL. AND I POSTED SO MANY THINGS ON FACEBOOK ALL THE TIME, MY FRIENDS STARTED CALLING ME "HUNGER GAMES". I HAVE FOLDERS, AND PENS, I HAVE THE PIN, I HAVE A CARD NECKLASE, I HAVE A T-SHIRT, I HAVE TWO POSTERS, I HAVE A PIN NECKLASE, I HAVE A MOVIE TRIBUTE GUIDE. I AM ALSO TEAM PEETA BECAUSE HE IS SUPER SWEET AND HE HAS DONE A LOT MORE FOR KATNISS THAN GALE HAS DONE FOR HER. AND LASTLY I WANT TO THANK SUZANNE COLLINS, YOU CHANGED MY WORLD. YOU GAVE ME THE LOVE OF READING, AND AFTER READING THE HUNGER GAMES I READ HUSH HUSH, THE MORTAL INSTRUMENTS, FALLEN, GALLAGHER GIRLS, BEAUTIFUL CREATURES, SHIVER, WINGS, DELIRIUM, DIVERGENT, PERCY JACKSON AND MANY MORE BOOKS. AND NOT ALL OF THEM ARE POPULAR BUT THEY WERE USUALY BEST SELLERS. I USUALLY GET OBSESSED WITH ALL THE BOOKS I READ, ITS THE LEVEL OF OBSESSION THAT MAKES ME LOVE THEM, AND I REALLY HOPE THAT YOU READ THESE BOOKS, I HOPE THAT YOU DON'T JUST WATCH THE MOVIE, ITS NOT THE SAME EXPERIENCE. SO READ THE BOOK, WATCH THE MOVIE, TEL PEOPLE ABOUT IT, BUY SOME STUFF, IF YOU DON'T LIKE THEM JUST COMMENT BELOW AND TELL ME ABOUT IT, AND I MIGHT UNDERSTAND. BUT I CAN ASSURE YOU WON'T REGRET IT. :)
rows.title: THIS BOOK BECAME MY LIFE FOR A WHOLE YEAR

-COMO LA FLOR ("lIKE THE FLOWER" IS ALSO A GREAT SONG WITH A GR8 BEAT, & "LIKE THE FLOWER" SHE SINGS IN "COMO LA FLOR"; SHE BLOSSOMED & WITHERED TOO SOON, BUT THIS SONG ALSO HAVE A FUN BEAT, THIS WAS ONE OF SELENA'S SIGNATURE CLASSIC SONGS)

-WHEREVER YOU ARE (DONDEQUIERA QUE ESTES) (ALSO IZ A GR8 SONG WITH A PUERTO RICAN BAND CALLED "THE BARRIO BOYZZ", IS A GR8 SONG TO SING TO & SELENA'S PIPES ARE AMAZING & THE COMBINATION OF SELENA'S VOCALS WITH THE BARRIO BOYZZ VOCALS IS POWERFUL, A GREAT DUET)

-CAPTIVE HEART (HAS A AN SLOW BEAT, BUT DOESN'T STICK OUT LIKE HER OTHER ENGLISH SONGS, HER VOCAL IS AMAZING, LIKE ALWAYS BUT THE SONG IS A LITTLE DRY)

TECHNO CUMBIA-(HAS A GR8 BEAT, IT HAS FUN BEAT ALSO, IT'S A GR8 SONG TO DANCE TOO, ALSO, ONE OF HER GR8 SPANISH SONGS)

TU SOLO TU- (HER VOICE IS AMAZING, NICE BALLAD, HER VOICE SOUNDS DEEPER BUT IT STILL IS GR8, SHE HAD A BEAUTIFUL VOICE & IT SHOWS IN THIS LOVE BALLAD ALSO)

EL TORO RELAJO-(HAS A MARIACHI BEAT,BUT THIS IS NOT ONE OF MY FAV SPANISH SONGS FROM SELENA, BUT SHE HAS AN IMPRESSIVE VOCAL RANGE)

GOD'S CHILD (BAILA CONMIGO)-(ALSO, HAS A MARIACHI BEAT, GR8 VOCAL RANGE FROM SELENA, BUT NOT MY FAV SONG ON THIS ALBUM)

IF YOU ARE A HUGE SELENA FANATIC, I RECOMMEND YOU ALSO BUY "SELENA:ONES" BECAUSE IT HAS ALL HER HITS & YOU SHOULD ALSO BUY THE "SELENA:ONES" WITH THE DVD BECAUSE IT HAS THE MAJORITY OF SOME OF HIT MUSIC VIDEO'S & YOU SHOULD ALSO BUY "SELENA: ANTHOLOGY" IF YOU LIKE ALOT OF HER SPANISH HITS OR REMIXED VERSIONS OF HER SONGS, IT ALSO COMES WITH 3 DISCS & THERE ARE SOME GR8 UNRELEASED ENGLISH POP SONGS & LATIN MUSIC ON IT! YOU ALSO, SHOULD BY "SELENA REMEMBERED" (THE DVD/CD), IF YOU JUST RECENTLY DISCOVERED HER MUSIC BECAUSE, IT SHOWS LOTS OF FOOTAGE OF HER PERFORMING, WITH FAMILY, BEING INTERVIEWED, ETC. BUT THIS CD IS A MUST FOR ANY SELENA FAN THAT HAS JUST DISCOVERED HER MUSIC, BUT OVERALL THIS IS A GR8 ALBUM FROM THE MOST BELOVED LATINA SINGER EVER, THE LATE GREAT SELENA QUINTANILLA-PEREZ (1971-1995); HAD SHE LIVED SHE WOULD BE THE BIGGEST STAR IN THE WORLD RIGHT NOW, BUT LEGENDS NEVER DIE & SHE WILL ALWAYZ LIVE ON THROUGH HER MUSIC & THROUGH HER FANS, HER STAR WILL NEVER FADE & SHE WILL ALWAYZ LIVE ON IN OUR HEARTS, HER DEATH, ROBBED US OF GR8 MUSIC, WE WILL NEVER KNOW HER FULL POTENTIAL, BUT WE KNOW THAT SHE HAD A BRIGHT FUTURE THAT WAS CUT SHORT BY A COWARD OVER SOMETHING SENSELESS AND I GUARANTEE U THAT HAD SHE LIVED WOULD BE STILL THE BIGGEST LATINA STAR IN THE WORLD!!! R.I.P. SELENA QUINTANILLA-PEREZ (1971-1995)(DA GREATEST LATINA SINGER EVER)!!!!

rows.text: BACK IN MAY 2000, I VISITED GRACELAND AND THEN TOOK A TOUR BUS TO BEALE ST. UPON BOARDING I ASKED THE TOUR GUIDE IF CHIPS MOMANS STUDIO WAS  NEARBY. HE GAVE ME A LOOK OF DISGUST INFERRING HE DIDN'T WANT TO TALK ABOUT HIM. THIS PEAKED BY CURIOSITY AS I LOVE TO READ BOOKS ABOUT THOSE IN THE MUSIC INDUSTRY, PRIMARILY CHIPS, WHOM I VIEW AS THE GREATEST PRODUCER EVER. I READ THE BOOK, ''THE MEMPHIS BOYS'' BUT ONLY COVERS THE AMERICAN SOUND STUDIOS YEARS 1967 TO 1972. I WANTED TO KNOW WHAT HAPPENED TO CHIPS AFTER WITH ONLY GLIMPSES OF THAT IN BRIEF ARTICLES. THUS I BOUGHT THIS BOOK. NOTHING PEAKED ANY INTEREST TIL I GOT TO PAGE 220, WHICH PICKS UP AFTER 1972 TIL HIS DEATH. BOOK GIVES INSIGHT INTO HIS LAGRANGE , GEORGIA MOVE, THEN ON TO NASHVILLE WHERE HE REKINDLED HIS SUCCESS IN COUNTRY MUSIC. I FOUND IT INSIGHTFUL ABOUT HOW THE SONG ''ALWAYS ON MY MIND ''WAS FIRST RECORDED WITH CHIPS AND MERLE HAGGARD BEFORE WILLIE NELSON MADE IT A MAJOR HIT. THE OFFER TO RETURN TO MEMPHIS FOR A NEW STUDIO NAMED ''FIVE ALARM'' FROM A CONVERTED FIREHOUSE AND THE RECORDING OF ''THE CLASS 0F 55'', THE RECORDINGS WITH WAYLON JENNINGS AND LATER WITH RINGO STAR PEAKED MY INTEREST . THE HIGHWAYMEN RECORDINGS ALSO INTERESTING. THE DEATH OF CHIPS FIRST WIFE,''LORRIE''( I BELIEVE HIS ONLY TRUE LOVE), HIS RELATIOSHIP WITH HIS DAUGHTER''MONIQUE'' AND SON ''CASEY''FROM SECOND MARRIAGE TO TONI WINE , AND HIS 3RD WIFE JANE ARE THINGS I NEVER KNEW. HIS DECLINING HEALTH AND DEATH AND BIPOLAR ISSUES TOO. BUT WHAT DISAPPOINTS ME IS ITS MOSTLY, ABOUT 90% THE AUTHORS OPINION AND 10% WORDS OF INTERVIEWS. BARELY ANYTHING FROM HIS HOUSE BAND, LITTLE ON HIS MOST FAMOUS RECORDINGS WITH ELVIS, LITTLE ABOUT THE BRENDA LEE LP ''MEMPHIS PORTRAIT ,''ONE OF CHIPS FAVORITE PRODUCTIONS AND BRENDA DECLINED TO AN INTERVIEW. IVE MET BRENDA WHO IS OPENLY WARM AND CONVERSATIONAL , MAKES ME WONDER WHY ? THEN HIS CONSTANT OPINIONS REGARDLESS OF FACTS. HE CLAIMS THE BEATLES CAUSED THE DEMISE OF HIS MEMPHIS SOUND SUCCESS ? WHAT ? THE BEATLES AS A GROUP POPULAR IN US FROM 1964 TO 1970. HIS MEMPHIS HEYDAY WAS FROM 1967-1972 ! HE STARTED AMERICAN SOUND STUDIOS AS AN ALTERNATIVE TO BRITISH MUSIC AND DECLINED REQUESTS FROM THE BEATLES AND OTHERS TO RECORD THERE AND HE HAS TREMENDOUS SUCCESS IN THEIR HEYDAY !!!!  HE SPENDS A LOT OF TIME TALKING ABOUT PETULA CLARKS RECORDING THERE. I HAVE BOTH OF HER LPS THERE. THE 1ST GREAT BUT NEITHER MADE A HUGE DENT IN MUSIC. YET HE SPENDS LITTLE TIME ON HIS MOST SUCCESSFUL STINT WITH ELVIS. NO MENTION OF WILSON PICKETT RECORDING THERE, BUT A LOT ON RINGO STARR WHO RECORDED WITH CHIPS IN MID TO LATE 80S. CHIPS WAS DESPERATE BY THAT TIME AS HE REALLY DIDNT CARE FOR BRITISH ROCK MUSIC. ONE THING FUNNY IS CHIPS , LIKE QUINCY JONES, OVERDUBBED RINGOS DRUMMING, LOL, WHILE THE AUTHOR PRAISES IT. CHIPS OVERDUBBED WITH GENE CHRISTMAN, AN OUTSTANDING DRUMMER. THEN RINGO SHAFTED HIM. LITTLE MENTION OF THE FILMED HIGHWAYMAN CONCERT CHIPS WAS INVOLVED WITH. BUT I DID LEARN WHY THAT TOUR GUIDE DISMISSED CHIPS. HE WAS FALSELY FOLLOWING THE MEDIA AND GOVERNMENT BUREACRACY THAT SLANDERED AND BETRAYED CHIPS, WRITTEN IN THIS BOOK ! SO ...WHAT WOULD CHIPS THINK ? I BELIEVE CHIPS WOULD APPRECIATE THE RESPECT AND DIG ITY HE WAS SHOWN BY THE AUTHOR. THE RECOGNITION OF HIS CHILDREN AND GENIUS. THE DEFENSE OF HIS INTEGRITY REGARDING HIS TIME IN MEMPHIS. BUT DISAPPOINTED IN THE AUTHORS COVERAGE OF HIS GREATEST MUSIC ACCOMPLISHMENTS . HE'D WONDER WHY NO MENTION OF RONNIE MILSHAP, HIS EARLIER SUCCESS WITH BOBBY WOMACK , HIS MUSICIANS GOING ON TO RECORD WITH DOBIE GRAY AND AGAIN WITH ELVIS. WHY THE AUTHOR SAID B J THOMAS LP ''EVERYBODY'S OUT OF TOWN ''HAD NO HITS WHEN ''I JUST CANT HELP BELIEVING'' IS ON THAT LP ! THIS BOOK GIVES INSIGHT INTO CHIPS LATER YEARS AFTER AMERICAN SOUND STUDIO, SO ID RECOMMEND BUYING A USED COPY TO READ OR AT A PUBLIC LIBRARY. A BETTER BOOK ABOUT CHIPS IS ''THE MEMPHIS BOYS'' BY ROBEN JONES , 5 STARS , WHERE HER OPINION IS IN THE FORWARD BUT THE STORY IS INSIGHTFUL FROM THE VIEWPOINT OF THOSE  WHO WERE ACTUALLY THERE !
rows.title: WHAT WOULD CHIPS THINK ?

I thought I was buying a plan that not only extended the warranty for repair but also for Accidents. Well, I went out of town and dropped the camera in the ocean. In my mind that is an accident. Not according to their "WHAT IS NOT COVERED" section which you only get AFTER you pay for the plan. I'm pasting below as much as this review will let me of the "WHAT IS NIT COVERED" section of the contract. I'll end up buying another camera and skipping this....

WHAT IS NOT COVERED: THIS SERVICE AGREEMENT DOES NOT COVER ANY LOSS, REPAIRS OR DAMAGE CAUSED BY OR RESULTING FROM: (A) PRE‐EXISTING CONDITIONS INCURRED OR KNOWN TO YOU (“PRE‐EXISTING” MEANS A CONDITION THAT WITHIN ALL REASONABLE MECHANICAL OR ELECTRICAL PROBABILITY RELATES TO THE MECHANICAL FITNESS OF YOUR COVERED PRODUCT PRIOR TO ISSUANCE OF THIS SERVICE AGREEMENT); (B) IMPROPER PACKAGING AND/OR TRANSPORTATION BY YOU OR YOUR REPRESENTATIVE RESULTING IN DAMAGE DURING SHIPMENT TO A SERVICE CENTER OR RELOCATION OF THE COVERED PRODUCT; (C) INSTALLATION, REMOVAL, REINSTALLATION OR IMPROPER INSTALLATION OF COMPONENTS, UPGRADES, ATTACHMENTS OR PERIPHERALS; (D) PRODUCTS AND/OR COMPONENTS THAT ARE USED IN APPLICATIONS THAT REQUIRE CONTINUOUS BUSINESS AND/OR COMMERCIAL OPERATION, OR ARE USED FOR COMMERCIAL, INDUSTRIAL, EDUCATIONAL OR PUBLIC USE PURPOSES OR OFFERED ON A RENTAL BASIS, OR COIN‐OPERATED PRODUCTS; (E) DAMAGE OR FAILURE CAUSED BY RIOT, NUCLEAR RADIATION, WAR OR HOSTILE ACTION, RADIOACTIVE CONTAMINATION, ETC.; (F) DAMAGE FROM FREEZING OR OVERHEATING; (G) INADEQUATE PLUMBING, ELECTRICAL OR GAS SERVICE; (H) INTERRUPTION OF GAS OR ELECTRICAL SERVICE; (I) NEGLECT, NEGLIGENCE, MISUSE, ABUSE, INTENTIONAL PHYSICAL/MECHANICAL/ELECTRONIC DAMAGE, PHYSICAL DAMAGE OR MALICIOUS MISCHIEF, THEFT OR MYSTERIOUS DISAPPEARANCE, VANDALISM, RUST, CORROSION, WARPING, BENDING, ANIMAL OR INSECT INFESTATION, ETC. TO THE COVERED PRODUCT OR ANY COMPONENT; (J) DAMAGE OR FAILURE DUE TO CAUSES BEYOND YOUR CONTROL SUCH AS ENVIRONMENTAL CONDITIONS, EXPOSURE TO WEATHER CONDITIONS OR ACTS OF NATURE, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO: FIRE, FLOODS, SMOKE, SAND, DIRT, LIGHTNING, MOISTURE, WATER DAMAGE OF ANY KIND, WHETHER FROM FRESH WATER, SALTWATER OR OTHER WATER INTRUSION, STORMS, WIND OR WINDSTORM, HAIL, EARTHQUAKE, OTHER EXTERNAL PERILS OF NATURE; (K) REPAIRS NECESSITATED BY OPERATION OUTSIDE THE MANUFACTURER OPERATIONAL OR ENVIRONMENTAL SPECIFICATIONS; (L) BATTERY FAILURE OR LEAKAGE; (M) COLLISION WITH ANOTHER OBJECT, COLLAPSE, EXPLOSION, LIQUID SPILLAGE OF ANY KIND BY ANY OWNER, EMPLOYEE, THIRD PARTY, REPAIR PERSONNEL, ETC., UNLESS COVERED UNDER A SERVICE AGREEMENT WHICH SPECIFICALLY INCLUDES ANY OF THE DEFINED CAUSES; (P) IMPROPER OR INADEQUATE STORAGE; (Q) DAMAGE TO A COVERED PART CAUSED BY A NON‐COVERED PART; (R) IMPROPER INSTALLATION OF CUSTOMER REPLACEABLE COMPONENTS, MODULES, PARTS OR PERIPHERALS AND/OR INSTALLATION OF INCORRECT PARTS; THIS COMPLEMENTARY DOCTOR IS ONE OF THE BEST FOR SAFE NATURAL HEALING. THIS BOOK, LIKE HIS OTHER BOOKS, HAS DOWN TO EARTH INEXPENSIVE REMEDIES WITH DOSES, THAT ARE BETTER THAN DRUGS...EG BERBERINE BETTER AND SAFER THAN METFORMIN FOR MILD DIABETES, IN COMPARATIVE STUDIES. IT ALSO HAS OTHER BENEFITS BESIDES. I GOT THIS BOOK FREE WITH HIS "NUTRITION & HEALING" GUARANTEED PAID,ANNUAL NEWSLETTER SUBSCRIPTION.....ALSO VERY HELPFUL. THIS BOOK HAS 8 LONGISH REPORTS ABOUT NATURAL HEALING FOR DIFFERENT DISEASES.NOT TOO LONG. PREVENTION AND TREATMENTS. PLUS MANY MORE SHORT ARTICLES ABOUT MANY MORE DISEASES AND DISORDERS.SERIOUS AND NOT SO SERIOUS. EXCELLENT. HIGHLY RECOMMENDED. I GOT GOOD HELP FROM HIS OTHER BOOK NOT ON AMAZON NOW,BUT IT WAS BEFORE... "WHY STOMACH ACID IS GOOD FOR YOU" ABOUT GERD, ACID REFLUX AND SOME DIGESTIVE PROBLEMS. HE SAYS HEARING PROBLEMS IN THIS BOOK HERE, MAY ALSO BE DUE TO LOW STOMACH ACID AND NOT ENOUGH FOLIC ACID AND B12 ABSORBED AS A RESULT....., AMONG OTHER POSSIBLE CAUSES I THINK. I KNOW MANY OTHER DISEASES ARE CAUSED BY LOW STOMACH ACID AND ANT-ACIDS OR PPI OR H2 BLOCKER DRUGS. BEWARE. READ HIS BOOK. INCOMPLETE DIGESTION & ABSORPTION DUE TO LOW STOMACH ACID, AND POSSIBLY OTHER THINGS. THIS IS A LARGE PAGE BOOK ONLY ABOUT ONE THIRD INCH THICK. LIGHT WEIGHT. EASY TO READ. HIS CARING SHINES THROUGH.
HAS OTHER ARTICLES ABOUT CINNAMON (THE WATER SOLUBLE KIND) HELPING REDUCE BLOOD SUGAR BY REDUCING INSULIN RESISTENCE FOR DIABETICS....AND ANYONE I GUESS. HE GIVES THE NAME OF A WATER SOLUBLE CINNAMON PRODUCT HE RECOMMENDS & HOW TO REMOVE THE TOXIC FAT SOLUBLE PARTS OF ORDINARY CINNAMON. ORDINARY CINNAMON NEEDS TO BE USED SPARINGLY, AS IT HAS TOXIC EFFECTS. rows.text: MR. ARMSTRONG LEFT A LEGACY OF WORK AND FAITH. HIS WORKS WERE REFLECTED IN THE BOOKS AND BOOKLETS THAT HE WROTE OVER THE COURSE OF HIS LIFE AS PASTOR GENERAL OF THE WCG. THIS LEGACY HE INTRUSTED TO OTHER MEN, MEN HE THOUGHT WERE OF LIKE MIND, MEN HE BELIEVED AND TRUSTED IN. THEY LEARNED AT HIS FEET. WHY WOULD PEOPLE STAY IN AN ORGANIZATION THAT THEY SECRETLY DISBELIEVED IN ? THESE BOOKS AND BOOKLETS WERE PAID FOR BY THE TITHES AND OFFERINGS OF THE MEMBERS OF THE WCG. MR. ARMSTRONG ALWAYS TAUGHT THAT GOD'S WAY IS THE WAY OF " GIVE" .. THESE BOOKS AND BOOKLETS WERE GIVEN FREELY UPON REQUEST, WITH NO FOLLOW-UP. TO GAIN ACCESS BY DECEIPT AND LYING FOR THE EXPRESS PURPOSE OF GAINING CONTROL OF THE WEALTH OF THE CHURCH WAS THE SOLE REASON THESE MEN STAYED SO CLOSE TO MR. ARMSTRONG. THE HISTORY OF 21 YEARS PROVES THAT OUT .. THEIR MOTIVE WAS NOT TO FURTHER THE WORK, CONTINUING THE LEGACY. JUST THE OPPOSITE, FLEECE THE TREASURY, SELL THE PROPERTIES, COMPLETELY DISMANTLE THE DOCTRINES, FROM TOP TO BOTTOM  ... AND EMERGE A NEW ENTITY. WHY FIGHT TO KEEP SOMETHING YOU WANT TO DESTROY, WHY SPEND MILLONS OF DOLLARS ON WORKS THAT YOU HAVE STATED WERE "RIDDLED WITH ERROR"  ... IF YOU WANT TO START OVER AND BUILD YOUR OWN EMPIRE, THEN BY ALL MEANS ESTABLISH YOUR OWN DOCTRINES, BUT WHY TRY TO DESTROY SOMETHING YOU DON'T WANT IN YOUR ORGANIZATION ANY MORE? THIS IS SO MIND BOGGLING, IF YOU TAKE A STEP BACK AND LOOK AT HOW THEY WENT ABOUT DESTROYING THIS CHURCH AND ALL THAT MR. ARMSTRONG HAD BUILT MOST OF HIS LIFE. EVEN HIS SON TURNED AGAINST HIM. HE WAS SUCH A GOOD MAN, A TRUE AMBASSADOR OF PEACE. HIS DOCTRINES, ARE NOT HIS, BUT THOSE OF THE LIVING GOD. HE DIDN'T STEAL THEM FROM OTHERS AS SOME WOULD HAVE YOU BELIEVE. HE RESTORED THEM, THEY WERE LOST AND HE RESTORED WHAT HAD BEEN LOST OVER TIME. THEY ARE GOD'S DOCTRINES. THE SABBATH, THE TRUE HOLY DAYS, THOSE THAT ARE MENTIONED IN SCRIPTURE. OLD AND NEW TESTAMENT  ... TITHING  ....... ARE THESE EVIL OR WRONG? THEN I GUESS GOD IS WRONG. MAYBE THERE'S A REASON FOR ALL THE SUFFERING GOING ON IN THIS WORLD ... THE BREAKING OF ALL THE COMMANDMENTS OF GOD, AND IN A VERY DANGEROUS AGE. AND WHAT IF WE, THE UNITED STATES AND BRITISH PEOPLES ARE THE TRUE DECENDENTS OF ISRAEL, YOU KNOW, THE LOST 10 TRIBES OF ISRAEL. THE ENGLISH SPEAKING PEOPLES ARE THE ONES THAT HAVE CLAIMED THIS BOOK, THE HOLY BIBLE AS GOD'S WORD. WHO ELSE HAS SUCH CLAIMS? JACOB, WHOSE NAME WAS CHANGED TO ISRAEL, ONE NATION AT FIRST, THEN A SPLIT AND YOU HAVE ISRAEL AND JUDAH ... TWO DIFFERENT NATIONS GOING INTO TWO DIFFERENT CAPTIVITIES. THEY EVEN FOUGHT AGAINST EACH OTHER. FASCINATING REALLY, BUT THEN IT WAS SO LONG AGO AND PART OF THE OLD TESTAMENT. BUT DIDN'T CHRIST LEARN FROM THE SCRIPTURES? TEACH IN THE TEMPLE, KEEP ALL OF THE HOLY DAYS OF HIS FATHER. YES, I BELIEVE HE DID, AND GUESS WHAT, THERE WAS NO NEW TESTAMENT AT THAT TIME, THE BOOKS HADN'T BEEN WRITTEN YET. BUT WE ALSO KNOW THAT GOD IS THE SAME, YESTERDAY, TODAY, FOREVER. ANOTHER THOUGHT, THE SABBATH WAS CREATED " IN THE BEGINNING", AND GOD NEVER CHANGES. JUST A THOUGHT. I KNOW, I'M RAMBLING, SO THIS IS HOW I SEE IT. MR. ARMSTRONG LEFT A WORK IN PLACE FOR THOSE THAT BELIEVED HE HAD RESTORED ALL THINGS, THAT HE WAS THE END TIME ELIJAH OF PROPHECY. 100,000 BAPTIZED MEMBERS FREELY BELIEVED THIS AND FREELY WERE BAPTIZED INTO THE BODY OF JESUS CHRIST THROUGH THE WCG. WHEN HE DIED THOSE THAT WERE INTRUSTED WITH THIS BELIEF AND HAD CONTROL OF ALL THE ASSETS, AS WELL AS THE TITHES AND OFFERINGS DECIDED THEY DIDN'T BELIEVE A WORD OF WHAT HE SAID  ....... CHANGED IT ALL, AND KEPT THE LOOT !!! SOMEONE ELSE JUST WANTED THE WRITINGS, THE BOOKS AND BOOKLETS, THAT'S ALL! NOT ONLY THAT, THEY WANTED YOU TO HAVE THEM AS WELL .. FOR FREE !!!!! COM'ON NOW FOLKS, ARE YOU REALLY THAT BLIND TO SEE WHERE THE LIES AND DECEIPT LIE. THIS LAWSUIT WAS FIRST ABOUT DESTROYING WORKS, THEN IT WAS ABOUT MONEY, WHEN SOMEONE STOOD UP TO THEM TO FIGHT FOR THOSE PRECIOUS TRUTHS. GOD SAYS TO SELL EVERYTHING FOR THE TRUTH, THAT IT IS WORTH MORE THAN ANYTHING YOU COULD POSSIBLY POSSESS. MONEY? DID WE LOSE BECAUSE WE PAID THEM FOR THESE BOOKS AND BOOKLETS ... I THINK NOT. AGAIN, ASK YOURSELF WHAT REALLY WAS THIS LAWSUIT ALL ABOUT? HEY, WRITE IN FOR YOUR COPIES OF ALL MR. ARMSTRONG'S WORK ... THEIR FREE !!!  PHILADELPHIA CHURCH OF GOD ... MR GERALD FLURRY, FOLLOWING IN THE FOOTSTEPS OF MR. ARMSTRONG.  NOW THATS A LEGACY TO FIGHT FOR !!

rows.text:
MAN O' MAN I AM SO PROUD OF ASHANTI,,, SHE REALLY OUT DID HERSELF ON THIS ONE. I MEAN FROM THE BEGINNING TO THE END... WE ALL KNOW THAT SHE IS NOT REALLY KNOWN FOR SINGING SLOW BALLADS,, BUT HER MID TO UPTEMPO TRACKS ARE JUST CRAZY... AND FOR THE REVIEWERS WHO ARE SAYING SHE SAMPELED SOME SONGS,, SO WHAT!!! ALOT OF ARTISTS SAMPLE SONGS,, YOU GONNA HATE BECAUSE OF THAT... YOU CAN SMELL THE ASHANTI HATERS FROM A MILE AWAY BOY I TELL YOU... AND IN ANY CASE,,, THE INC. IS KNOWN FOR COPYING OTHER PEOPLE,, ON HER DEBUT,,, "BABY",, "DREAMS" "FOOLISH" AND "UNFOOLISH" WERE SAMPLED AND NO ONE SAID ANYTHING,,, I MEAN IF YOUR GONNA WRITE A REVIEW ,, KNOW WHAT THE HELL UR TALKING ABOUT FOR REAL THOUGH.. DONT BE A HATER O.K.???? NOW,, AS FAR AS CHAPTER II. I WROTE A HORRIBLE REVIEW ON THAT ONE AND THATS JUST BECAUSE I WAS VERY UPSET WITH HER,, SHE KNOWS SHE COULD HAVE DONE BETTER AND I SAID TO MYSELF ,, MAN,, SHE LOST IT FOR REAL. BUT SHE CHANGED MY MIND WITH THE SEXY "CONCRETE ROSE" AND LIKE SHE SAYS HIP HOP AND R&B IS A CONCRETE ROSE.NOW THIS ALBUM CONSISTS OF 17 SONGS AND ONE OF THEM IS A INTRO,, ONE IS A BONUS TRACK THAT WE ALL KNOW AND THEIR ARE TWO NEEDLESS SKITS,, BUT I GUESS SHE WANTS TO SHOW LOVE TO HER SISTER ON EVERY ALBUM AND THATS FINE ,, BUT INSTEAD OF DOING THAT,, THEY SHOULD JUST MAKE A SONG TOGETHER,, INSTEAD OF SINGING LITTLE ACAPELLAS THAT ASHANTI SHINES ON MORE THAN SHIA ANYWAY... BUT OTHER THAN THOSE TWO LAME SKITS THE ALBUM IS FLAWLESS,, FROM THE CUTE "STILL DOWN" FEAT. T.I. TO THE VERY DEEP AND VERY PERSONAL "FREEDOM" THIS ALBUM IS WHERE ITS AT,,, NO THERE ARE NO BALLADS AND SURPRISINGLY NO LAME UPTEMPO CLUB BANGERS,, THE ONLY ONE IS "TURN IT UP" ,, WHICH I MUST SAY IS A TIGHT SONG... JARULE DOESNT MESS IT UP WITH HIS HOARSE VOICE,, ITS A NICE GROOVE SONG THOUGH.. ASHANTI GIVES YOU SEXY ,, SENSUAL SONGS,,, THERE ARENT THAT MANY BREAK UP SONGS EITHER EXCEPT "FOCUS" WHICH IS RUMOURED TO BE A SECOND SINGLE,, ITS A NICE SONG BUT I RECOMMEND "TAKE ME TONIGHT" FEAT. LABEL MATE LLOYD. ITS A VERY PRETTY SPRINGTIME DUET AND WOULD MAKE FOR A VERY PRETTY VIDEO,, I MEAN ASHANTI IS KNOWN FOR HER DUETS ANYWAY,,, SO THATS ANOTHER HOT ONE... OTHER SONGS THAT JUST MAKE THE CD LOVELY ARE "SO HOT"... WHICH IS MY PERSONAL FAV. AND "DONT LET THEM".... JUST TWO OF THE MOST FLAWLESS TRACKS ON HER ALBUM... SO HERE ARE MY FAV. TRACKS AND THE STANDOUT TRACKS ON THE ALBUM...

"SO HOT"-- IT IS MY ALL TIME FAVORITE,,, I LOVE HER VOICE IN THE SONG AND THE SAMPLE FROM JODECI'S "WHAT ABOUT US",, JUST MAKES IT EVEN SEXIER... ITS A SEXY SONG THAT MAKES YOU THINK ABOUT YOUR LOVER. SHE TALKS ABOUT HOW HER LOVER MAKES HER HOT AND HOW SHES ADDICTED TO HIM... VERY VERY SEXY SONG AND TO ME ITS THE BEST ONE ON THE ALBUM.....-5/5-

"DON'T LET THEM"-- O' HOW I LOVE THIS SONG,, IT TALKS ABOUT HOW PEOPLE HATE ON YOUR RELATIONSHIP,,, BUT U DONT CARE BECAUSE YOU ARE SO IN LOVE AND SHE SAYS DONT LET THEM (HATERS) TAKE YOUR LOVE AWAY,, BUMP WHAT THEY SAY,, WE LOVE EACH OTHER AND THATS ALL THAT MATTERS,,, IT MAKES U THINK... I LOVE THIS ONE ALOT...-5/5

"TAKE ME TONIGHT"FEAT. LLOYD-- MAN O' MAN ANOTHER JAM... LLOYD AND ASHANTI SOUND SO GOOD TOGETHER,,, HIS VOICE SOUNDS SO DIFFERENT AND I LOVE THAT ABOUT HIM,,, THIS SONG IS ABOUT A COUPLE WHO ARE SO IN LOVE AND THEY ARE BOTH COMMITTED TO EACH OTHER AND SHE AND HE ARE SAYING TAKE ME TONIGHT,, YOUR ALL I NEED AND ALL I WANT.... BEAUTIFUL JOB BY LLOYD AND ASHANTI...-5/5

"FREEDOM"-- VERY DEEP AND PERSONAL AND IT SPEAKS ON HOW PEOPLE HATED ON HER AND HER CAREER AND YOU CAN TELL SHE HAS DEALT WITH IT AND SHE IS EXPRESSING HERSELF THE ONLY WAY SHE CAN AND THATS THROUGH HER MUSIC AND I LOVE THAT... BUT ITS A GOOD WAY TO END THIS CRITICALLY ACCLAIMED ALBUM AND SHE JUST SINGS HER HEART OUT TOO...-5/5-

"FOCUS"-- TO ME THIS SOUNDS LIKE AN 80'S SONG OR AN EARLY 90'S SONG,, ITS DIFFERENT AND I LOVE HER VOICE IN THE SONG AND OF COURSE ITS ABOUT A BREAK UP AND SHE SAYS,, SHES OUT OF THE RELATIONSHIP AND NOW SHE IS SO FOCUSED WITHOUT HIM...--5/5

"EVERY LIL' THING"-- THIS SONG SOUNDS FAMILIAR FOR SOME REASON,, IF IT IS A SAMPLE ,, I CANT REMEMBER WHOSE SONG IT IS ,, BUT I LOVE THE CHORUS,,, ITS A CUTE SONG THATS ABOUT A GIRL THATS TELLING HER MAN WHAT SHE WANTS AND THATS EVERY LIL THING.

--5/5

"TURN IT UP" FEAT. JA RULE-- THIS SOUNDS LIKE A DISCO CLUB SONG THATS DIFFERENT BUT A GOOD DIFFERENT AND I LOVE THE CHORUS " DONT TRY TO BE TOO CUTE TONIGHT" I LOVE THIS SONG,,, IT SHOWS YOU A DIFFERENT SIDE OF ASHANTI AND ITS A GOOD PARTY JAM...--5/5

THE OTHER SONGS ARE GREAT,, THE ONLY ONE THAT I DONT FEEL THAT MUCH IS "LOVE AGAIN"-- THE F**K FACES BEAT DOESNT FIT AN R&B SONG BUT THE SUBJECT MATTER IS DIFFERENT BUT THE BEAT TURNS ME OFF .. I LOVE THIS BEAT THOUGH,, ESPECIALLY ON SCARFACE'S OR TELA'S VERSION... BUT IT DOESNT FIT THIS SONG...

*STANDOUTS*

"SO HOT"

"FREEDOM"

"TAKE ME TONIGHT"

ALL IN ALL ASHANTI'S BACK AND STRONGER THAN EVER AND SHE DEFINITLY REGAINED HER CROWN AS THE "PRINCESS"

--CONCRETE ROSE--

WOLFGANG AMADEUS MOZART [1756 - 1791]
*CLARINET QUINTET IN A [K.581 STADLER]
*QUINTET FOR PIANO & WINDS IN E [K.452]
*FLUTE QUARTET NO.1 IN D [K.285]
*ADAGIO FOR ENGLISH HORN & STRING TRIO [K.580A] RECONSTRUCTED FRAGMENT

"THIS CD'S SPECTACULAR PERFORMANCE BY THE ENSEMBLE 360 OF MOZART'S K.452 AND K.581 STANDS OUT AS A BENCHMARK FOR OTHER CLASSICAL CHAMBER ENSEMBLES TO ASPIRE!" -BBC MUSIC MAGAZINE-

WINNER OF BBC MUSIC MAGAZINE'S CHAMBER CD OF YEAR 2007, ENGLAND'S HIGHLY ACCLAIMED ENSEMBLE 360 [NAMED AFTER THEIR PREFERENCE FOR CHAMBER MUSIC PERFORMANCES IN THE ROUND INJECTS A FUSION OF YOUTHFUL SPIRIT AND NEW-GENERATION REVERENCE TO MOZART'S FINEST CHAMBER MUSIC! THE ENSEMBLE 360'S PERFORMANCE IS JOYOUS CHAMBER MUSIC MAKING BY A TEAM OF VIRTUOSO CLASSICAL MUSICIANS WHOSE ENTHUSIASTIC DELIGHT IN PLAYING MOZART'S CHAMBER MUSIC IS EQUALLY MATCHED BY THE MASTERY OF
THEIR INSTRUMENTS!

THE ENSEMBLE 360'S DYNAMIC WORLD-CLASS MUSICIANS INCLUDE:
*TIM HORTON (PIANO)
*DONALD GRANT (VIOLIN)
*SARA BITLLOCH (VIOLIN)
*MARTIN SAVING (VIOLA)
*MATTHEW HUNT (CLARINET)
*MARIE BITLOCH (CELLO)
*TIM JACKSON (FRENCH HORN)
*ADRIAN WILSON (OBOE)
*BENJAMIN HUDSON (BASSOON)
*GUY ESHED (FLUTE)

ABOUT MOZART'S CLARINET QUINTET IN A [K.581 STADLER]
COMPOSED IN 1789 AT VIENNA FOR THE HIS FRIEND ANTON STADLER ONE OF THE 18TH CENTURY'S GREATEST CLARINETISTS OF VIENNA'S ROYAL COURT ORCHESTRA, MOZART'S CLARINET QUINTET K.581 IS SCORED IN FOUR [4] GLORIUS MOVEMENTS FOR 1 BASSETT CLARINET AND A STRING QUARTET OF 2 VIOLINS, 1 VIOLA AND 1 CELLO. MOZART'S CLARINET QUINTET IN A [K.581 STADLER] IS RENOWNED FOR ITS BEAUTIFUL LYRICAL MELODIES! MOZART COMPOSED HIS CLARINET QUINTET K.581 WITH A WIDE VARIETY OF MOODS, DIVERSITY OF MUSICAL TEXTURES, AND SOPHISTICATED RICHNESS TO ENABLE THE CLARINETIST TO DISPLAY HIS VIRTUOSO TALENTS AS MUCH AS POSSIBLE.

ABOUT MOZART'S QUINTET FOR PIANO & WINDS IN E [K.452]
WOLFGANG MOZART'S 1784 LETTER TO HIS FATHER LEOPOLD MOZART READS: "I CONSIDER MY QUINTET FOR PIANO & WINDS [K.452] THE FINEST WORK I HAVE EVER COMPOSED IN MY LIFE. I ONLY WISH YOU COULD HAVE HEARD IT AND HOW BEAUTIFULLY IT WAS PERFORMED!"

COMPOSED IN 1784 AT VIENNA, MOZART'S QUINTET K.452 IS SCORED IN THREE [3] MOVEMENTS FOR PIANO, CLARINET, OBOE, BASSOON, AND HORN. MOZART'S QUINTET K.452 CREATES FIVE [5] EQUAL INTSRUMENT VOICES THAT COMBINE AND CONTRAST IN VARIOUS WAYS MOZART'S BRILLIANT CONCERTANTE STYLE.

MOZART'S K.452 IN UNIQUE AMONG HIS WORKS BECAUSE THERE ARE FOUR [4] DISSIMILAR WIND INSTRUMENTS COMPETING WITH THE SOLO PIANO. WITH HIS UNRIVALED CLASSICAL MUSIC GENIUS, WOLFGANG MOZART COMPOSED HIS QUINTET K.452 IN A SPECIAL WAY THAT RESPECTS BOTH THE CAPABILITY AND CHARACTER OF EACH OF THE FIVE [5] INDIVIDUAL INSTRUMENTS. IN MOZART'S QUINTET K.452, NONE OF THE FIVE INSTRUMENTS [PIANO, CLARINET, OBOE, BASSOON, HORN] ARE PROMINENT OR SUBORDINATED.

EACH OF MOZART'S QUINTET K.452'S FOUR [4] WIND INSTRUMENTS WERE DESIGNED WITH LIMITATIONS THAT RESTRICT THE EXTENT TO WHICH THEIR UNIQUE TONAL SOUNDS CAN MINGLE WITH OTHER INSTRUMENTS. IN MOZART'S QUINTET K.452, SHORT MOTIFS WITH BRIEF CORD PASSAGES ARE LINKED TOGETHER IN MELODIES CONTRASTED AGAINST THE SOLO PIANO AS EITHER AN ACCOMPANIMENT, OPPONENT, OR PARTNER.

ABOUT MOZART'S FLUTE QUARTET NO.1 IN D [K.285]
COMPOSED IN 1777 AT MANNHEIM, MOZART'S FLUTE QUARTET K.285 IS SCORED IN THREE [3] MOVEMENTS FOR FLUTE, VIOLIN, VIOLA, CELLO, AND ONE OF THE MOST HAUNTINGLY BEAUTIFUL WORKS EVER WRITTEN FOR FLUTE!

ABOUT MOZART'S ADAGIO FOR ENGLISH HORN & STRING TRIO [K.580A]
MOZART'S ADAGIO K.580A IS RECONSTRUCTED FROM A FRAGMENT BY A CLASSICAL MUSICIAN AND NOT WORTHY OF MY REVIEW BECAUSE MOZART DID NOT COMPOSE THIS ENTIRE WORK.

rows.text: I couldn't use the Dictionary.com app, it was huge.  I can't put all that stuff on my Kindle or my smart phone (Dictionary.com app may not be available for Kindle).  I'm glad there's a dictionary app out there that I can actually download and put on my Kindle.  I often want to use a dictionary and I don't want to have to connect to Wi-Fi or use my data on my phone which both require additional connections which are a pain in the butt.  Don't get me started on the dictionary app factory installed by Amazon!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!  You have got to be kidding!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!  First of all, I'm not a bookworm.  Second of all, read what just wrote when I wrote First of all.  Third of all, you've got to be kidding me that the only real purpose for the factory installed dictionary is to provide definitions of words when using the Kindle reading app!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!  This is absolute bull crap!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!  Sorry, should I tell you how I really feel??????  I don't have time to try to make connections or not make connections to look up some simple word.  I don't have 10-15 minutes to make connections to find the definition of one word.

rows.text: [[VIDEOID:5770035f9b47009ed5ec65e5fba96ea2]] I've been trying to remove latex paint from my kitchen cabinets for forever. Paint stripper takes forever, it's a mess to clean up and it's a pain to deal with the gooey paint afterwards. I've got an oscillating tool but the sandpaper packs up with the latex super fast so you're burning through those. I thought I would give these a try and holy crap I am in love. They do remove a decent amount of base material so you have to be careful but these things take the paint off super easy. In my video I'm just removing a little bit of paint with one of these abrasive wheels that I've been using for probably an hour or two. I probably won't need more than 10 of these to finish my entire kitchen, they last forever. I am beyond excited, I have been trying to figure out a way to do this that wouldn't take me 6 months to get everything removed. Granted, these are small so I'm not doing large surfaces but for the edges, rounded corners, and little areas, these things are a gift from God. Now that I know how well they work for what I'm using them for, I would have paid $20 for one wheel. I'm so freaking excited, now I have to go find some that are a lot bigger to do the main areas. IM SO EXCITED!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

rows.text:
My daughter got this as a Christmas present last year. Now, 14 months later it keeps restarting itself over and over again. I called customer service and they weren't too helpful. I tried to do a hard restart (hold the power button for 20 seconds) 4 different times and it did nothing. Customer service told me to hold it for 40 seconds. I held it for 40 seconds and it was still rebooting over and over again. Then, customer service told me to charge it for an hour, then they'd call me back. That wasn't an option at that time, so the customer service agent transferred me to another agent. She told me to go into settings to do a factory reset after I told her it kept rebooting and couldn't even get past the lock screen. (I guess she didn't believe me.) So, she said she'd do it remotely. She had me do a hard reboot (yet again), and was unable to reset the kindle remotely because it keeps rebooting itself every 15 seconds. (Like I told her many times.) So, then their final solution was to throw the thing out and buy a new one. Then they proceeded to pitch me refurbished tablets, and told me they were discounted prices like they were doing me a favor. Overall, if you like spending hundreds of dollars for a paperweight year after year, then this is the perfect item for you!

My daughter wanted to add her own review: DO NOT BUY!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! It is a piece o junk! It does not work at all. Don't be fooled by the commercials. They make it look like a good product but it is really a piece of junk. DO NOT BUY!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
rows.title: Overpriced Junk

rows.text:
I have attempted to make a cable 20 times. It's always the same result. The cable tester shows everything is fine, but no matter what computer or router they are plugged into, the pins will not contact and make a connection.

Saving a little money is definitely not worth it in this case. I have wasted an hour and half to perform a job that should have taken 5 minutes and still no results. I would have been better served to spend $50 on a single cable.

rows.text:
UPDATE: After less than a few months using this, it has completely stopped working! At week 4 the fan started to sound horrible, like someone with a can of marbles, and eventually died completely. The heating coil has NEVER ONCE provided the temperature listed on the knob. Then, toward the end of its life (again, less than 6 months into usage), it CAUGHT FIRE. THIS IS A HUGE FIRE RISK This is by far one of the worst made, worst designed pieces of complete garbage I've ever wasted my money on. !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!DO NOT BUY!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
SAVE YOUR OWN LIVES AND THOSE THAT LIVE NEAR YOU. DO NOT BUY THIS EVER. AVOID AT ALL COSTS. IF YOU HAVE ONE, RETURN IT OR THROW IT AWAY!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!THIS ITEM IS DANGEROUS!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

Temps aren't very accurate and there absoultely NEEDS to be a fan speed controller. It constantly blasts at 100% which is not always the best choice.

You can add your own controller, but the body is a bit annoying to disassemble. Once disassembled I added an adjustable fan speed controller and removed the horrible bell. The next modification I will make is removing the manual timer, replacing it with a microcontroller that can support both temperature accurately and set the timer for longer than 30 minutes (the max on the manual timer).

The area where you press your thumb against the main body to remove the tray wears very very quickly. The rubber feet keep falling off, it doesn't seem they're attached with any adhesive or hardware.
rows.title: !!!!!!!!DO NOT BUY!!!!!!!!!!!!! HUGE FIRE RISK!!!!!!!!!!! HORRIBLY MADE!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

rows.text: I really enjoyed this book! I have read every Goddess Girl book and this one is excellent! Pheme, goddess of gossip and rumor, has a tiny problem. Her constant hunger of gossip has gotten her in some trouble. Because of snooping in the goddess Athena' s room, she was catch red handed while reading Athena' s diaryscroll and by red handed, I mean once she touched it her hands turned red!!!!!!!! This is only one of her problems. She has a rogue mortal boy on MOA (Mount Olympus Academy), has a dream to reach, her job at at risk, the sun's control in inexperienced hands, and a mega cute red checked, mischief eyed love god named Eros stuck in her head and heart!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! CAN'T A GODDESS GIRL HAVE A BREAK!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! But at the end, all problems are solved and a glittery gift is given to Pheme to help her with speedy gossip!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! I really enjoyed this book alot and I hope u do too!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! Oh and if u like a sweet romantic guy, Eros is your godboy!!!!!!! <3  I am a Hades fan myself (there is alot of him in Persephone the Phony.......... HE IS SOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO HOT!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!), but Eros is a hopeless romantic and he is awesome with the ladies ;) I hope everyone gets a chance to read this witty book of myth, magic, and love!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
rows.title: Pheme the Gossip!!!!!!!

title: Rant hall of fame
blurb: Score = length + profanity + ALL-CAPS + exclamation marks. The purest artisanal Karen energy Amazon has seen.

rows.text:
I ORDERED THIS PRIMARILY FOR THE BLADES, AS EXTRAS FOR MY UNIT. IT CAME QUICKLY, WAS TO BE A 'NEW" ITEM, AND WAS JUST COVERED WITH MOTOR OIL!!!!!

AS MOST OF US DO WITH AMAZON WHEN WE RECEIVE A DEFECTIVE, (OR USED, OIL COVERED), WRONG ITEM, WE HAVE TO DECIDE IF IT IS EVEN WORTH THE EXPENSE, HASSLE, OF RETURNING AT ALL, WHICH THESE SELLERS RELY ON, WE READ ALL THE TIME IN REVIEWS, (BILLIONS IN THESE PHONY, DAMAGED, FALSE SALES NOT CHALLENGED DUE TO TIME, AGGRAVATION). HAS HAPPENED TO ME NOW, ONE TOO MANY TIMES, TO INCLUDE A DELIBERATELY SENT WRONG ITEM, BY AMAZON, AND FOOTSMART, (HAVE PROOF), THOUGH THEY TRIED TO BLAME ME, 4 DAYS OF EMAILS, LAST WEEK ALONE, OF THE LAST 4 ORDERS I'VE PLACED WITH AMAZON, 3, 75%, LAST MONTH, WERE NOT JUST WRONG, BUT FILTHY, OIL COVERED, USED, SHOES DESCRIBED AS REAL LEATHER, BUT NOT, AND THE DELIBERATE FRAUDULENT ORDER, AN ACTUAL BLANK ORDER, MY INVOICE, FOR ALL TO SEE, NOTICE, AS I TRIED TO STOP, RECTIFY, IMMEDIATELY WHEN GOT MY EMAIL CONFIRMATION. I ASSUMED THAT POST THIS ORDER I SHOULDN'T HAVE CLICKED ON TO PLACE, NO SIZE/COLOR, AS ASSUMED WAS A TEMPORARY GLITCH IN WEBSITE, AS AMAZON, (PER WINDOWS), WAS HAVING MANY PROBLEMS THIS DAY. OF COURSE I THOUGHT, THAT IT'S AGAINST THE LAW TO BILL ME FOR A NON DESIGNATED ITEM, BLANK, AND SURELY BAD CUSTOMER SERVICE, THAT THE ITEM WOULD THEN BE ADDED CORRECTLY, LATER, AS EMAIL WOULD SHOW. NOT. AND BEING A REALIST, WITH SUPPOSEDLY 5 OF MY SIZE/COLOR LEFT, THAT PERHAPS STOCK DID RUN OUT, OTHERS ORDERING AT SAME TIME, AND THAT I WOULD BE NOTIFIE, SOON! SURELY THIS HAPPENS, AND WOULD HAVE BEEN FINE IF NOTIFIED, IMMEDIATELY, ASAP, WITH AMAZON HAVING THE LATEST INFO., POP UPS ON AVAILABILITY OF COURSE. UPON SEEING MY EMAIL, THE BLANK ORDER, I CHECKED THE PRODUCT PAGE FOR THESE FOOTSMART SHOES, (5 LEFT WHEN MY ORDER WENT THROUGH, ON ORDER, CART). SURE ENOUGH THE "PINK POP UP" CAME UP, SAYING "NO LONGER AVAILABLE"? DID THIS MEAN AFTER I ORDERED, OR BEFORE, AS THIS POP UP, DISAPPEARED, CAME BACK, PROBLEMS. ONLY AMAZON WOULD KNOW, SURELY COMES UP WHEN, BEFORE THEY FORWARD AN ORDER, AND OF COURSE IS ILLEGAL TO SEND A BLANK ORDER, (BUT FOR THE TYPE OF SHOE), BILLING FRAUD, AND WITH THEIR WEBSITE PROBLEMS, SURELY WOULD BE VERIFIED BEFORE BEING SENT TO FOOTSMART, THEN I WOULD BE NOTIFIED? THOUGH HAVING RECEIVED A FRAUD ORDER, NON LEATHER SHOES AS LEATHER, AND THIS FILTHY OIL COVERED APPLIANCE PART, AND WOULD BE ILLEGAL TO SEND THIS BLANK ORDER TO FOOTSMART, I BEGAN THE PROCESS, (NOT MY JOB), OF TRYING TO FIND OUT JUST WHAT AMAZON HAD SENT TO FOOTSMART, PLANNED ON SENDING, WHAT THE PROTOCOL WAS IN CASES LIKE THIS? AND WAS SO GLAD, PER PREVIOUS ORDER EXPERIENCE, TO HAVE SCANNED IN MY AMAZON CART PAGE, THE ACTUAL ORDER, SIZE, COLOR. AND MUST HAVE HAD A "VIBE", (PER EXPERIENCE), THAT THOUGH ILLEGAL, IF FOOTSMART RECEIVED THIS BLANK ORDER, NO SIZE/COLOR DESIGNATED, THAT FOOTSMART MAY ACTUALLY, (BY POLICY APPARENTLY), JUST FILL THIS ORDER WITH WHATEVER SIZE OR COLOR THE ORDER FILLER, (WAREHOUSE PERSON?), MAY CHOSE TO DUMP ON ME, (NOW THE POINT OF NO RETURNS RELIED ON, MY OILY PARTS, OTHER BAD ORDERS NOT RETURNED), THE THINKING THAT WHEN I RECEIVED THIS WRONG, BAD, FRAUDULENT ORDER, (BY BOTH), THAT FIRST THEY WOULD BLAME ME, (AS FOOTSMART/AMAZON DID), FOR "HITTING THE WRONG BUTTON", (TWICE, ONE FOR COLOR, ONE FOR SIZE), AS HAPPENED ONCE BEFORE WITH AMAZON, AND I JUST BELIEVED THEM. SO, WITH VOLUME THE KEY TO THESE PENNY PROFIT ITEMS, THE AMAZON SURCHARGE, THE WORST THAT WOULD HAPPEN TO THEM WHEN FILLED WITH BOGUS ITEM, IS THAT I WOULD HAVE TO PAY TO RETURN THIS PHONY ITEM, THAT THEY WOULD BLAME ME FOR MISORDERING OF COURSE, AMAZON STILL MAKES THEIR PENNIES PROFIT, (LITERALLY, WITH MILLIONS OF ORDERS LIKELY DAILY, ADDS UP), AND FOOTSMART GETS THE SHOES BACK TO RESELL, (THE WRONG ONES).OR THAT I WOULD NOT RETURN THE SHOES, NO TIME TO DO, OR TO DISPUTE, AND THEY "WIN", EVEN MORE "PENNIES' PROFIT! JUST AS AM ACTUALLY UNABLE TO PHYSICALLY RETURN THIS DIIRTY, SEEMING USED, OIL COVERED CUISINART PART(S)!!!! AS THIS VENDOR DOESN'T ACCEPT ANY RETURN OF "FOOD PREP" ITEMS, (REGARDLESS OF IF WORK OR NOT, DAMAGED, ETC), OR OF "USED, DIRTY" ITEMS"? I WOULD NEVER RETURN A "DIRTY" ITEM OF COURSE, THOUGH THIS IS PRECISELY WHAT THIS SELLER, SENT ME? AND HERE, MY "BAD" FOR NOT READING HIS RETURN POLICY FIRST, AS MOST DON'T, ASSUMING THAT DAMAGED, BROKEN, USED PARTS OF COURSE, (AS IN ACTUAL STORES), COULD BE RETURNED. AND CLEARLY RELYING ON ME, MOST, NOT HAVING THE TIME, CAPABILITY, OF SORTING THROUGH THE INCOMPREHENSIBLE MAZE OF AMAZON PROTOCOL, TO "DISPUTE" A $25.00 ITEM! OR A $50, $10, ETC. ITEM, WHATEVER OUR BREAKING POINT IS............THEN WITH AMAZON, NOW I KNOW, A PARTY TO THE FURTHER FRAUD, LIES, THAT THEY WILL, THOUGH THEY CERTAINLY HAVE THE 'ORIGINAL CART ORDER", PROOF OF WHAT WAS ACTUALLY ORDERED, LIKELY AGREE WITH ANY FALSEHOOD THE SELLER MAY STATE, AS IN MY CASE, 3 DAYS AFTER TRYING TO CANCEL MY "BLANK SHOE ORDER", (HOURS AFTER PLACING IT, CORRECT SIZE, COLOR ORDERED, NO NOTICE OF OUT OF STOCK)), INCLUDING ASKING BOTH IN EMAIL, WHAT THEY WERE SENDING ME?? WHICH NEITHER ANSWERED AMAZINGLY, UNTIL 3 DAYS LATER, AFTER RECEIVING MY EMAILS TO CANCEL, TELL ME WHAT THEY WERE SENDING, AND BEING HONEST, TRYING TO JUST GET THE RIGHT PRODUCT, PREVENT RECEIVING A FRAUDULENTLY SWENT ONE, GAVE THEM (FOOTSMART), MY CORRECT SIZE, THE COLOR ORDERED. ASKING THEM IF THIS IS WHAT THEY WERE SENDING, IF NOT TO CANCEL! FOOTSMART'S RESPONE WAS TO EMAIL ME THE NEXT DAY, THAT THEY "COULDN'T CANCEL" MY ORDER ALREADY IN PROCESS, STILL REFUSING, (AMAZON TOO), TO INFORM ME OF WHAT THEY WERE SHIPPING ME!! AND THE ORDER DID NOT SHIP FOR 3 DAYS, ONLY AFTER FOOTSMART, SURELY IN TOUCH WITH AMAZON, DELIBERATELY, EMAILED ME THAT THEY WERE SENDING ME, "WHAT YOU ORDERED, A SIZE 8, 38, IN PEARL"!!!! WHICH OF COURSE I DID NOT ORDER!!! ORDERED A SIZE 37, 7, IN PEARL, WHICH FOOTSMART ONLY KNEW BY MY INSTANT EMAIL TO THEM, AND AMAZON PER THE HIDEOUS, SELLER WEIGHTED, PROTOCOL, NO WAY TO EVEN CONTACT AMAZON ABOUT PER THEIR MENUS, TO STOP, AS THEY INTEND,GIVING THE SELLER'S CARTE BLANCHE, TO KNOW THAT THE ORDER PROCESS MAY HAVE ALREADY BEGUN, EVEN ON BLANK ORDERS NOW, ESPECIALLY WITH AMAZON'S WEBSITE DOWN, UNABLE TO EVEN SEND MY EMAIL FOR COUPLE HOURS TO THEM, FOOTSMART! THOUGH I AM SURE THAT FOOTSMART WAS QUITE ABLE TO CONTACT AMAZON, TO FIND OUT WHAT MY ACTUAL ORDER WAS, FROM MY "CART"! NEVER AN INTENT TO NOTIFY ME THAT THESE WERE OUT OF STOCK, A REASONABLE EXCUSE, THE LEGAL ETHICAL THING TO DO, BY BOTH.

INSTEAD, FOOTSMART, AMAZON, CHOSE TO COLLABORATE, TO SPEND ALL THEIR HOURS, (SCREW ME WITH 6 EMAILS, 4 DAYS OF THIS), INSANE, TO BLAME ME AS FOOTSMART DID, AFTER REFUSING TO CANCEL A DAY LATER, REQUEST MADE IMMEDIATELY AFTER THIS ORDER, NEITHER EVER TELLING ME WHAT THEY WERE SENDING ME, OR WHAT THE ORDER WAS FOR SENT BY AMAZON, (THE INVOICE I HAD OOF COURSE, BLANK)!!! THEY ARE WELL PRACTICED AT THIS, ROUTINE I PRESUME. THOUGH I PRESUMED THAT THERE WAS A "FAIL SAFE", THAT IF AMAZON HADN'T CAUGHT THIS BLANK ORDER, THAT AT LEAST OH SO (UN) ETHICAL, FOOTSMART, WOOULD AT LEAST NOTIFY ME THAT THE SHOES WERE OUT OF STOCK!

ALL JUST SO INCOMPREHENSIBLE, TO EITHER COVER UP ERRORS, MISTAKES MADE BY AMAZON, AND/OR TO JUST SCREW ME, AND HAVE FOOTSMART BE ABLE TO DUMP LEFTOVER PRODUCT ON ME, AT SAME TIME EMAILING ME THAT I HAD ORDERED THE WRONG SIZE!, SAME DAY OF SHIPPING, 3 DAYS LATER, AFTER REFUSING TO CANCEL 1ST DAY OR TO EVEN TELL ME WHAT THEY WERE SENDING!(BOTH)!!

ALL THESE CORRUPTED, DISHONEST, CRUEL, PSYCHO, MACHINATIONS, BY BOTH, CLEARLY GETTING THEIR STORIES STRAIGHT, COLLABORATING, RATHER THAN SIMPLY INFORMING ME, SORRY, OUT OF STOCK, 1ST, 2ND, 3RD DAY!! AND PER THIS, 3RD DAY, AMZON ALSO WRITES ME, PER MY 5TH REQUEST TO BOTH, THAT THEY ARE UNABLE TO GIVE ME A COPY OF THE ORDER THEY SNT TO FOOTSMART, (AS PROPRIETARY), BUT REFUSED TO STATE WHAT THE ORDER, ACTUALLY ORDERED, BOTH THIINKING THEY WOULD JUST PUSH ME TO THE WALL OF GIVING UP, (AMAZON'S "DISPUTE" PROCESS), AND ON THIS DAY, ONLY BY ENTERING INTO THE CREDIT CARD FRAUD, PAYMENT MENU, WAS I BLE TO REACH A LIVE PERSON AT AMAZON BY PHOINE, (NOW THEIR NOT RECEIVING PAYMENT POSSIBLY, IS AN ISSUE WORTH HAVING A LIVE HELP PERSON). HE KINDLY CONNECTED ME TO AN UNBELIEVABLY TITLED, AS ALL ARE, "CUSTOMER SERVICE" EXECUTIVE, SUPERVISOR, WHO, AS THEIR EMAIL OF SAME DAY DID, TRIED TO TELL ME THAT PERHAPS, i HAD "HIT THE WRONG BUTTON"!!!! AMAZON'S, ALL THEIR, ROTE ANSWER'S TO ANY ERROR THEY MAKE CLEARLY!!!

SPENDING HUNDREDS, PERHAPS THOUSNDS IN MAN HOURS, TO ABUSE, LIE TO, CHEAT, ME, FOR MERE PENNIES PROFIT FOR EACH......A $50.00 ITEM, RATHER THAN TELL THE TRUTH!..UNREAL!
AND WHY? BECAUSE CLEARLY THIS IS THEIR "M.O.", AMAZON'S, AND THEIR CRONIES ALL THE TIME? HOW MANY MILLIONS DOES AMAZON RAKE IN OVER OUR SUPPOSEDLY "HITTING THE WRONG BUTTON"??

OF COURSE, ALL THIS TORTURE STOPPED WHEN I INFORMED THEM THAT INDEED, I HAD "SCANNED' MY ACTUAL ORDER, THE CART, SHOWING THAT I ORDERED A SIZE 7, "37", IN PEARL!!!

SUDDENLY AMAZON CREDITED ME FOR THE COST OF THESE BOGUS SHOES, AND I RECEIVED A NOTE OF APOLOGY, (FOR ANY PROBLEMS I MAY HAVE HAD), WITH A PRE PAID RETURN POSTAGE LABEL!!!

I REALIZE NOBODY WILL EVER READ THIS "REVIEW" AS DOES AMAZON, ERGO PUBLISHED, HERE IN APPLIANCE PART NEVERLAND, THOUGH EXPLAINS WHY I AM NOT RETURNING THIS OIL COVERED MESS, (AND THIS SELLER'S BIZARRE, SURE PROFIT RETURN POLICY, AS IT SEEMS ALL ARE PER AMAZON'S MOST CORRUPTED PRACTICES....NOT ONLY IS THE CUSTOMER ALWAYS WRONG, BUT THEY WILL SPEND MANY HUNDREDS OR MORE, DAYS, HOURS, TO LIE, CHEAT, AND DRIVE US INSANE, RATHER THAN ADMIT A NORMAL ERROR, TAKE THE TIME FOR ORDER ACCURACY, OR FOR TAKING SERIOUSLY CUSTOMER FEEDBACK, DISPUTES......THAT THEIR DISPUTE PROCESS IS BOGUS, AND THAT THEY WILL STEAM ROLL A CUSTOMER AS ME, TO SAVE A FEW PENNIES LITERALLY, & DO NOT GIVE A CRAP ABOUT WHAT THEY SELL! HOW BAD, DEFECTIVE, WILL LIE FOR WITH THE SELLER.

I ADVISE ALL TO "SCAN" THEIR ACTUAL CART ORDERS IF ORDERING FROM THIS "TOO BIG TO FAIL" MONSTER. I HAVE HAD IT WITH THE "CRAP SHOOT' OF ORDERING FROM THIS 'TOO BIG TO FAIL" BEHEMOTTH, AND LET "BESSO" DO HIS OWN QUALITY CONTROL, (NONE), FROM OUTERSPACE, WHERE HE IS APPARENTLY SPENDING OUR MILLIONS TO GO.

FINALLY, I HAVE READ THAT MOST 'INFOMERCIAL" PRODUCTS, NOW MAINSTREAM, FOR LOW END, (MAJOIRTY OF ITEMS SOLD, THEIR BEAD & BUTTER), THAT IT IS ACTUALLY THE PROFIT ON "SHIPPING", MORE THAN THE PRODUCT ITSELF, WHERE THE BIG MONEY IS, AS WELL AS THE FACT THAT MOST PEOPLE DO NOT BOTHER TO RETURN ITEMS OF COURSE WHERE THE SHIPPING COST IS WORTH MORE THAN THE ITEM, AT WHATEVER PRICE POINT MAKES IT NOT WORTH THE EFFORT TO DO, (TOTAL PROFIT, LARGE PERCENT FOR THE SELLERS). AND AMAZON IS ONE LARGE "PARASITE" ON THE RETAIL ECONOMY, THE MIDDLEMAN. IT'S IS CLEAR TO ME NOW, THAT A HUGE PART OF AMAZON'S PROFIT, IT'S SELLERS, GENERALLY SMALL, UNKNOWN, HARD TO FIND, IS ON CUSTOMER'S NEVER RETURNING ITEMS, AND IF THEY DO, DUE TO AMAZZON'S ERROR, IF YOU DON'T 'SCAN" YOUR CART, THEY WILL FIGHT TO YOUR DEATH TO MAINTAIN THEIR PRACTICE OF THE "CUSTOMER IS ALWAYS WRONG", MADE THE ERROR, JUST TO KEEP THE FEW BUCKS, CENTS, THEY MAKE IN SURCHARGES, (PARASITE), "POSTAGE". I HAVE NOTICED SINCE THE ADVENT OF CUSTOMERS NOW HAVING TO ASK FOR RETURN AUTHORIZATION, LABELS, THAT THE "RETURN" SHIPPING CHARGE, ON THE LABEL, IS AT LEAST A 'POUND" HEAVIER!!!! PURE PROFIT! BEWARE!
