But soon, you realize this is the best song or one of the best songs on this album! It's packed with energy like "Beast and the harlet", has an amazing solo like "The Beast and the harlet," paints a picture like, once again, "the beast and the harlet", yet has a sound that belongs to its self and its self alone...like "the beast and th-"...you know...AWESOME SONG!!!

Track 5.) "Trash and Scatterered" ( Rating- 9 out of 10- Awesome song!)

Here we have, yet another great song! This song leans more to the "Burn it down" side than "Blinded in chains," but soon you may find yourself listening to this song regularly as soon as you open up to it. Once again, another great song on this epic album!

Track 6.) "Seize the Day" (Rating- 8.5 out of 10- great slow paced song)

Whoa! What the hell happened! Everything just slowed down and that guys voice became milky smooth all of a sudden! Ahh well, it's a good song...

Now, "Seize the Day" may not be Avenged Sevenfolds' best "sweet 'n slow" song, but it's still good. In fact, it's one of the few slow paced songs I actually like, and that's saying something! In fact, gernally, I hate all these slow songs and all this new stuff today like rascal flats and this r&b crap. Worthy listen to, and calms you down from the other 5 action packed song.

Track 7.) "Sidewinder" (Rating- 9.5 out of 10- awesome song!)

Here we have an intresting song that changes direction everynow and then. One moment, you think it's gona go right, but then goes in the opposite direction while saying "left is cooler, right can burn in hell for all I care!"...quite unpredictable, one moment following a climbing riff, this goes into this sidewinding sort of tune and the mood from the part before changes. The moderate tempo in the beginning, became fast paced, slowed down, and moderate. Still, just because it takes you on this roller coaster that not just goes up and down but left, right, diagonal right, hell even backwards, doesn't mean it's a great song. Yet another noteworthy song on here that's is a great listen too!

Track 8.) "The Wicked End" (rating- 8.5 of 10- great song)

Here we have another song that's intresting and great listen too. Quite different then what you normally hear I bet, but once again, I really can't dis this song. What can I say, it's a great song! Like "Sidewinder," you'll find some parts changing rapidly, but don't get me wrong, it's a great song.

Track 9.) "Strength Of The World" (rating- 10 out of 10- AWESOME!)

Alright, get some snacks and prepare for a dozy. Here we have an epic at about 9:15 and tells a story. It's quite different from the other songs on this album, but it's one of the best songs on here. In fact, it's my personal favorite! It's just so...epic! Listen to it, go on...don't be afraid, it's a song of awesomeness!
However, I don't mean to relate this to anything like rhasody or follow those lines, Avenged Sevenfold contains it's own special flare, leaves some parts missing, and allows the listener to fill in the gaps themselves, which frankly, works out well = ).

Track 10.) "Betrayed" (rating- 8.5 out of 10-good song!)

Here we have yet another...again...good song! While you may not be listening to this one and prefering to play the hell out of Bat Country or something, this song is still a great listen and worth your time.

Track 11.) "M.I.A." (rating- 10 out of 10- AWESOME!)

Ahh, here we go, a perfect way to close. This song starts up all quite with a simple yet pretty guitar part...you just know all hell is about to break lose, don't ya? While hell might not come roaring out of the gates, a perfect blend of harmony and melody does! This is, again, another one of Avenged Sevenfolds best songs. I consider it underated as it's quite overshadowed by "Beast and the Harlet" and "Almost Easy" from the newer album these days, but without out a doubt, it is one of Avenged Sevenfolds best. Turn it on, play it, learn it, love it!

Overall Review- See all those negative posts giving this album a 1 star rating? Ignore those, they are just fans of the first and second album who are taking this change in the right direction a little too hard. While "Waking the Fallen" contained some great songs yes, I can safely say "City Of Evil" kills it as nearly every song on here is...well, great! This is possibly Avenged Sevenfolds best album to date and well worth more than your 15 bucks so get it before it becomes some lost rare like Metallica's "Master Of Puppets" album at my wal-mart (keyword- *my*, because my wal-mart sucks and hardly restocks on cd's at all =( ) .

All and all, this album is a MUST BUY!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

Rating- 10.5 out of 10
rows.title: ~A Turn In The Right Direction~ possibly A7X's best album~

rows.text:
Jan 26, 2015 UPDATE: Okay, here we go. I've never had to REWRITE A REVIEW, but this time I blew it and wrote a bad review! MEA CULPA!

I gave it 5 stars initially. Now I give it TWO stars for FABULOUSLY BAD SUPPORT, and it would be ZERO STARS except the hardware is decent and I wanted to be fair.

The printer is pretty great. I still stand by that. Almost as good as Amazon Customer Service. While I have a lot BAD to say about XYZ, I CANNOT SAY ENOUGH GOOD ABOUT AMAZON! THANK YOU, AMAZON! Amazon DOES customer service. XYZ SCREWS customer service. My first printer died on me. Amazon had me a replacement in 3 days! AMAZON IS GREAT! I have ordered hundreds of times and that won't stop because AMAZON ->DOES<- CUSTOMER SERVICE! Amazon has EARNED MY TRUST AND LOYALTY.

XYZprinting's people however are MAJOR BUMMERS and the company is insanely BAD, UNETHICAL, AND DECEITFUL.

If you are a tech, buy the printer. It is a good piece of hardware. If you're not at technical guru DO NOT BUY THIS PRINTER!

You SHOULD know where it is manufactured and supported: THAILAND! They try to get you to think they are a Brittish company, or they go for Chinese, but they are NEITHER, and boy does it make a difference! The hardware is so cheap because it is made by near slaves. The software is MINIMALLY USEFUL. The slicer SUCKS OUT LOUD. It often cannot even slice objects, and will literaly run forever without producing ANYTHING if you let it. Both printers I've had so far have BIG PROBLEMS IDENTIFYING CARTRIDGES!!! USING XYZ BRANDED FILAMENT it says they cartridges are OFFBRAND! I have --ONLY-- XYZ filament, and yet it says I'm using a different brand and the jerks in Thialand remotely BRICK MY CARTS!!!!! And I just received my cart resetter today - I have never used one yet! Boy, that is GOING to change! I want a DIVORCE FROM XYZ!

If you are NOT A TECHNICAL GURU STAY AWAY FROM THIS PRINTER! Why? Because their support is a VACUUM! THEIR SUPPORT SUCKS IN THE WORST POSSIBLE WAY! And you WILL need support!

WORST OF ALL, XYZware is SPYWARE! They MONITOR YOUR EVERY PRINT. WITHOUT TELLING YOU!

AND THEY CAN DISABLE YOUR PRINTER FILAMENT CARTRIDGES REMOTELY! They CAN AND DO MESS WITH THEIR CUSTOMERS!

If you have ANY desire NOT TO USE THEIR FILAMENT? THEY WILL KNOW!!! And THEY WILL DISABLE YOUR CARTRIDGE!

Their PHONE support is SUPER! But they DO NOT WANT to do phone support! They shunt you over to their website, and the JERKS who do their support on their website are HORRIBLE! They don't understand our culture and they are insulting and HIGHLY OFFENSIVE -

and that is the GOOD PART! IT gets worse.

Your only defense against them spying on you is to either block XYZware TOTALLY (Incomeing AND OUTGOING - and you CANNOT block OUTGOING with Win XP! You will have to BUY blocking software if you use XP!). And some versions of their software WILL NOT WORK -AT ALL- WITHOUT INTERNET ACCESS! If you have one of those versions you will have to downgrade!!!

If you want to use a cartridge resetter, and there are GOOD REASONS why you should, THEY WILL MESS WITH YOU! Why use a resetter? Hey, guess what? YOU CAN'T USE ALL YOUR FILAMENT! It is set up to abort printing BEFORE you use the filament up, and I had one quit with quite a LOT of filament in it! WASTED! XYZ says there is NO filament, but my eyes say XYZ is a liar! A cartridge resetter will fix this problem, and it only take a few uses for the resetter literally to pay for itself.

Do you want to use colors OTHER than the SEVERELY LIMITED XYZ COLOR CHOICES? (13 colors TOTAL? Are they kidding?) You can - with a resetter.

Do you want to use PLA on your daVinci? YOU CAN! The resetter I bought lets you set the temps for extruders AND build plate! It also lets you recover from a bricked cartridge if they brick it remotely! If your EEPROM in the cart is fried the resetter can load a factory image into the EEPROM and most likely will restore its function.

But IF YOU USE A RESETTER??? XYZ WILL SPANK YOU! They will BRICK YOUR FILAMENT CART EEPROMS and then your $30 filament cartridge is DEAD! Money down the toilet!

The fact that they abuse their customers by SPYING ON THEM and by DAMAGING THEIR FILAMENT CARTRIDGES should be enough for ANYONE to realize these people are deliberately abusing their customer base, not only by spying, but by DAMAGING CARTRIDGES to keep customers a PRISONER to XYZ! They have gone to insane lengths to keep their CLOSED system airtight!

I still have my printer. I still love my printer. But I have had no contact with those bozos in over a month, and I've only HAD the printer two months! I will NEVER contact their customer support EVER AGAIN! THEY ARE THAT BAD.

And pay attention: MY WIFE IS ASIAN, a native of China. I know a lot about Asian people. And I know THESE GUYS ARE NOT TYPICAL! I know MANY good, honest, decent Asian folk. And the people of XYZware are EVERYTHING -BUT- GOOD, HONEST, DECENT PEOPLE!

BEWARE! IF YOU CANNOT TROUBLESHOOT TECH PROBLEMS WITHOUT HELP DO NOT BUY THIS PRINTER! #1 There WILL be tech problems to troubleshoot. It is a good product, but the field of 3Dprinting is IMMATURE. You WILL have problems. If you cannot solve them alone, buy a different brand. Trust me on this. #2 Their support is TRULY POOR. For instance, they have a large library of help videos! AND YOU CANNOT ACCESS THEM! The don't TELL you about them! The only way you CAN access them that I know of is to have one of their tech support people give the address to you.

And their help videos have very little detail. They assume you know things so they can keep the videos short. That being said, the videos DO help - when you have access to them. Their manual SUCKS OUT LOUD. Why such a crummy manual? Why keep the help videos SECRET? What is it with these people?

BEWARE! If you do NOT like spyware AVOID THIS PRODUCT because THE SOFTWARE ABSOLUTELY IS SPYWARE!

I am deepy sorry that I misled you with my initial review. At that time I was receiving phone support and I DID NOT KNOW ANY BETTER.

I DO KNOW BETTER NOW, and that is why I am taking steps to warn you! I leave the original review intact below this.

Take my advice - buy something else. You WILL save yourself SO MUCH FRUSTRATION buying elsewhere.

Again, I apologize to all for the review I posted first. I had just gotten the printer and had not run into their foul tech support. I did NOT know any better! Boy, I DO know better now! If you buy this printer, PLEASE! DO YOUR RESEARCH! Find out about the problems with support BEFORE YOU BUY. Believe me, there are a bazillion complaints about XYZ support online. All you have to do is look for it.

------- My original review is below here --------

Well... I read all the reviews here before buying. A lot of the issues people complain of are idiocy issues apparently. Blasted thing weighs a frickin TON! Man, I wasn't expecting THAT much weight! The box looked reasonably okay. I unpacked it - me and my 10 year old son. We, being GUYS, ignored the directions - of course! And you know what? We got it unpacked and set up anyway! I dunno. So far it seems idiot proof...

It took me a good 5 minutes to unpack. It took a while to feed the filament. It took multiple attempts to load it - apparently you just keep hitting retry until it extrudes, and it is visibly obvious when it does extrude. After you hit okay to show it loaded, it then cleans the nozzle automatically. Nice! Took maybe 8 minutes to feed the filament. Probably 2 minutes from now on since I know what to expect...

And then... I ran through the setup steps. I was a good boy. I folowed the manual. I'm sure it took over 15 minutes to get this far. Maybe 16 minutes?

And then... Magic! I am printing the first sample - the star vase.

Everything is working right. The vase is half finished. It looks AMAZING! Far out, man... It does what it says it will do! Imagine that!

The light does go off in the print chamber but it is EASY to turn on again! I've spent 40 minutes watching in fascination. It says 45 minutes to go. Looking good!

I bought the blue painter's tape sheet. Didn't want to mess with the glue stick after reading people's comments. The tape sheet is working great. And now I see why. If you don't have something down there for the plastic to stickTO it just isn't going to stick, period. The glass is far too slick.

The blue tape sheet is doing a great job so far. And so is the printer! I have no doubt I'll have more to say later, but initial impression and initial experience are both rather great! Which is amazing, because from the condition of the shipping container I expected it to be dead. There were bracing materials inside the printer that were BROKEN! My heart sank when I saw that. The big red strap that was supposed to hold the carriage immobile was SNAPPED IN TWO! And yet... It SEEMS to be working perfectly! Kudos on a study machine that obviously took a really bad whack but which seems to be performing impeccably!

I had it in my paws on time, and it is working quite well. I'd say this is a winner.

Would I reccomend it? You betcha! I'm quite happy with it! 5 stars is what it deserves at this point. Cheers!
-----------------------------------------
2015/01/26 Oh, what a LIE! I was IGNORANT! I'm STILL happy with the HARDWARE but I absolutely DO NOT RECCOMEND XYZ Ithe company) to ANYONE!
rows.title: Well, I GOT IT WRONG!  You'd better read this before you buy!!!  I MEAN THAT!

rows.text:
TNA Knockouts Tag Team Championship Match: Sarita and Taylor Wilde vs. The Beautiful People (Madison Rayne and Velvet Sky)
No Angelina Love thanks to business issues. DAMN IT! Well, they did the best with what they had I guess. Sarita and Taylor dominated at first with some high-fyling moves, and Sarita even pulled out some unique pins on Sky. However, Sky and Rayne started to wear Sarita down. Sarita and Taylor got the advantage again and Taylor went for a German suplex on Rayne, but Ryane resisted. A poorly executed springboard dropkick from Sarita allowed Taylor to hit the German and bridge it to get the win and become the first ever TNA Knockouts Tag Team Champions. Winners: Sarita and Taylor Wilde. Match Rating: 3/5

Grudge Match: Eric Young vs. Hernandez
Why do they do this pretty much every pay-per-view? It's really making me hate Hernandez. Well, Hernandez basically clothesline Eric Young a few times and then shoulder blocked him to the outside. Hernandez threw Young back into the ring and hit the Border Toss for the victory. Yippy skippy. Winner: Hernandez. Match Rating: 2/5

TNA X-Division Championship Match: Samoa Joe (Champion) vs. Daniels
Awesome match! It started out with Joe dominating Daniels, but Daniels regained the advantage using high-flying moves. Joe did ground Joe though by catching him coming off the top ropes with a Rock Bottom! Joe then applied some nerve holds on Daniels. Daniels did manage to fight back though and hit a Suicide Dive on Joe to the outsid! Daniels hurt his knee attempting this though, and Joe took advantage, smashing Daniels's face right into the steel steps! Daniels tried to get back into the ring, but Joe clotheslined the back of Daniels's leg! In the ring, Joe applied an Ankle Lock/leg bar submission hold but Daniels managed to get the ropes. Unrelenting, Joe then applied an STF, but Daniels still managed to get the ropes. Daniels then fought back with a neckbreaker and other power moves. Daniels then went for the BME after hitting an STO on Joe, but Joe rolled out of the way. Daniels DID land on his feet though. Daniels went for the Angel's Wings, but Joe managed to power out of the move. Joe then went for the Muscle Buster, after grounding Daniels with a very unique offensive move focusing on the injured leg, but Daniels fought out of it and went for the Last Rites, but Joe countered and locked in the Coquina Clutch. Daniels tried to fight out of it, but Joe got him on the ground and applied a body scissors to compliment the move, forcing Daniels to tap out. Winner: Samoa Joe. Match Rating: 5/5

Falls Count Anywhere Match: D'Angelo Dinero vs. Suicide
This could have, and should have, been better, but it's still good. Dinero was in the middle of an interview when Suicide ambushed him with a doubler axehandle backstage. They then brawled around in the backstage area, and Dinero took some pretty sick bumps. Suicide back body dropped him into a wheel barrow, and also threw him onto a steel guard railing, which made him land on some concrete. Dinero tried to climb a fence to escape from Suicide, but Suicide pulled Dinero's pants down and yanked him off the fence and onto a pile of wood! They continued to brawl, but Dinero got the advantage. Dinero smashed a cup on Suicide's head and then they fought to the ring. Suicide actually regained the advantage here, but Dinero grounded him with a suplex on the ramp. A table was set up next to the ramp, and Dinero went for a suplex off the ramp through the table, but Suicide actually fought out of it. They then brawled over to the top of the stage where Dinero's attempt at a DDE off the stage on Suicide was countered with a mule kick to the face. Suicide then brought out another table and set it up on the ramp. Suicide's Suicide Solution was blocked, but he did managed to hit a Rolling Hills on the stage onto Dinero. Suicide set Dinero up on the table and climbed onto a ledge above the entrance way and went for a leg drop, but Dinero moved, causing Suicide to crash through the table. Dinero covered Suicide for the win. Winner: D'Angelo Dinero. Match Rating: 4/5

TNA Women's Knockout Championship Match: Cody Deaner vs. ODB
This was a joke match, but it was still pretty damn entertaining. ODB beat the crap out of Cody at first, but the Deaner fought back and manhandled ODB. ODB responded with some strikes, but Deaner grounded her again and then got in the referee's face. The referee then refused to break ODB's pin attempt on Deaner when he got the ropes, and he even helped ODB roll Cody up! Cody did manage to kick out, and then ODB ate Deaner's Knockout Punch! This only got a two count, and Cody then went to the top ropes and started drinking out of ODB's flask! ODB got Cody off the top and hit a TKO to defeat Deaner and officially win the title! Winner: ODB. Match Rating: 4/5

Bounty TNA Legends Championship Match: Kevin Nash (Champion) vs. Abyss
Pretty good, but they got the rules a little bit mixed up and towards the end it became a mess. It started out with Nash and Abyss hitting power moves on each other in the ring, but then the fight spilled to the outside where Abyss tossed Nash into the steel guard rail and the steps. Back in the ring, both Abyss and Nash were going for Chokeslams on each other, but neither could get the other top. Abyss tossed Nash to the ground and then saw Dr. Stevie on the stage sitting in a chair, watching. Abyss turned around and ate a Big Boot from Nash! Stevie distracted the referee and tossed a chair into the ring, which Nash used to smash into Abyss's face. This only earned the two, and this prompted further referee distraction from Stevie. Daffney then ran into the ring with a taser, but Abyss laid her out with an astonishing Black Hole Slam! Nash stopped Abyss from tasering Daffney, but his attempt at the Jackknife Powerbomb was countered by Abyss. Abyss then called for Mick Foley, who was providing guest commentary, to bring him the barbed wire baseball bat! Foley tried to, but Abyss ended up cutting his hand on the barbed wire, and while the referee got Foley away, Nash tasered Abyss's BALLS and then rolled him up! After the match, Stevie refused to pay Nash, so Nash Jackknife Powerbombed him. Winner: Kevin Nash. Match Rating: 4/5

Lethal Lockdown Match: Beer Money, Inc. (Robert Roode and James Storm) and Team 3D (Brother Ray and Brother Devon) vs. The British Invasion (Brutus Magnus and Doug Williams) and The Main Event Mafia (Booker T and Scott Steiner)
This match was good, it just didn't live up to expectations. It started with Storm and Magnus, with Storm beating the crap out of Magnus and even hitting the Eye of the Storm. Williams came out next and they double-teamed Storm until Roode entered the match and cleaned house with some unique tag team moves along with Storm. Steiner was in next, and then everything just got confusing. It was madness and random violence until Brother Ray came out. Big Rob ambushed Brother Ray and whacked him in the back with a steel chair and ordered for the roof to be lowered. Ray did regain his posture and then SMASHED a steel chair in Rob's face! Ray then entered the match and "cleaned house" with very weak chair shots. Brutus tried to escape to the roof, but Roode and Storm followed, and they hit a double suplex on Brutus on top of the cage. With a crap load of weapons in the ring, with Devon smashing a trashcan lid in people's faces and everyone hitting their finishing moves, it all got really confusing. A highlight was when Ray placed a trashcan on Booker's crotch and then smashed a crutch on it though. The end came when Beer Money hit the DWI on Williams to get the win for their team. Winners: Beer Money, Inc. and Team 3D Match Rating: 4/5

Bobby Lashley vs. Rhino
This was just...okay, I guess. The ending really ruined it. The match started out with power moves, but Rhino grounded Lashley with some submissions. Lashley fought back, but Rhino pushed the referee in the way when Lashley went for the Spear. Rhino then laid Lashley out with the Gore as a new referee came in. This only got a two count though, and then when Rhino went for another Gore, Lashley hit him with a..."Knockout Punch" for the win. I am not amused. Winner: Bobby Lashley. Match Rating: 3/5

Five Way TNA World Heavyweight Championship Match: Kurt Angle (Champion) vs. AJ Styles vs. Hernandez vs. Matt Morgan vs. Sting
Hernandez cashed in his Feast or Fired briefcase right before the match began. Anyway, Hernandez dominated Angle out of the ring while the other three men watched. However, when both Angle and Hernandez were out of the ring, AJ and Sting started double-teaming Morgan. Hernandez gave Angle a suplex on the ramp and then went for the Border Toss off THE STAGE, but Eric Young ran out with a baton and smacked Hernandez in the back. Young then gave Hernandez a very poorly executed piledriver on the stage, which caused medics to come out and take Hernandez to the back. Anyway, Morgan tried to get away from Sting and Styles, but they ran out of the ring after him. AJ went for a Suicide Dive on Morgan, but Angle ran in the way to take the shot for Morgan! This renewed their friendship, and Morgan and Angle started working over Sting and Styles together. In the ring, Angle and Morgan double-teamed AJ to the point that AJ rolled out of the ring, but Sting came back in and got the advantage on both men. Sting even hit a freaking missile dropkick on Morgan! Sting then hit the Stinger Splash on Angle and Morgan repeatedly, but Angle fought out of the Scorpion Deathlock. AJ came back into the match and saved Sting from a double-team. Morgan hit the Hellevator on AJ, but Angle broke up the pin and hit the Angle Slam on Morgan. Sting laid Angle out with the Scorpion Death Drop, but Morgan broke up the pin. Morgan hit some of his signature offense on AJ, but while he was on the ring apron, AJ hit him out of nowhere with a Pele Kick! Sting was taken out by an Angle Slam, but AJ attacked Angle and hit the Styles Clash! Morgan broke up the pin, but then Morgan was sent to the outside courtesy of Sting!!! This match is awesome. Angle knocked Sting down and then kept Styles grounded with his usual offense and then went for a Tombstone Piledriver! AJ countered into a Styles Clash attempt, but Angle rolled through with it and locked in the Ankle Lock! Morgan came back into the ring and LAID ANGLE OUT WITH THE CARBON FOOTPRINT! Sting and Styles then worked together to knock Morgan back over the top rope! Sting and AJ stared at each other for a second, but then Sting left the ring and hit a flying clothesline on Morgan off the ring apron to the outside, acknowleding that his wrestling career is coming to a close, and AJ's is just beginning! AJ then hit a springboard 450 Splash on Angle to WIN THE TNA WORLD HEAVYWEIGHT CHAMPIONSHIP! Winner: AJ Styles. Match Rating: 5/5

OVERALL EVENT
Not the worst pay-per-view ever, but not even close to the best either. It was okay, but some of the matches didn't live up to expectations. The Suicide/Dinero match still wasn't as good as it should be and the Lethal Lockdown Match didn't live up to the hype. The main event was awesome, and Daniels/Joe was awesome, like usual, plus there was some nice storyline progression here and there and some big surprises, but overall, it just wasn't as good as you'd expect.
rows.title: TNA No Surrender 2009

rows.text:
Ok, so this is the 4th album by Alternative Metal band Red. Well, I hope they're still Alternative Metal...this album seems to be moving away from the metal area and more towards rock; not even hard rock, just straight rock. This isn't bad, but it isn't what I'd like to see the band do. I think they could actually do more if they turned around and went into metal rather than riding the border of rock and metal. However, I will say that I don't think the band did anything very different this time around. I personally put all the blame for this album onto Howard Benson, the producer. He has a reputation for ruining bands and I'm afraid that he's ruined a talented band's 4th outing. Anyway, about the band itself, Mike Barnes did a nice job on vocals for this album. He sings very well on this one (ok...as well as he can around the production). Anthony did a solid job on the guitars here, Randy plays some good bass lines, and Joe has his moments. There are some pretty good moments on this album. A few of these moments are actually some of the best of Red's career. And then there are some decent moments (I feel that they would've been better if Howard wasn't the producer), and then there are a few songs that I just think are ok, but turned out to be TERRIBLE (thanks Howard). Just saying, it's a VERY mixed album.

Music:

1. Release the Panic- This is one of the best moments on the album. This is also one of Red's heaviest songs ever. It's got a very eerie feel to it and it's full of gritty vocals. It may lack orchestrations, but I like this song a lot! This is why Red is considered Alternative Metal; They can deliver some pretty freaking heavy tunes. The drums are good, but I personally think Joe should try playing more aggressively on songs like this. It'd suit the mood so much better! The guitar part is definitely doing some shifts! It starts off doing some interesting chords and does an eerie melody and then goes back to chords. Personally, this song is GREAT, but it's too short. I feel like they could've done more things in the middle to spice up the music (Thanks again Howard Benson!). Good song though, even if it is short.

2. Perfect Life- This is the main single from the album and it's alright. Lyrically, it's a brilliant song, but musically, I find it lacking the intensity shown on the previous track as well as previous singles. This one is closer to rock, but it still does rock. This isn't a song I'd listen to often, but I'd still listen to it. It does have some good guitar work in it, but Joe's drumming is what gives it more of a rock feel, to my ears anyway. I will say that even if I don't think it's a favorite song, it's still WAY TOO SHORT! Even as a single, 2:51 is way too short for an Alternative Metal or Metal song! The average song length in my library is 5:10! I personally think that it's ridiculous! This album is 12 short songs like this and it's only about 38 minutes. I have albums with 9 songs on them that are an hour long! This song is good, but Howard Benson is annoying. Notice how Red made mostly 4 minute songs in the past. Now the longest song on this album is 4:17. Howard makes bands loose their quality. This is a decent single, but it's not as good as it could be.

3. Die for You- Ok, really? Just really? Just looking at the length, I know that this won't be good; 2:46. Within the first 30 seconds, it sounds like a pop song that you'd hear on the radio. This is the Howard Benson special; take a band that makes good, heavy, purposeful music and then turn them into pop acts. Obviously, I hate this song. As catchy as it may be, I think it's a disgrace to Red's name. Everything they stood for is gone. The only plus of this song is a short like 3 second guitar solo. But I honestly think this song is an embarrassment for this band.

4. Damage- Ok, I see lots of people hating on this song. This song is one of the few good moments on this disc. It may be slow, but at least it's still heavy like the Red of old. People are comparing this to Nu Metal like Disturbed? I can see a little bit of the the comparison, but if this was Nu Metal, there'd be MUCH more synth work in it. The synths in here act as a backing thing, but in Nu Metal, they'd be more upfront. I have to say that while this isn't what I'd expect from Red, it's a good song. It's heavy, but it's good. This one is a very good moment for Red on this album. It shows signs of life, but it does create a sense of polarity to the album. It's sandwiched in between two of the worst and most pop-sounding songs on the album! But regardless of its position on this album, this is one of my favorites on this album! Good song! Great riff, too!!!

5. Same Disease- Ok, this is the worst one here. No doubt. The guitar part at the beginning sounds promising, actually, but after the drums and vocals come in, it's a DISASTER!!! This is the one song that I can't blame Howard Benson for! This one is actually very poorly written. The lyrics are very pop-sounding, very repetitive, and aren't even within 2 levels of the quality we're used to getting from this band. Radio-sounding or not, the music is actually decent on this one! But the lyrics just totally SPOIL it! I don't even know what they were aiming for with this one, but I don't like it.

6. Hold Me Now- This is a ballad (as if you couldn't tell from the title) and it has a very modern pop sound to it. I think that the pop sound is due to the producer on this one (Nice one Howard!), but past the production, I'd say this would be where Red finally starts to show that they are still the same band. This has a pop sound to it, but I feel like if they had a different producer, it'd sound more like Pieces or Start Again. But I'm not going to complain about the song it is. It's a decent track, but it's not one I'd like to listen to frequently. Better than the preceding one by a light year though!

7. If We Only- This is probably the song that shows Red is still alive! This starts off with a VERY driving riff and a heavy drum part and then slows into a brooding verse with much orchestration. One reviewer said the orchestration resembles Symphony X more than old Red's orchestration. I agree to an extent, but I'm thinking more Kamelot, but either or. I can actually say that this song has Joe's best drum work for the album! Great drumming and I also think it's just a great song! Why they didn't make the rest of the album with this song's quality is a mystery. This song honestly ranks with their old stuff and I'd say this is one of their top 10 best tracks! Great song!!! I hope there's more like this in the future!

8. So Far Away- Ok, I thought this was their worst ballad (until I heard track 12 of this album). Anyway, this has good music! Howard added some pop elements, but they don't get in the way like before. However, this song suffers like track 5; lyrics are absolute crap! The chorus is just odd. And this isn't the type of ballad I'd expect from Red and I don't like it. It's just not the Red I know and I will never accept a Red that makes ballads like this. I'm just not feeling the emotion they are trying to transfer to the listener. I hear the emotion in the vocals, but it's just so badly written that I don't feel it. Sorry Red, but this one and track 5 are your faults. Howard didn't mess up this track either.

9. Glass House- This song has more of a pop-rock sound, but I do think that this song is another good moment for this album. There are orchestrations on this song and I actually think Joe did a decent job drumming here for what the song is. The opening is a pop sound, but the chorus has a more polished version of the sound we're used to. This one is another highlight for sure. Mike's singing here is very good and the band actually locks in on this one! The effects and extra instruments add to this song instead of taking away from it! The orchestrations on this one aren't like Red's usual orchestrations, but they aren't as extreme as they were on If We Only. Overall, this is a great song, and I appreciate it!

10. The Moment We Come Alive- This song is good. There are some pop elements in here, but this one does work out well. This is the Red we've known all along but there are pop elements in there. There's no orchestra, but this song doesn't need it. A piano part fills in for it. I do think that they did well on this song. I don't have any complaints on this song. It actually gives you a sense of hope and the music is very well done! And actually, there are some orchestrations in the bridge, but they are harder to hear. I just noticed them as I was listening to it now. This is a good song and I think this would be the best way to close the album. Even with the bonus tracks.

Bonus Tracks
*Note: I don't care about the remixes at all so I'm not even going to talk about them.

11. Love Will Leave a Mark- This song should honestly be on the real album and then they shouldn't have had a deluxe edition. This one is heavy and in your face. Judging by the name, I thought it would be another ballad, but I was surprised to find a song that is heavy and that carries on the spirit of what we're used to hearing! It has that lack of an orchestra, but oh well! This song is GREAT!!! I still think that this should be on the real album! This is the only bonus track that is worth having. It isn't as good as the title track or If We Only, but it's right there with them! This song is more like Hide than like the rest of the songs on this album, but needless to say, it's GOOD!!!

12. As You Go- This song is Howard Benson GARBAGE! I know that Howard Benson produces crap, but this is a new low even for him! This song is almost a radio ballad. Every thing except Mike sounds electronic. It sounds fake other than Mike Barnes's voice. I just don't like this song and I don't like listening to it. It's a poor track.

Verdict- I know that I pretty much trashed half of the songs on the album, but you will hear some good in the album. I can recommend it to those who like radio music and to those who know that it's not the same Red we love. I can't recommend it to metal fans though. Not the whole album. The only song that would please fans like myself looking for some Red to headbang to would be If We Only. While Damage and the title track are heavy, it wouldn't please most metal fans like Red's old stuff. So it's all up to you. I personally think the bad on this album far outweighs the good. If you like Bon Jovi, you know the bad that Howard Benson does. Here it is at it's worst.
rows.title: Too Many Filler Tracks!

rows.text:
I wish I could give it, and every product from his insane, abusive, whacked out mind, less than one star.

Let me rephrase the description here for you, a book of 'inspirational quotes' by a confirmed pedophile who I and others like me were raised to venerate as a prophet while he used our parents and us in every way possible and even went so far as to turn our mothers into 'religious prostitutes' until aids scared him out of it.

67. SO YOU HAVE GOT TO BELIEVE IN THE LORD AND IN ME, that I am a new prophet of a new day of a whole lot of new things that Paul never even thought about! (Maria: Some of these people, if you look back, seemed to spend a lot of time studying the Epistles, the writings of Paul.)

He called this 'Flirty Fishing' or 'FFing' or 'Esing' and told women they should be willing to be called 'God's whores']

[from a publication he wrote about a woman who didn't want to sleep with her female overseer, even though she had been 'given' by David Brand Berg to the overseer as an assistant and sexual companion.]

BUT THE MORE I THOUGHT ABOUT IT AND THE MORE WE DISCUSSED IT, THE MADDER I GOT! – To think that she could be so damn selfish as to be your travelling companion and yet never once help you out sexually! I mean, that’s totally against everything we have taught and written—totally!
AS FAR AS I’M CONCERNED, SHE DOESN’T BELIEVE WHAT I WRITE BECAUSE SHE DOESN’T OBEY WHAT I WRITE! She has withheld herself selfishly and independently from you. I don’t care how beautiful she is or how wonderful or how intelligent or how good she is with kids and blah, blah, blah! If she treated you like that, that just makes me absolutely furious and disgusted! I just can’t understand it. I don’t agree with it and I certainly don’t approve of it!
EVEN IF IT RUBBED HER THE WRONG WAY AND SHE DIDN’T LIKE IT AT ALL, SHE SHOULD HAVE GRITTED HER TEETH AND BORNE IT, just like any husband or any wife or any mate or any FFer has to do sometimes, even if she hated it! She should have done it just for your sake and out of love, compassion, sacrifice, unselfishness and sharing! (Maria: Because “the love of Christ constrained” her. – 2 Cor. 5:14.) – Absolutely!
(MARIA: AND I THINK THE LORD WOULD HAVE GIVEN HER THE LOVE THEN, that’s what usually happens. “As they went they were healed”. – Lk. 17:14.) Yes, she could have tried it at least one time! How does she know she doesn’t like it if she never had any? How could she have been so hard, stubborn and rebellious!
IT REMINDS ME OF SOME OF OUR SELFISH SISTERS IN THE FAMILY WHO HAVE GONE ALL THESE YEARS WITHOUT HELPING ONE SINGLE BROTHER, not giving one of them a tumble, not once! How selfish can they get? (Maria: They say they don’t have the faith for it.) Ha! There’s no excuse for not having the faith for anything! “Faith cometh by hearing the Word!! (Rom. 10:17.) – Read it!
THE WORD WILL GIVE YOU FAITH FOR IT! The only reason the Word and reading the Word doesn’t give you the faith for it is because you have rejected the Word and you refused to receive it, and therefore you refuse to believe it or obey it! (Maria: Yes! Samuel said to Saul,
(“BECAUSE THOU HAST REJECTED THE WORD OF THE LORD, THE LORD HATH REJECTED THEE!” 1 Sam.15:26) Exactly! “For rebellion is as the sin of witchcraft, and stubborness is an iniquity and idolatry!” (1 Sam.15:23.) “Behold, to obey is better than sacrifice, and to hearken than the fat of rams!” (Vs.22.) They are both just as bad, witchcraft and idolatry or rebellion and stubbornness!
SHE MUST BE A SELF-WORSHIPPER, a pride-worshipper! She doesn’t care that much about other people. Here you were, as desperately as you needed help, and she didn’t even care enough to help you herself when she had it right there! (James 2:15-17.)
SHE SELFISHLY SAID SHE BELIEVED IT WAS OKAY, BUT IT WASN’T FOR HER! – But what about you? – If it was okay and needed for you, she should have obeyed and sacrificed a little. She “had it by her”. She had a sister in need, and that Scripture is as plain as day on it, that if “thou hast it by thee” and don’t give it, and all you say is “be thou warmed and fed”—you’re saying, “Let somebody else warm and feed you, I’m not going to do it!”
IT JUST MAKES ME ABSOLUTELY SICK AND DISGUSTED! She may be sweet as can be and love the Lord, but if she’s that selfish and independent and unsacrificial and disobedient and rebellious and stubborn, Whew!-- Don’t tell me she believes the Letters!
YOU BELIEVE THE LETTERS AS MUCH AS YOU PRACTICE THEM! You believe God’s Word as much as you do it!—My words too! That’s why we had another RNR revolution in the Family and got rid of all those leaders who claimed, “Oh well, I believe it, and it’s all right for others, but it’s not for me.”—We’ve now replaced those disobedient leaders!
I DON’T LIKE HALF-HEARTED PEOPLE! I don’t like selfish independent people, who are not willing to sacrifice and to share and lay down their lives and their bodies for others, like I wrote in “You Are The Love of God!”
THAT WAS NOT THE LOVE OF GOD FOR HER TO DENY YOU AND WITHHOLD HERSELF FROM YOU IN THE VERY SAME BED! – To deny your need, even your pleasure, was not the love of God! That was Devilish selfishness and pride, which is of the Devil!—And her argument that making love only one time makes you a permanent mate, that’s ridiculous!

[End of quotes]

Besides all of this, he (and his wife who became leader after he died) taught that his followers should become mediums for dead people, that we should hate and despise 'church people', should absolutely not work for a living at secular employment and were forbidden (unless we got special exceptions) to go to 'system school' - because of course 'God's endtime children' wouldn't need more than reading, writing and arithmetic.

And we wouldn't have thought we would either, after all, we grew up believing that most of us were going to die in the 'great tribulation' before we were adults, we had no future to look forward to on this earth.

So all of this considered and more, do you really want to immerse yourself in his sewage?

He had a dream once that he published about how his followers were swimming in sewer. he interpretted it as them swimming in 'system' and 'church' but in retrospect i think maybe God was trying to tell him and all of us that that's what was really pouring out of his mouth, sewage.
